instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Pour Orange Vodka over the ice, then add Orange Juice and 7-Up.

Serve.

name: 20th Century
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Dry Vermouth, Creme de Cacao White and Lemon Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: 252  Shot
instructions:
Get a standard size Shot Glass.

Combine the Rum and Bourbon in the Glass.

Serve.

name: 357 Magnum
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Pour Spiced Rum and Vodka over the ice. Add 7-Up and stir.

Add Amaretto without stirring and serve.

name: 57 Chevy
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add Vodka, Peach Liqueur and Orange Liqueur to a Cocktail Shaker half-filled with ice. Shake and strain into the Highball Glass.

Fill with Pineapple Juice and serve.

name: 57 Chevy Shooter
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Bourbon, Orange Liqueur, Amaretto, Orange Juice, Pineapple Juice, Grenadine and 7-Up in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Shot Glass and serve.

name: 66 Drag Strip
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Gin, Rum, Pineapple Juice and add a splash of Grenadine in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Irish Cream, Coffee Liqueur, Amaretto and Cream to the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Irish Cream, Coffee Liqueur, Amaretto and Milk to the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: A Day at the Beach
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Coconut Rum, Amaretto, Orange Juice and Grenadine.

Stir, garnish with a slice of Orange if desired and serve.

name: A Fuzzy Thing
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or less with crushed ice (go easy on the ice.

Combine the Citrus Vodka, Triple Sec, Peach Liqueur, Pineapple Juice, Orange Juice and Sweet and Sour in the Shaker. A little Sweet and Sour mix is needed but not enough to overpower the Juice.

Shake or stir before serving.

name: A Gilligan's Island
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. Combine the Vodka, Peach Liqueur, Cranberry Juice and Orange Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into glass and serve.

name: A Kiss Good Night
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add Raspberry Liqueur and Strawberry Vodka, and then fill half way with Cranberry Juice.

Fill the rest with 7-Up, float a splash of Dark Rum on top and serve.

name: A Piece of A$$
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Southern Comfort and Amaretto.

Fill with Sweet and Sour and serve.

name: A.B.C. Shot
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour in the Amaretto. Pierce the Amaretto with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Irish Cream by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Amaretto. Then do the same thing with the Triple Sec.

Serve.

name: A.J.
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Apple Brandy and Grapefruit Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Martini Glass filled with cracked ice and serve.

name: Abrams Lemonade
instructions:
Add one cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Combine the Vodka and Pink Lemonade in the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Martini Glass and serve.

name: Absinthe Frappe
instructions:
Pour the Absinthe and Sugar (the quantity will need to be adjusted according to the brand of Absinthe as they vary greatly in sweetness) and 1 oz of Water into a blender.

Blend for a moment to dissolve the sugar and then, with the blender running, add 3 or 4 ice cubes through the hole in the top, pausing between cubes to let them get crushed.

Blend until smooth, pour into a Rocks Glass and serve.

name: Absolut Bullshit
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Absolut Vodka, Triple Sec and Red Bull in the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Absolut Can Dew
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add Vodka, Blue Curacao and top with Mountain Dew Code Red.

Shake or stir gently and serve.

name: Absolut Cosmo
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Absolut Vodka, Patron Citronge, Lime and Cranberry Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a twist of Lemon and serve.

name: Absolut Mixer
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add Absolut Vodka, Absolut Citron Vodka, Absolut Kurant Vodka, Absolut Peppar Vodka and fill with Orange Juice.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Orange and a Cherry and serve.

name: Absolut Royal F$ck Shooter
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Kurant Vodka, Whiskey, Peach Liqueur and a splash of Cranberry and Pineapple Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Glass and serve.

name: Absolut Sex
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Absolut Kurant Vodka, Melon Liqueur, Cranberry Juice and 7-Up or Sprite in the Glass.

Serve.

name: Abstinence on the Beach
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add Cranberry Juice, Grapefruit Juice and Cream of Coconut to the Glass.

Stir, optionally garnish with a Cherry or a slice of Orange and serve.

name: Acapulco
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Tequila, Rum, Pineapple and Grapefruit Juices in the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Ace of Clubs
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Rum, Creme de Cacao White, Lime Juice and Sugar Syrup in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Martini Glass, optionally a four 4 drop (not dashes) of Bitters and serve.

name: Adios M. F.
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Gin, Rum, Tequila, Blue Curacao and Sweet and Sour in the glass. Stir and then add 7-Up and gently stir again.

Optionally garnish with Lemon and Cherry and serve. Adios.

name: Adonis
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with ice.

Combine the Sherry, Sweet Vermouth and two dashes of Angostura Bitters in the Shaker.

Stir gently, strain into a chilled Martini glass and serve.

name: Affinity
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with ice.

Combine the Scotch and both Sweet and Dry Vermouths along with a dash of Orange Bitters in the Shaker.

Stir gently and strain into a chilled Martini glass, optionally garnish with a twist of Lemon and serve.

name: After Sex
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Vodka and Banana Liqueur in the Glass.

Fill up with Orange Juice, optionally add a slice of Orange and serve.

name: Aftershock
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Drambuie, Coconut Rum, Cherry Liqueur and Lemonade in the Glass.

Serve.

name: Agent Orange #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Triple Sec, Apple Liqueur, Bourbon, Rum, Yukon Jack, Orange Juice and Grenadine in the Shaker.

Shake, pour the contents (ice and all) into a Highball Glass and serve.

name: Agent Orange #2
instructions:
Fill a Collins Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Southern Comfort , Jack Daniels and fill with Orange Soda.

Stir and serve.

name: Aggravation
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Scotch, Coffee Liqueur and Milk in the Shaker.

Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into a Rocks Glass.

name: Agwa Bomb
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Agwa Coca Leaf Liquor and Red Bull in the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Alabama Slammer
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Southern Comfort, Amaretto, Sloe Gin, Vodka and Orange Juice.

Stir and serve with a wedge of Lemon or Orange (optional).

name: Alabama Slammer Shooter
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Southern Comfort, Amaretto, Sloe Gin and Lemon Juice in the Shaker.

Stir or Shake, strain into the Shot Glass and serve.

name: Alexander
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Creme de Cacao White, Brandy and Half and Half in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally sprinkle Nutmeg or Cinnamon on top and serve.

name: Algonquin
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Whiskey, Dry Vermouth and Pineapple Juice in the Shaker.

Stir, strain into a Martini Glass filled with cracked ice, optionally squeeze in a twist of Orange and serve. Note: If you shake it, the Pineapple Juice will foam to make sure you just stir it.

name: Alien Secretion Shooter #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Coconut Rum, Melon Liqueur and Pineapple Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the Shot Glass and serve.

name: Alien Secretion Shooter #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Melon Liqueur, Pineapple Juice and (optionally) a splash of Club Soda or 7-Up in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into Shot Glass and serve.

name: Alligator Sperm Shooter
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Melon Liqueur and Pineapple Juice to the Shaker. Shake, strain into the Shot Glass.

Slowly float the Cream on top and serve.

name: Almond Hot Chocolate #1
instructions:
Pour Coffee in a Coffee Mug.

Add the Amaretto and Creme de Cacao Dark. Stir to mix.

Add a dollop of Whipped Cream and serve.

name: Almond Hot Chocolate #2
instructions:
Pour Coffee in a Coffee Mug.

Add the Amaretto and Hot Chocolate. Stir to mix.

Add a dollop of Whipped Cream and serve.

name: Almond Joy
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Creme de Cacao White, Coconut Rum, Amaretto and Cream to the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Almond'tini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Apple Juice, Lemon Juice and Almond Syrup in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Aloha Martini
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Creme de Cassis and Pineapple Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a slice of Pineapple and serve.

name: Amaretto and Coffee
instructions:
Pour Coffee in a Coffee Mug.

Add Amaretto.

Optionally top with Whipped Cream and Cocoa Powder, and serve.

name: Amaretto Cherry Sour
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Amaretto, Sweet and Sour and Grenadine in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Rocks Glass, top with 7-Up or Sprite, optionally garnish with a Cherry and an Orange or Lemon Slice, stir and serve.

name: Amaretto Sour #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Amaretto and Sweet and Sour in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Rocks Glass, optionally garnish with a Cherry and an Orange or Lemon Slice and serve.

name: Amaretto Sour #2
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Combine the Amaretto and Sweet and Sour in the glass.

Optionally garnish with a Cherry and an Orange or Lemon Slice and serve.

name: Amaretto Sour Martini
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Amaretto, Lemon Juice and Sugar Syrup in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a Cherry and serve.

name: Amaretto Stone Sour
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Amaretto and Sweet and Sour in the Glass.

Fill Glass with Orange Juice and serve.

name: Amarula Coffee
instructions:
Pour Coffee in a Coffee Mug.

Add the Amarula Cream Liqueur.

Optionally top with Whipped Cream, garnish with a Cherry and serve.

name: Anejo Highball #1
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass full with ice.

Combine the (Gold) Rum, Orange Liqueur, Lime Juice and Bitters in the Glass. Stir and then top off the Glass with Ginger Beer.

Garnish with Lime or Orange and serve.

name: Anejo Highball #2
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass full with ice.

Combine the Rum, Dark Rum, Triple Sec, Lime Juice and Bitters (optional) in the Glass. Stir and then top off the Glass with Ginger Beer.

Optionally garnish with a slice of Lime and serve.

name: Angel Face
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain contents into a cocktail glass.

name: Angel's Kiss
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour in the Creme de Cacao. Pierce the Creme de Cacao with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Sloe Gin by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Creme de Cacao. Then do the same thing with the Brandy and finally the Cream.

You MUST add them in the order above to properly layer it. Serve.

name: Angel's Tit Shooter #1
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour the Creme de Cacao into the Glass. Pierce the liquid with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Cherry Liqueur by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Creme de Cacao, then do the same with the Half and Half.

Chill for 1/2 hour before serving. Garnish with a Cherry if possible.

name: Angel's Tit Shooter #2
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour the Kahlua in the Shot Glass. Pierce the Coffee Liqueur with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Irish Cream by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Coffee Liqueur.

It should look layered, sweet and creamy as the name suggests. Serve.

name: Angel's Tit Shooter #3
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour the Creme de Cacao into the Glass. Pierce the liquid with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Cherry Liqueur by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Creme de Cacao, then do the same with the Milk.

Chill for 1/2 hour before serving. Garnish with a Cherry if possible.

name: Anges Delight #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Cream, Triple Sec, Gin and Grenadine in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Anges Delight #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Milk, Triple Sec, Gin and Grenadine in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Antifreeze Shot
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker a quarter full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Blue Curacao and Rum in a Cocktail Shaker half filled with crushed ice.

Shake, strain into the Shot Glass and serve.

name: Apache Shot
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour in the Coffee Liqueur. Pierce the Coffee Liqueur with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Irish Cream by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Coffee Liqueur. Then do the same thing with the Melon Liqueur.

Serve.

name: Aperol Orange
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Aperol Liqueur Aperitif and Orange Juice to the glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Apple Brandy Sour
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Apple Brandy, Powdered Sugar and Lemon Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a half-slice of Lemon, top with a Cherry and serve.

name: Apple Car
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Apple Brandy, Triple Sec and Lime Juice to the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Apple Daiquiri
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Rum, Apple Juice, Lime Juice and Powdered Sugar in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Apple Julep
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Apple, Orange, Pineapple and Lemon Juices in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Collins Glass with cracked or subed ice, optionally add some Mint Sprigs and serve.

name: Apple Margarita
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. Rub the rim of a Margarita Glass with Lime Juice. Put the rim of the glass in Salt and turn glass in a circle until half of the glass or more is rimmed with Salt.

Combine the Tequila, Orange Liqueur, Apple Liqueur, Apple Juice and Sweet and Sour in the Shaker. Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into the Margarita Glass.

Optionally garnish with a slice of Lime and serve.

name: Apple Martini #1
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Apple Liqueur and Sweet and Sour in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve with a Cherry (optional).

name: Apple Martini #2
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Apple Liqueur, Schoenauer Apfel Apple Schnapps and Sweet and Sour in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve with a Cherry (optional).

name: Apple Martini #3
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Apple Liqueur and Apple Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve with a Cherry (optional).

name: Apple Martini #4
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka and Apple Liqueur in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve with a Cherry (optional).

name: Apple Martini #5
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Tori Kai Soju, Apple Liqueur and Sweet and Sour in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve with a Cherry (optional).

name: Apple Mojito
instructions:
Place Sugar, a large pinch (small handful) of Mint Sprigs and splash of Club Soda in a Highball Glass.

Use a muddler to lightly press the Mint and dissolve Sugar until it smells of spearmint gum. Add Lime Juice into the glass (or squeeze both halves of a Lime and leave one hull in the mixture). Add Apple Rum, stir, and fill with ice.

Top with Club Soda, garnish with Mint Sprig and serve.

name: Apple Pie Shooter #1
instructions:
Get two standard size Shot Glasses. Put the Vodka in one and the Apple Juice in the other.

Tip your head back and pour the Apple Juice in the back of throat, then the Vodka, and top with the Whipped Cream.

Great party shot.

name: Apple Pie Shooter #2
instructions:
Get a large size Shot Glass.

Pour Vodka and Apple Juice into the glass. Sprinkle cinnamon on the tongue and pour contents of shot glass into your mouth.

Shake head until the Cinnamon is dissolved and drink.

name: Apple Pie Shot #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker a quarter full with crushed ice.

Combine the Apple Liqueur and Cinnamon Schnapps in the Cocktail Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Shot Glass and serve.

name: Apple Pie Shot #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker a quarter full with crushed ice.

Combine the Apple Liqueur, Spiced Rum and Cinnamon Schnapps in the Cocktail Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Glass and serve.

name: Apple Pineapple Grand Cosmopolitan
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Apple and Pineapple Vodka, Grand Marnier and Cranberry Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a twist of Lemon and serve.

name: Applejack
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Apple Brandy, Orange Liqueur and Bitters in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a slice of Apple and serve.

name: Arctic Kiss
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Vodka to the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the Champagne Glass, top with Champagne and optionally serve with a twist of Lemon.

name: Arizona Cardinals - Black and Red
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Whiskey (Bushmills Black Bush if you have it), Sweet Vermouth and couple dashes of Bitters in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with some Maraschino Cherries and serve.

name: Arizona Cardinals - Cardinal Cooler
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Raspberry Vodka, Cranberry Juice and Ginger Ale to the Glass.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Lime and serve.

name: Arizona Cardinals - Kir
instructions:
Get a standard size Wine Glass and two thirds full with Red Wine.

Add the Creme de Cassis to the Glass.

Stir and Serve.

name: Arnie Palmer
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass full with ice.

Add the Vodka and fill glass with Lemonade. Top with a splash of Iced Tea.

Stir, optionally garnish with a wedge of Lemon and serve.

name: Arnold Palmer
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass full with ice.

Combine the Iced Tea, Lemonade and Sugar (to taste) in the Glass.

Stir, optionally garnish with a wedge of Lemon and serve.

name: Astropop
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Raspberry Vodka and Sweet and Sour mix to the Shaker. Shake and pour in a large size shot glass. Tilt the glass and pour the Grenadine slowly down the inside of the glass and allow it to sink to the bottom. Then pour the Blue Curacao along the inside of the glass so that it sinks to the middle (it will sit on top of the Grenadine if poured slowly down the inside of the glass).

The finished shooter should be Red, Blue, and then White from bottom to top. Serve.

name: Atlanta Falcons - Red Bird
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Vodka, Sloe Gin, Cranberry Juice and Orange Juice to the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Atlanta Falcons - Scarlet O'Hara
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Southern Comfort and a dash of Lime Juice to the glass.

Top with Cranberry Juice, optionally garnish with a wedge of Lime and serve.

name: Avery Island
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Tequila, Orange Liqueur, Cranberry and Lime Juices, and Tabasco Sauce in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a twist of Lime and serve.

name: Azure Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Triple Sec and Blue Curacao the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve with a Cherry (optional).

name: B and B Stinger
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Benedictine and Creme de Menthe White in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into a Martini Glass and serve.

name: B-51
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour in the Coffee Liqueur. Pierce the Coffee Liqueur with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Irish Cream by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Coffee Liqueur. Then do the same thing with the Bacardi 151 Rum.

Serve. Bacardi 151 rum is 151 proof alcohol so it kicks up the strength of this cocktail a notch or two.

name: B-52 on the Rocks
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Coffee Liqueur, Orange Liqueur and Irish Cream to the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: B-52 Shot #1
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour the Coffee Liqueur and Brandy in a Shot Glass. Pierce the mixture with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Irish Cream by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the mixture.

Serve.

name: B-52 Shot #2
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour the Coffee Liqueur and Grand Marnier in a Shot Glass. Pierce the mixture with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Irish Cream by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the mixture.

Serve.

name: B-53 Shot #1
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour in the Kahlua. Pierce the Coffee Liqueur with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Sambuca by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Coffee Liqueur. Then do the same thing with the Grand Marnier.

Serve.

name: B-53 Shot #2
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour in the Kahlua. Pierce the Coffee Liqueur with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Irish Cream by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Coffee Liqueur. Then do the same thing with the Hazelnut Liqueur.

Serve.

name: B-53 Shot #3
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour in the Kahlua. Pierce the Coffee Liqueur with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Irish Cream by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Coffee Liqueur. Then do the same thing with the Vodka.

Serve.

name: Baby Guinness #1
instructions:
Get a standard size Shot Glass.

Pour in the Sambuca. Pierce the Sambuca with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Irish Cream by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Sambuca.

Serve.

name: Baby Guinness #2
instructions:
Get a standard size Shot Glass.

Pour in the Coffee Liqueur. Pierce the Coffee Liqueur with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Irish Cream by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Coffee Liqueur.

Serve.

name: Bacardi Breeze
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add Lemon Rum, Mountain Dew and top with a splash of Orange Juice.

Optionally garnish with a slice of Orange and a Cherry and serve.

name: Bacardi Cocktail #1
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Bacardi Light Rum, Lemon Juice and Grenadine in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Bacardi Cocktail #2
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Bacardi Light Rum, Lime Juice and Grenadine in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Bacardi Cocktail #3
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Bacardi Light Rum, Sweet and Sour and Grenadine in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Bacardi O and 7-Up
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Bacardi O Rum in the glass and fill with 7-Up.

Stir and serve.

name: Bacardi O and Coke
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Bacardi O Rum and Cola in the Glass.

Serve (Easy!).

name: Backseat Boogie
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Gin, Ginger Ale and Cranberry Juice in the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Bahama Mama #1
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Combine the Dark Rum, Coconut Rum, Bacardi 151, Coffee Liqueur, Pineapple Juice and Lemon Juice in the Glass.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Pineapple and a Cherry, and serve.

name: Bahama Mama #2
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Combine the Dark Rum, Coconut Rum, Pineapple Rum, Coffee Liqueur, Pineapple Juice and Lemon Juice in the Glass.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Pineapple and a Cherry, and serve.

name: Bahama Surprise
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Coconut Rum, Pineapple Juice and Orange Juice to the Glass.

Stir, optionally garnish with an Cherry and serve.

name: Baileys and Coffee
instructions:
Pour Coffee in a Coffee Mug.

Add Baileys Irish Cream.

Serve. Easy.

name: Baileys Caramel Appletini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Baileys Caramel Irish Cream and Apple Vodka in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, garnish with a slice of Apple if desired and serve.

name: Baileys Caramel Shaken Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Baileys Caramel Irish Cream to the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Baileys Cherry Cafe
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass in water and then dip the glass into a mixture of Cinnamon and Sugar. Drizzle Cherry Juice in the glass to layer.

Combine the Baileys Coffee Irish Cream and Captain Morgan Spiced Rum in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Baileys Coffee Shaken Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Baileys Coffee Irish Cream to the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Baileys Comet
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Baileys Irish Cream, Butterscotch Liqueur and Goldschlager in the Shaker. Float the Bacardi 151 on top and light with a Match or Lighter.

Immediately sprinkle a generous dash of cinnamon on top. The Cinnamon will sparkle and flame. Serve, extinguish the flame and drink. Don't let it burn too long or the Bailey's will curdle! ALWAYS USE CAUTION WHEN FIRE IS INVOLVED!

name: Baileys Mint Chocolate Shaken Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Baileys Mint Chocolate Irish Cream to the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Baileys Mint Chocolatini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Baileys Mint Chocolate Irish Cream and Vanilla Vodka in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, garnish with Mint Sprigs if you have it, and serve.

name: Baileys Shaken Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Baileys Irish Cream to the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Baileys Spiced Coffee
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the drink.

Pour in the Pear Liqueur. Pierce the Pear Liqueur with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Baileys Coffee Irish Cream by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Pear Liqueur.

Garnish with a sprinkle of Nutmeg and a dash of Pepper if desired and serve.

name: Baked Apple Martini #1
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass with water and then dip the glass into a mixture of Cinnamon and Sugar.

Combine the Vodka, Apple Liqueur, Cinnamon Schnapps, Butterscotch Liqueur and a splash each of Sweet and Sour and Cranberry Juice inthe Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Baked Apple Martini #2
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass with water and then dip the glass into a mixture of Cinnamon and Sugar.

Combine the Apple Vodka, Apple Liqueur, Cinnamon Schnapps, Butterscotch Liqueur and a splash each of Sweet and Sour and Cranberry Juice inthe Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

ingredients.genericName: Vincent Van Gogh Wild Appel Vodka
ingredients.brandName: Vincent Van Gogh Wild Appel Vodka

name: Bald Pu$$y
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Melon Liqueur, Lime Vodka, Vodka, Triple Sec, Blueberry Liqueur, Lime Juice and a splash of 7-Up in the Glass.

Shake or stir and serve.

name: Baltimore Ravens - Baltimore Bang
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Bourbon, Apricot Liqueur, Lemon Juice and Sugar in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Whiskey Sour Glass, optionally garnish with a slice of Orange or a Cherry and serve.

name: Baltimore Ravens - Black-Eyed Susan
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Vodka, Bourbon, Sweet and Sour and Orange Juice to the Glass.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Orange or Lime and serve.

name: Baltimore Ravens - The Raven
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Rum, Vodka and Blue Curacao in the Shaker. Shake and check the color. Add more Curacao for the correct color (should be Royal Purple).

Slowly pour the Raspberry Liqueur (Chambord if you have it) over the back of a bar spoon so it floats on top, optionally add a slice of Lime and serve.

name: Baltimore Zoo #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Rum, Gin and Grenadine in the Shaker. Shake, strain into a Rocks Glass and add a splash of 7-Up and Lemon Juice.

Give the shot of Beer to the drinker as a chaser and serve.

name: Baltimore Zoo #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Vodka, Rum, Tequila, Triple Sec, Root Beer, Lime Juice, Grenadine, Bacardi 151 and Sweet and Sour to the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Banana Banshee
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Banana Liqueur, Vodka, Creme de Cacao and Coffee Liqueur in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Banana Boat
instructions:
Add one cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Rum, Banana Liqueur, Cream of Coconut, Creme de Cacao White and a Vanilla Ice Cream to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Highball Glass, optionally garnish with a slice of Banana and serve.

name: Banana Colada #1
instructions:
Add one cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Dark Rum, Pineapple Juice, Cream of Coconut and a Banana to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Highball Glass, optionally garnish with a slice of Pineapple and a Cherry, and serve.

name: Banana Colada #2
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Dark Rum, Irish Cream, Banana Liqueur, Pina Colada Mix and a Banana to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Highball Glass and serve.

name: Banana Daiquiri #1
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Rum, Triple Sec, Lime Juice, Powdered Sugar and a Banana to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Hurricane Glass, optionally top with a Cherry and serve.

name: Banana Daiquiri #2
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Banana Rum, Triple Sec, Lime Juice, Powdered Sugar and a Banana to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Hurricane Glass, optionally top with a Cherry and serve.

name: Banana Split
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Combine the Coconut Rum, Banana Liqueur and Triple Sec in the Glass.

Add Sweet and Sour or 7-Up as desired and serve.

name: Banana Split Smoothie
instructions:
Add one cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Pineapple and Strawberries to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, then add The Banana, Milk and Honey. Blend again at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Highball Glass, optionally garnish with a slice of Pineapple and a Cherry, and serve.

name: Bananarita
instructions:
Optionally, rub the rim of a Highball Glass with Lime Juice. Put the rim of the glass in Salt and turn glass in a circle until half of the glass or more is rimmed with Salt. Then fill the glass half full with cubed ice.

Combine the Tequila, Banana Liqueur and Margarita Mix in the Glass.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Lime and serve.

name: Banshee
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Creme de Cacao White, Banana Liqueur, and Milk in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a Cherry and serve.

name: Barcelona
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of a Rocks Glass with Lemon Juice or water. Put the rim of the glass in the Salt and turn glass in a circle until entire glass is rimmed with Salt.

Combine the Tequila, Orange Liqueur, Orange and Lime Juices, and Sweet and Sour in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into a Rocks Glass, optionally garnish with a wedge of Lime and serve.

name: Barracuda
instructions: Shake pour ingredients with ice. Strain into glass, top with Sparkling wine.

name: Basil Grande
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Add 3 Strawberries to a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. Use a muddler or spoon and crush the strawberries.

Add the Vodka, Orange Liqueur, Raspberry Liqueur, Cranberry Juice and 5 leaves of Basil to the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Basil-Mint Mojito
instructions:
Place Sugar Syrup, a large pinch (small handful) of Mint, Basil and splash of Club Soda in a Highball Glass.

Use a muddler to lightly press the Mint Sprigs and dissolve Sugar until it smells of spearmint gum. Add Lime Juice into the glass (or squeeze both halves of a Lime and leave one hull in the mixture). Add Rum, stir, and fill with ice.

Top with Club Soda, optionally garnish with a wedge of Lime and serve.

name: Bastardized Screwdriver
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Gold Rum and then Orange Juice.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Orange and serve.

name: Batida #1
instructions:
Add Cachaca Rum, Lemon Juice, Milk and some Strawberries to a blender.

Blend until smooth.

Pour contents into a Rocks Glass over ice and serve. Note: A Batida can be made with almost any fruit such as Blueberries, Blackberries, Bananas or Mangos.

name: Batida #2
instructions:
Add Vodka, Lemon Juice, Milk and some Strawberries to a blender.

Blend until smooth.

Pour contents into a Rocks Glass over ice and serve. Note: A Batida can be made with almost any fruit such as Blueberries, Blackberries, Bananas or Mangos.

name: Batida Rosa
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with ice.

Combine the Cachaca, Pineapple and Lemon Juices, Grenadine and Sugar Syrup in the Shaker.

Shake or stir, strain into a Wine Glass, top with Club Soda, optionally garnish with a slice of Pineapple and serve.

name: Bay of Passion
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Vodka, Cranberry, Pineapple and Passion Fruit Juices in the Glass.

Stir, optionally add a Cherry and serve.

name: Beach Bum
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Coconut Rum, Melon Liqueur, Pineapple Juice and Cranberry Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Beachcomber #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of the Martini Glass in water or Lime Juice and then dip the glass into Sugar to coat the rim thoroughly.

Combine the Rum, Triple Sec, Lime Juice and Maraschino Liqueur in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the glass, optionally garnish with a Cherry and serve.

name: Beachcomber #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of the Martini Glass in water or Lime Juice and then dip the glass into Sugar to coat the rim thoroughly.

Combine the Rum, Triple Sec, Grenadine and Sweet and Sour in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the glass, optionally garnish with a slice of lime and serve.

name: Beam and 7
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Jim Beam and 7-Up or Sprite in the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Beam and Coke
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Jim Beam and Cola in the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Bee's Kiss
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

In a small container, combine the Honey and a little hot water and stir vigorously until Honey is dissolved. Combine the Rum, dissolved Honey and Cream in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a sprinkle of Cinnamon and serve.

name: Belize Breeze
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Watermelon Rum, Gin, Apple Liqueur, Pomegranate and Orange Juices.

Stir and serve with a wedge of Lemon or Orange (optional).

name: Bellini #1
instructions:
Pour Peach Liqueur in a Champagne Flute.

Add the Champagne and stir gently.

Serve.

name: Bellini #2
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Peach Liqueur, Peach Juice and Lemon Juice to the glass. Stir to mix.

Add the Champagne and serve.

name: Bellini #3
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the White Wine, a peeled Peach and Champagne to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Champagne Flute and serve.

name: Bellini #4
instructions:
Add one cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Peach Juice to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Add the Lemon Juice and Champagne and mix again, Pour contents into a Glass, optionally top with a splash of Grenadine or Red Wine and serve.

name: Bellini #5
instructions:
Add one cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Peach Juice to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Add the Lemon Juice and White Wine and mix again, Pour contents into a Glass, optionally top with a splash of Grenadine or Red Wine and serve.

name: Bellini Martini
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Peach Liqueur and Peach Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Glass, optionally garnish with a Lemon twist and serve.

name: Belmont Breeze
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Bourbon, Sherry, Lemon Juice, Sugar Syrup and a splash each of Orange and Cranberry Juices in the Shaker.

Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into a Highball Glass, optionally garnish with a Strawberry and serve.

name: Bermuda Highball
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass full with ice.

Combine the Brandy, Gin and Dry Vermouth in the Glass. Stir and then top off the Glass with Club Soda.

Garnish with Lemon and serve.

name: Bermuda Triangle
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Peach Liqueur, Spiced Rum and Orange Juice to the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Berry Breeze
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Raspberry Liqueur, Coffee Liqueur, Irish Cream and Cream in the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Berry Christmas
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Muddle Raspberries, Blueberries, Blackberries, Agave Nectar, Mint Sprigs and Lime Juice in the Shaker. Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into a Highball Glass.

Top with Ginger Ale, optionally garnish with extra berries and serve.

name: Between the Sheets Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Brandy, Rum, Triple Sec and Lemon Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a twist of Lemon and serve.

name: Beverly Hills Iced Tea
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Vodka, Gin, Triple Sec, Lime Juice and Sugar Syrup in the Glass.

Stir, top with Champagne, optionally garnish with a wedge of Lemon or Lime and serve.

name: Bijou Cocktail
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Chartreuse Green, Sweet Vermouth and Bitters in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a Cherry and serve.

name: Bikini Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Peach Liqueur and Blue Curacao in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a Cherry and serve.

name: Bitter Lime Cocktail
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Pour the Gin in the Glass, add Lime Juice and fill with Gatorade.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Lime and serve.

name: Bitter Margarita
instructions: Combine the tequila, lime juice, Cointreau, and Campari in a cocktail shaker filled with ice. Shake until your arms hurt, 10 to 20 seconds, then strain into an ice-filled rocks glass. Garnish with the lime wedge.

name: Black and Blue Mojito
instructions:
Place Mint Sprigs, Lime wedges, Blackberries and Blueberries and Sugar Syrup in a Highball Glass.

Use a muddler to lightly press the contents together to get as much juice as possible from them. Add Lemon Rum, stir, and fill with ice.

Top with Ginger Ale, optionally garnish with Mint Sprig or the berries and serve.

name: Black and Tan
instructions:
Take a Pint Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer it (preferably a Guinness black and tan spoon).

Pour the Bass Beer into the Glass and place the spoon upside down with the head of the spoon sitting over the Glass. Pour in the Guinness until it sits just above the top of the Glass.

Allow the head to form and serve.

name: Black Cherry
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Bourbon (Jim Beam Black Label if you have it) and Cherry Rum in the Glass.

Top with 7-Up or Sprite and serve.

ingredients.genericName: Jim Beam Black 8 Year Old Bourbon
ingredients.brandName: Jim Beam Black 8 Year Old Bourbon

name: Black Cosmo
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Blavod Black Vodka, Cranberry Juice, Orange Liqueur and Lime Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Black Cossack
instructions:
Put a Beer into a large Pilsner Glass or Beer Mug.

Drop a shot of Vodka.

Serve.

name: Black Cow #1
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Coffee Liqueur, Half and Half and Cola to the Glass.

Stir and serve. Tastes like the treat known as a Black Cow, which is vanilla ice cream and root beer.

name: Black Cow #2
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Coffee Liqueur, Milk and Cola to the Glass.

Stir and serve. Tastes like the treat known as a Black Cow, which is vanilla ice cream and root beer.

name: Black Forest
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour the Coffee Liqueur in a Shot Glass. Pierce the mixture with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Irish Cream by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Coffee Liqueur. Do the same with the Cherry Whiskey.

Serve.

name: Black Ice
instructions:
Take a Pint Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer it.

Pour the Smirnoff Ice into the Glass and place the spoon upside down with the head of the spoon sitting over the Glass. Pour in the Guinness until it sits just above the top of the Glass.

Allow the head to form and serve.

name: Black Jamaican
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Dark Rum and Tia Maria.

Stir and serve.

name: Black Magic
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Vodka, Coffee Liqueur and a splash of Lemon Juice to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Rocks Glass and serve.

name: Black Martini
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Blavod Black Vodka and Raspberry Liqueur in the Shaker.

Stir or shake , strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Black Rose
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Tequila Rose in the Shaker. Shake, strain into a Shot Glass.

Layer the Blavod Black Vodka on top and serve.

name: Black Russian #1
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Vodka and Coffee Liqueur.

Stir and serve.

name: Black Russian #2
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Vodka and Coffee Liqueur in the Glass.

Fill Glass with Cola and serve.

name: Black Russian #3
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Pour Vanilla Vodka and Coffee Liqueur In the Glass.

Fill Glass with Cola and serve.

name: Black Russian #4
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Vanilla Vodka and Coffee Liqueur in the Glass.

Add some Orange Juice (preferably fresh) and serve.

name: Black Tooth Grin Shooter
instructions:
Get a large size Shot Glass.

Pour Crown Royal into the glass. Add just enough Cola to turn it black.

Serve.

name: Black Velvet
instructions:
Pour the Guinness into a Champagne Flute.

Add the Champagne carefully so it does not mix with Beer.

Garnish with a Lemon Twist and serve.

name: Black Widow
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Pour in the Cranberry Juice. Gently layer the Blavod Black Vodka on top.

Serve.

name: Black-Eyed Susan
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Vodka, Bourbon, Sweet and Sour and Orange Juice to the Glass.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Orange or Lime and serve.

name: Blood and Sand
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Scotch, Cherry Liqueur, Sweet Vermouth and Orange Juice in the Shaker.

Shake or stir, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Blood Orange Cosmopolitan
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Orange Vodka, Triple Sec, Orange Juice and a splash of Cranberry Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Bloodhound
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Add 3 Strawberries to a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. Use a muddler or spoon and crush the strawberries.

Add the Gin and Dry and Sweet Vermouths to the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve with a twist of Orange (optional).

name: Bloody Bull
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Tomato Juice, Beef Broth, Lemon Juice and Tabasco Sauce in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Glass over ice, add Salt and Pepper to taste, optionally add a wedge of Lemon and serve.

name: Bloody Caesar
instructions:
Rub the edge of a Highball Glass with Lime Juice or water. Put the rim of the glass a mixture of Salt and/or Celery Salt then turn glass in a circle until entire glass is rimmed with salt.

Combine the Vodka and Clamato Juice in the Glass and stir. Season with Worcestershire Sauce, Tabasco Sauce and Pepper to taste.

Stir well, optionally garnish with a Celery Stick and serve.

name: Bloody Jim
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Pour Jim Beam Bourbon and add Cola until the glass is nearly full, then add the Grenadine.

Mix together with a straw and serve.

name: Bloody Maria
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Tequila, Tomato Juice, Lemon Juice and Tabasco Sauce in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Glass with cracked ice, optionally add Celery Salt, a slice of Lemon and serve.

name: Bloody Mary #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Tomato Juice, Worcestershire Sauce and Tabasco Sauce in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Glass over ice, add Salt and Pepper to taste, optionally add a wedge of Lime and serve.

name: Bloody Mary #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Tomato Juice, Worcestershire Sauce and Tabasco Sauce in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Glass over ice, add Salt and Pepper to taste, optionally add a wedge of Lime and serve.

name: Bloody Mary #3
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Vodka and Bloody Mary Mix. Add Salt and Pepper to taste.

Stir, optionally garnish with a stalk of Celery and serve.

name: Bloody Mary #4
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Tomato Vodka and Bloody Mary Mix. Add Salt and Pepper to taste.

Stir, optionally garnish with a stalk of Celery and serve.

name: Bloody Mary #5
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Chili Vodka and Tomato Juice. Add Salt and Pepper to taste.

Stir, optionally garnish with a stalk of Celery and serve.

name: Bloody Mary Extra Hairy
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Tomato Juice, Worcestershire Sauce , Tabasco Sauce and Mustard in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Glass over ice, add Salt and Pepper to taste, optionally add a wedge of Lime and serve.

name: Bloody Tampon Shooter
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Vodka and Tomato Juice to the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Shot Glass and serve.

name: Bloody Virgin Bull
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the , Tomato Juice, Beef Broth, Lemon Juice and Tabasco Sauce in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Glass over ice, add Worcestershire Sauce, Salt and Pepper to taste, optionally add a wedge of Lemon and serve.

name: Blow Job Shot #1
instructions:
Get a standard size Shot Glass.

Add the Coffee Liqueur and then top with Whipped Cream. This shot must be taken without using your hands. Pick up the shot glass between your lips and tilt back.

Serve and have fun! Take a pic or a video on your iPhone and post it on our InMyBar Facebook page.

name: Blow Job Shot #2
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour the Coffee Liqueur in the Shot Glass. Pierce the Coffee Liqueur with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Irish Cream by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Coffee Liqueur. Spray a squirt of Whipped Cream on top about 1 inch high. This shot must be taken without using your hands. Pick up the shot glass between your lips and tilt back.

Serve and have fun! Take a pic or a video on your iPhone and post it on our InMyBar Facebook page.

name: Blow Job Shot #3
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour the Banana Liqueur in the Shot Glass. Pierce the Banana Liqueur with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Coffee Liqueur by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Amaretto. Then do the same with the Irish Cream. Spray a squirt of Whipped Cream on top about 1 inch high. This shot must be taken without using your hands. Pick up the shot glass between your lips and tilt back.

Serve and have fun! Take a pic or a video on your iPhone and post it on our InMyBar Facebook page.

name: Blow Job Shot #4
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour the Butterscotch Liqueur in the Shot Glass. Pierce the Butterscotch Liqueur with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Irish Cream by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Butterscotch Liqueur. Spray a squirt of Whipped Cream on top about 1 inch high. This shot must be taken without using your hands. Pick up the shot glass between your lips and tilt back.

Serve and have fun! Take a pic or a video on your iPhone and post it on our InMyBar Facebook page.

name: Blow Job Shot #5
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour the Amaretto in the Shot Glass. Pierce the Amaretto with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Irish Cream by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Amaretto. Spray a squirt of Whipped Cream on top about 1 inch high. This shot must be taken without using your hands. Pick up the shot glass between your lips and tilt back.

Serve and have fun! Take a pic or a video on your iPhone and post it on our InMyBar Facebook page.

name: Blue 10:16 Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Blue Curacao, Lemonade and Sweet and Sour in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a Cherry and serve.

name: Blue Bird
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Blue Curacao, Galliano and Peach Liqueur in the Shaker. Shake and strain into a Highball Glass over crushed ice.

Fill with Club Soda and stir. Optionally garnish with slices of Orange and Lemon, add a Cherry and serve with a straw.

name: Blue Breeze #1
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Hpnotiq, Coconut Rum and Pineapple Juice to the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Blue Breeze #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Whipped Cream Vodka and Blue Curacao in the Shaker.

Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into a Highball Glass, top with 7-Up or Sprite and serve.

name: Blue Cosmopolitan
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Blue Curacao, Grapefruit Juice and Sugar Syrup in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a twist of Orange and serve.

name: Blue Daiquiri #1
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Rum, Blue Curacao and Lime Juice to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Rocks Glass and serve.

name: Blue Daiquiri #2
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Rum, Blueberry Liqueur, Lime Juice and Sugar Syrup to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Rocks Glass and serve.

name: Blue Daiquiri #3
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Rum, Blueberry Liqueur, and Lime Juice in the Shaker. Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into the Margarita Glass.

Optionally garnish with a couple of Blueberries or a wedge of Lime and serve.

name: Blue Eyes
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Blue Curacao and Anisette in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a twist of Lemon and serve.

name: Blue Hawaiian
instructions:
Add one cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Rum, Blue Curacao, Pineapple Juice and Cream of Coconut to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Highball Glass, optionally top with the slice of Pineapple and a Cherry and serve.

name: Blue Horizon #1
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Citrus Vodka, Blue Curacao, Lychee Liqueur and Lime Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Blue Horizon #2
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Lychee Vodka, Blue Curacao and Lime Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Blue Jeep Island
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Sweet and Sour Liqueur, Triple Sec and 7-Up or Sprite to the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Blue Kamikaze
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Blue Curacao and Lime Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, pour in a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Blue Lagoon
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of the Highball Glass in water and then dip the glass into Sugar.

Combine the Vodka and Coconut Rum in the Shaker. Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into the Glass.

Add the Lemonade and then pour Blue Curacao down the inside of the glass. The pour is just for the effect. Serve.

name: Blue Lagoon Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Rum, Coconut Rum and Blue Curacao in the Shaker. Then add a splash each of Pineapple Juice and Sweet and Sour.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Blue Lamborghini Shot
instructions:
Get a standard size Shot Glass.

Combine the Rum and Blue Curacao in the Glass.

Serve. This shot is great for 21st birthdays and/or any other special occasions.

name: Blue Lesbian #1
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Berry Liqueur, Hpnotiq Liqueur and Blue Curacao in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a Cherry and serve.

name: Blue Lesbian #2
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Berry Vodka, Hpnotiq Liqueur and Blue Curacao in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a Cherry and serve.

name: Blue Lesbian #3
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Berry Schnapps, Hpnotiq Liqueur and Blue Curacao in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a Cherry and serve.

name: Blue Margarita
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. Rub the rim of a Margarita Glass with Lime Juice. Put the rim of the glass in Salt and turn glass in a circle until half of the glass or more is rimmed with Salt.

Combine the Tequila, Blue Curacao and Lime Juice in the Shaker. Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into the Margarita Glass.

Optionally garnish with a wedge of Lime and serve.

name: Blue Moon
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Gin, Blue Curacao, Sweet and Sour, Pineapple Juice and Lemon in the Cocktail Shaker half filled with crushed ice.

Shake, strain into the Glass, garnish with a Lemon Wedge and serve.

name: Blue Moon Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Blue Curacao and Lemon in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve with a twist of Lemon (optional).

name: Blue Mother F'er #1
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Vodka, Gin, Coconut Rum and Blue Curacao to the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Blue Mother F'er #2
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Citrus Vodka, Blue Curacao and Sweet and Sour in Cocktail Shaker half filled with crushed ice.

Shake, strain into the glass and serve.

name: Blue Motorcycle
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Gin, Vodka, Rum, Tequila, Blue Curacao, Sweet and Sour and a splash of 7-Up in the Glass.

Serve. Note: A Blue Motorcycle is basically the same thing as a Long Island Ice Tea, just with Blue Curacao and 7-Up instead of Coke. It's mixed the same way.

name: Blue Party Lemonade
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Vodka, Lemonade and Energy Drink in the glass.

Stir until you see a blue/green color and serve.

name: Blue Saucer
instructions:
Get a standard size Shot Glass.

Add the Triple Sec to the Glass followed by the Vodka. Using a straw, drip 3-5 drops of Blue Curacao in between the two layers.

 The result is a floating Blue Saucer in the middle of your shot glass. Serve.

name: Blueberry Lemonade
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Blueberry Vodka and Sweet and Sour in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Blueberry Tea
instructions:
Add the Grand Marnier and Amaretto to a Brandy Snifter.

Fill with Hot Tea to taste.

Stir and serve. Note: Swaddle the brandy snifter in serviettes or a cloth to protect the hands.

name: Blushing Lady
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass with water or a wedge of Lemon and then dip the glass into Sugar.

Combine the Vodka, Pomegranate Liqueur, Grapefruit Juice and Lemon in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: BMW Shot
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Banana Liqueur, Melon Liqueur and Watermelon Vodka in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Shot Glass and serve.

name: Bocce Ball
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Vodka and Amaretto and then fill with Orange Juice.

Stir, top with a splash of Club Soda, optionally add a slice of Orange or a Cherry and serve.

name: Boilermaker
instructions:
Get a Beer Pilsner and a Shot Glass.

Pour a shot of Whiskey in a shot glass and drop it in the Beer.

Serve.

name: Bon Fire
instructions:
Get a Whisky Sour or small Rocks Glass.

Add the Chocolate Syrup and then the Tuaca (do not chill).

Toast a Marshmallow, eat it and then chase it with Tuaca and Chocolate.

name: Bone Dry Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin and a couple drops of Dry Vermouth in the Shaker.

Shake or stir, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, add some Bitters, Green Olives or a twist of Lemon if desired and serve.

name: Boston Sour
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Whiskey, Lemon Juice, Powdered Sugar and Egg White in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Whiskey Sour Glass, optionally garnish with a half-slice of Lemon, top with a Cherry and serve.

name: Bourbon and Branch
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Bourbon with 4 oz of Water in the Glass.

Serve.

name: Bourbon and Water
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Bourbon and 3 oz of Water to the Glass.

Stir well and serve.

name: Bourbon Cobbler
instructions:
Muddle Pineapple, Orange and Lemon wedges with the Orange Liqueur and a little water in the bottom of a Cocktail Shaker.

Add Bourbon and ice and shake well.

Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into a Rocks Glass and serve with any other fruit you have.

name: Bourbon Flip #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Bourbon, Egg White, Sugar and Cream in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Whiskey Sour Glass, optionally garnish with a dash of Nutmeg and serve.

name: Bourbon Flip #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Bourbon, Egg White, Sugar and Milk in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Whiskey Sour Glass, optionally garnish with a dash of Nutmeg and serve.

name: Bourbon Highball
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Bourbon to the Glass and fill with Club Soda.

Optionally add the twist of Lemon peel, stir, and serve.

name: Bourbon Lancer
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Bourbon, Sugar and Bitters in the Glass.

Stir, fill glass with Champagne and serve.

name: Bourbon on the Rocks
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Bourbon.

Serve.

name: Boxcar
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Rum, Triple Sec and Sweet and Sour.

Stir and serve.

name: Boxcar #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of a Martini Glass with Lemon Juice or water. Put the rim of the glass in the sugar and turn glass in a circle until entire glass is rimmed with sugar.

Combine the Gin, Cointreau, Lime Juice and Egg White in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Brain Duster
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Whiskey, Absinthe, Sweet Vermouth and Bitters in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Martini Glass and serve.

name: Brain Hemorrhage Shot #1
instructions:
Fill a Shot Glass 3/4 full of Peach Liqueur.

Add one or two drops of Grenadine then slowly pour in the Irish Cream.

The shot should look like a brain floating in formaldehyde with a drop of blood at the bottom. It should look pretty gross but the taste is great.

name: Brain Hemorrhage Shot #2
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour the Melon Liqueur in a Shot Glass. Pierce the mixture with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Sambuca by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the mixture. Do the same with the Irish Cream.

Add a few drops of Grenadine to give the effect of a bleeding brain and serve.

name: Brain Tumor Shooter #1
instructions:
Pour the Peach Liqueur into the shot glass till it's about 3/4 full.

Slowly and gently pour the Irish Cream in on the side of the glass till it's almost full. Add a touch of Grenadine down the middle and then a touch of Cherry Liqueur down the middle.

Serve.

name: Brain Tumor Shooter #2
instructions:
Add Watermelon Liqueur to a shot glass.

Dribble Irish Cream to give the look of a brain and add a few drops of Grenadine to make it look like a tumor.

Serve.

name: Bramble
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Gin, Raspberry Liqueur, Lemon Juice and Sugar Syrup.

Stir well, optionally garnish with some Raspberries and serve.

name: Brandy Alexander #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Creme de Cacao White, Brandy and Cream in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally sprinkle Nutmeg on top and serve.

name: Brandy and Soda
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Brandy and Club Soda in the Glass.

Stir well and serve.

name: Brandy Cooler
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Cognac and 1 oz of Water to the Glass.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Orange and serve.

name: Brandy Crusta
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Cognac, Lemon Juice, Maraschino Liqueur, Triple Sec and Bitters Liqueur in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a twist of Lemon and serve.

name: Brandy Eggnog
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Brandy, Milk, Sugar Syrup (Gomme) and an Egg Yolk in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally sprinkle Nutmeg on top and serve.

name: Brandy Frost Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Brandy, Creme de Cacao White, Milk and Peppermint Schnapps in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Brandy Manhattan
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Brandy and Dry Vermouth in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally add a Cherry and serve.

name: Brandy Sour
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Brandy, Orange Liqueur, Sugar and Lemon Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Martini Glass and serve.

name: Brass Buck
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Jim Beam Red Stag Infused Bourbon and top with Ginger Ale.

Stir, optionally garnish with a wedge of Lime and serve.

name: Brass Monkey
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Dark Rum, Vodka and Orange Juice.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Orange and a Cherry and serve.

name: Brave Bull
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Tequila and Coffee Liqueur.

Swirl the glass gently a few times to lightly mix the ingredients and serve.

name: Brittany Cocktail
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Lemon Juice, Amer, Orange Juice and Sugar in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a twist of Orange and serve.

name: Bronx Cocktail
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Dry Vermouth, Sweet Vermouth and Orange Juice in the Shaker.

Shake or stir, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Brown Cow
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Coffee Liqueur and Milk.

Stir and serve.

name: Buck Shot
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Jim Beam Red Stag Infused Bourbon and Jager in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Shooter Glass and serve.

name: Bucks Fizz
instructions:
Pour the Orange Juice into a Champagne Flute.

Add chilled Champagne.

Stir very gently and serve.

name: Buffalo Bills - Buckhorn Exchange Cocktail
instructions:
Fill an Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Bourbon and Apple Juice to the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Buffalo Bills - Shooter
instructions:
Take a large Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shooter.

Pour in the Grenadine. Pierce the Grenadine with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Vodka by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Grenadine. Then do the same thing with the Blue Curacao.

Serve.

name: Bull Shot
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Pour Vodka, Tabasco Sauce, Orange Juice, Beef Bouillon and (optionally) a dash of Pepper in the Glass.

Stir briskly and serve.

name: Bulldog Highball
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Pour Gin and Orange Juice into the Glass.

Fill with Club Soda, stir, and serve.

name: Bumbo #1
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with a couple of cubes of ice.

Add the Rum, 1 oz of Water and Sugar.

Stir briskly, optionally top with Cinnamon and Nutmeg and serve.

name: Bumbo #2
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with a couple of cubes of ice.

Add the Dark Rum, Orange Juice and Grenadine.

Stir briskly, optionally top with Cinnamon and Nutmeg and serve.

name: Bushwacker #1
instructions:
Add one cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Rum, Dark Rum, Coffee Liqueur, Cream of Coconut and Half and Half to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Highball Glass, optionally top with Nutmeg and Whipped Cream and serve.

name: Bushwacker #2
instructions:
Add one cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Irish Cream, Coffee Liqueur, Vodka, Orange Liqueur (Grand Marnier if you have it) and Amaretto to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Highball Glass, optionally top with Nutmeg and serve. The consistency should be like a milkshake.

name: Bushwacker #3
instructions:
Add one cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Cream of Coconut, Coffee Liqueur, Dark Rum, Creme de Cacao Dark and Milk to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Highball Glass and serve. The consistency should be like a milkshake.

name: Butterball
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour the Amaretto in the Shot Glass. Pierce the Amaretto with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Butterscotch Liqueur by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Amaretto.

Add Whipped Cream if desired and serve.

name: Butterfly
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Citrus Vodka, Peach Vodka, Lime Juice, Bitters Liqueur and Sugar Syrup in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a slice of Peach and serve.

name: Butterscotch Lifesaver Cocktail
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Butterscotch Liqueur, Coconut Rum and Pineapple Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve with a Cherry (optional).

name: Buttery Nipple
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Butterscotch Liqueur and Irish Cream in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, add a drop of Grenadine and serve.

name: Buttery Nipple Shot #1
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour Butterscotch Liqueur into a shot glass. Pierce the Butterscotch Liqueur with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Irish Cream by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Butterscotch Liqueur.

Serve. Note: The shot tastes best when the Irish Cream is cold.

name: Buttery Nipple Shot #2
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour Peach Liqueur into a shot glass. Pierce the Peach with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Irish Cream by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Peach Liqueur.

Serve. Note: The shot tastes best when the Irish Cream is cold.

name: Cable Car Martini
instructions:
