Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of a Martini Glass with Lime Juice or water. Put the rim of the glass a mixture of Sugar and Cinnamon then turn glass in a circle until entire glass is rimmed with sugar.

Combine the Spiced Rum, Cointreau, Sweet and Sour and Lime Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve. Note: the cinnamon sugar rim really adds to the overall appearance and taste of the drink.

name: Cactus Cooler
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Orange Vodka and Triple Sec in the Glass.

Top with Red Bull, stir and serve. Tastes surprisingly close to a Cactus Cooler soda.

name: Cactus Cooler Bomb
instructions:
Pour 1/2 can of an Energy Drink into a Rocks Glass. Fill a large shot glass with Orange Vodka and Triple Sec.

Drop the shot glass into the Energy Drink.

Slam. Note: Special Bomb glasses are available on eBay and other places. They work great for parties and some can be washed and reused.

name: Cactus Jack
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Jack Daniels, Pineapple Juice, and Orange Pineapple Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Cadillac Margarita
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. Rub the rim of a Margarita Glass with Lime Juice. Put the rim of the glass in Salt and turn glass in a circle until half of the glass or more is rimmed with Salt.

Combine the Tequila, Triple Sec, Lime Juice and Sweet and Sour in the Shaker. Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into the Margarita Glass.

Top with a shot of Grand Marnier, optionally garnish with a slice of Lime and serve.

name: Caesar
instructions:
Rub the edge of a Highball Glass with Lime Juice or water. Put the rim of the glass a mixture of Salt and/or Celery Salt then turn glass in a circle until entire glass is rimmed with salt.

Combine the Vodka and Clamato Juice in the Glass and stir. Season with Worcestershire Sauce, Tabasco Sauce and Pepper to taste.

Stir well, optionally garnish with a Celery Stick and serve.

name: Cafe Amaretto
instructions:
Pour Coffee in a Coffee Mug.

Add Amaretto and stir well. Layer Cognac on top.

Optionally add a dollop of Whipped Cream and serve.

name: Cafe Zurich
instructions:
Add the Sambuca, Cognac and Amaretto to a Coffee Mug.

Fill the mug 3/4 full with Coffee. Add the Honey and stir.

Optionally top with a dollop of Whipped Cream and serve.

name: Caffe Corretto
instructions:
Get a Coffee Mug.

Add the Vanilla Whiskey and then fill the mug with Coffee.

Optionally add some French Vanilla Creamer, top with a dollop of Whipped Cream and serve.

name: Caipiroska
instructions:
Place the Lime Wedges in the bottom of an 8 oz. Glass.

Crush Lime with a spoon and add the Sugar. Cover with crushed ice.

Pour Vodka on top and serve.

name: Caipisake
instructions:
Put the Sugar and Lime Wedges in a Collins Glass. Muddle with a muddler or spoon (see our FAQs for a description on muddling).

Fill the glass with ice cubes. Pour the Sake into the glass.

Stir well and serve.

name: Cajun Coquito
instructions:
Combine all the ingredients in a blender, add 2 cups ice, and blend until smooth. Pour into large plastic cup and serve with a straw.

-Abigail Gullo

ingredients.amount: Cane (like Steen's), maple, or simple syrup,1 oz
Preferably Rhum Clément Mahina Coco, 1/2 oz

name: Cajun Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Stoli Vodka and Dry Vermouth in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, add a dash of Jalapeno Pepper, optionally garnish with Olives and serve.

name: California Lemonade
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Whiskey, Powdered Sugar, Grenadine, Lemon and Lime Juice in the Shaker. Shake and strain into a Collins Glass over crushed ice.

Fill with Club Soda and stir. Optionally garnish with slices of Orange and Lemon, add a Cherry and serve with a straw.

name: California Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Red Wine, Dark Rum and Orange Bitters in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve with a twist of Orange (optional).

name: Calimocho
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Combine the Red Wine and Cola in the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Calypso Coffee
instructions:
Get a Coffee Mug.

Add the Dark Rum, Coffee Liqueur (Tia Maria if you have it) and then fill the mug with Coffee.

Top with a dollop of Whipped Cream and serve.

name: Calypso Cooler
instructions:
Fill a Collins Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Coconut Vodka, Orange Juice and Cranberry Juice.

Stir and serve.

name: Campari Soda
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add Campari and fill glass with Club Soda.

Stir, optionally garnish with a wedge of Lime, Lemon or Orange and serve.

name: Canadian
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Whiskey, Triple Sec and Sugar in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Canadian Club and 7
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Pour Canadian Club in the glass and fill with 7-Up.

Stir and serve.

name: Candy Apple
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Veev Acai Spirit, Apple Cider, Apple Liqueur and Sugar Syrup in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Rocks Glass and serve.

name: Candy Cane Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of a Martini Glass with Lemon Juice or water. Put the rim of the glass in the sugar and turn glass in a circle until entire glass is rimmed with sugar.

Combine the Vodka and Peppermint Schnapps in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Candy Cane Swirl Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of a Martini Glass with Lemon Juice or water. Put the rim of the glass in the sugar and turn glass in a circle until entire glass is rimmed with sugar.

Combine the Raspberry Vodka, Cranberry Juice, Peppermint Schnapps and Grenadine in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve. Add a candy cane if you have one. Ho Ho Ho.

name: Cantaloupe Agua Fresca
instructions:
Munchies Recipe: Sprinkle plenty of Tajin on a plate. Dip the rim of a Collins glass into some cantaloupe juice, then invert it into the Tajin, pressing and turning the glass so Tajin sticks to the rim. Fill the glass with ice. Pour the cantaloupe juice, tequila, and lime juice into a cocktail shaker filled with ice. Shake vigorously, then strain into the prepared Collins glass. If you want to get fancy, garnish with cantaloupe balls and mint.

-Jessica Koslow

ingredients.amount: 4 oz (Plus a little extra for the rim)

name: Cape Cod
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Vodka and Cranberry Juice.

Garnish with a wedge of Lime and serve.

name: Captain and Coke
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Pour the Captain Morgan Spiced Rum in the glass and fill with Cola.

Stir and serve. It tastes a lot like Vanilla Coke when mixed properly.

name: Captain Mike's Lemonade
instructions:
Fill a Collins Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Mike's Hard Lemonade and top with Spiced Rum.

Stir and serve.

name: Caribbean Cosmo
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Coconut Vodka, Triple Sec Cranberry Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a twist of Lemon and serve.

name: Caribbean Pineapple
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Coconut Rum and Pineapple Juice in the Glass.

Serve. The Malibu adds a coconut flavor making for a pleasant Pina Colada-like drink.

name: Caribbean Screwdriver #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Peach Liqueur, Banana Liqueur, Coconut Rum, Orange Juice, Pineapple Juice, and Cream in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Collins Glass, optionally garnish with a Cherry and serve. Obviously this is not a drink for a small glass.

name: Caribbean Screwdriver #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Peach Liqueur, Banana Liqueur, Coconut Rum, Orange Juice, Pineapple Juice, and Milk in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Collins Glass, optionally garnish with a Cherry and serve. Obviously this is not a drink for a small glass.

name: Caribbean Screwdriver #3
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Peach Rum, Banana Liqueur, Coconut Rum, Orange Juice, Pineapple Juice, and Milk in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Collins Glass, optionally garnish with a Cherry and serve. Obviously this is not a drink for a small glass.

name: Caribou Lou
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Bacardi 151, Coconut Rum and Pineapple Juice in the Glass.

Stir and serve. This drink was created by the rapper Tech N9ne, who has a song with the same name.

name: Carmel Appletini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Apple Vodka and Butterscotch Liqueur in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a slice of Green Apple and serve.

name: Carolina Panthers -  Browncoat Tea
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Tea Vodka, Spiced Rum, Tequila, Gin and Sweet and Sour to the Glass.

Top with a splash of Cola, stir, optionally garnish with a wedge of Lemon and serve. (Cam Newton wants Colleen to try this!).

name: Carolina Panthers -  Iced Tea
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Tea Vodka and Lemonade.

Stir, optionally garninsh with a wedge of Lemon and serve.

name: Carrot Cake Shot #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with ice.

Combine the Irish Cream, Butterscotch Liqueur and Cinnamon Schnapps in the Cocktail Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Glass and serve.

name: Carrot Cake Shot #2
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour the Peach Liqueur and Irish Cream in a Shot Glass. Pierce the mixture with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Cinnamon Schnapps by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the mixture.

Serve.

name: Carrot Cake Shot #3
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with ice.

Combine the Cinnamon Schnapps, Irish Cream and Coffee Liqueur in the Cocktail Shaker.

Shake, strain into two or more Shot Glasses and serve.

name: Casino
instructions: Pour all ingredients into shaker with ice cubes. Shake well. Strain into chilled cocktail glass. Garnish with a lemon twist and a maraschino cherry. Serve without a straw.

name: Cassis Screwdriver
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full with ice.

Combine the Vodka, Orange Juice and Lemon Juice in a Cocktail Shaker half filled with crushed ice. Shake, strain into the Glass, and add the Creme de Cassis and Grenadine.

Garnish with a Lemon wedge and serve.

name: Castries Peanut Rum Creme Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass in water and then dip the glass into Chocolate Sugar or cocoa.

Add the Castries Peanut Liqueur, Chocolate Liqueur and Vodka to the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Cement Mixer Shooter
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Irish Cream to the Shaker. Shake, strain into the Shot Glass.

Slowly float the Lime Juice on top and serve.

name: Chachodaddy
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Coconut Rum, Orange Juice and Pineapple Juice to the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Chai Toddy
instructions:
Warm up a Coffee Mug in hot water.

Add the Spiced Rum, Hot Tea, Peppermint Schnapps and Honey to the Mug.

Stir and serve.

name: Champagne Cocktail
instructions:
Get a standard size Wine Glass and fill it with Champagne.

Add three drops of Bitters.

Drop a teaspoon of Sugar (or one sugar cube) into the glass and serve.

name: Champagne Cosmopolitan
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Citrus Vodka, Grand Marnier, Cranberry Juice and Lime Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, top off with Champagne, optionally garnish with a twist of Orange and serve.

name: Champagne Tini
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin and Cointreau Liqueur in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, top with Champagne, optionally garnish with a slice of Orange and serve.

name: Chancellor Cocktail
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Whiskey, Port, Sweet Vermouth and Orange Bitters in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Chapala
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass full with ice.

Add the Tequila, a splash of Triple Sec, Lemon Juice, Orange Juice and Grenadine to the Glass.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Orange and serve.

name: Charlie Brown
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Cognac, Creme de Cacao Dark and Drambuie in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Charlie Sheen Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass with Orange Juice and then dip the glass into Powdered Sugar.

Combine the X-Rated and Orange Juice (tiger blood) in the Shaker. Cover and shake vigorously to combine and chill. Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass.

Top off with the Energy Drink and serve. Warning: If you try it once you'll die, your face will melt off and your children will weep over your exploded body. LOL.

name: Charro Negro
instructions:
Squeeze two wedges of Lime into a Highball Glass. Rub the rim with the remainder of Lime and scrape the extra pulp onto the glass rim.

Shake 1/4 tsp or more of Salt into the glass hitting the lime rim while doing so. Stir until Salt is disintegrated.

Add Ice and then Tequila. Fill the glass with Cola and serve.

name: Cherry 7-Up and Vodka
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Pour the Vodka and top with Cherry 7-Up or Cherry Soda.

Stir and serve.

name: Cherry Bomb
instructions:
Pour 1/2 can of an Energy Drink into a Rocks Glass and fill a small shot glass with Cherry Vodka.

Drop the shot glass into the Energy Drink.

Slam. Note: Special Bomb glasses are available on eBay and other places. They work great for parties and some can be washed and reused.

name: Cherry Bottom Shot
instructions:
Layer the bottom of a Shot Glass with a Cherry or two.

Pour the Whiskey in the glass and then the Cinnamon Schnapps.

Serve, and eat the Cherries at the end.

name: Cherry Fizz
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Combine the Cherry Juice and Ginger Ale in the Glass.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Lemon and serve.

name: Cherry Hooker
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add Cherry Liqueur and fill with Orange Juice.

Stir, optionally garnish with a wedge or Lemon or Lime and serve.

name: Cherry Kiss
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour in the Melon Liqueur. Pierce the Melon Liqueur with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Irish Cream by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Melon Liqueur. Then do the same thing with the Raspberry Liqueur.

Serve. It looks amazing.

name: Cherry Popper Shot #1
instructions:
Get a large size Shot Glass.

Add the Peach Liqueur and then the Amaretto.

Add a Cherry and serve.

name: Cherry Popper Shot #2
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Add the Strawberry Liqueur to a Cocktail Shaker half filled with crushed ice. Shake to chill and pout into a Shot Glass. Add a few drops of the Cream by pouring it over back of the spoon and into the shot.

Serve.

name: Cherry Popper Shot #3
instructions:
Get a standard size Shot Glass.

Combine the Rum and Triple Sec in the Shot Glass and add a dash of Grenadine.

Serve.

name: Cherry Popper Shot #4
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Add the Strawberry Liqueur to a Cocktail Shaker half filled with crushed ice. Shake to chill and pout into a Shot Glass. Add a few drops of the Milk by pouring it over back of the spoon and into the shot.

Serve.

name: Cherry Screwdriver
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add Cherry Vodka and fill with Orange Juice.

Stir, garnish with a Cherry and serve.

name: Cherry Vanilla Dr. Pepper
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Amaretto, Rum, then the fill with Dr. Pepper.

Add a drop of two of Vanilla Extract, stir and serve.

name: Chi Chi
instructions:
Add one cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Vodka, Pineapple Juice and Cream of Coconut to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Highball Glass, optionally garnish with a slice of Pineapple or a Cherry and serve.

name: Chicago Bears - Blue Hawaiian
instructions:
Add one cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Rum, Blue Curacao, Pineapple Juice and Cream of Coconut to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Highball Glass, optionally top with a big slice of Orange and serve. GO BEARS!

name: Chicago Bears - Da Bears Margarita
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. Rub the rim of a Margarita Glass with Lime Juice. Put the rim of the glass in Salt and turn glass in a circle until half of the glass or more is rimmed with Salt.

Combine the Coconut Rum, Tequila, Blue Curacao and Sugar Syrup in the Shaker. Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into the Margarita Glass.

Optionally garnish with a wedge of Lime and serve.

name: Chicago Bears - Da Bears Martini
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Coffee Liqueur and Tequila in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Chicago Bears - Da Bears Shot
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Rum, Blue Curacao, Pineapple Juice and Cream of Coconut in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into Shot Glasses and serve.

name: Chicago Bears - Envy Cocktail
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Tequila and Pineapple Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass., top with Blue Curacao, optionally garnish with a Cherry and serve.

name: Chicago Cocktail
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Brandy, Bitters and Triple Sec.

Stir and serve.

name: Chimayo Cocktail
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Combine the Tequila and unfiltered Apple Cider in the Glass.

Add the Lemon Juice and Creme de Cassis. Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Apple and serve.

name: China White Shot
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with ice.

Combine the Vodka, Creme de Cacao White and Irish Cream in the Cocktail Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Shot Glass and serve.

name: Chip Shot
instructions:
Get a large size Martini Glass.

Add the Irish Cream, Hazelnut Liqueur and Tuaca to the Glass. Fill with Coffee last because it can break the Martini Glass if it's too hot.

Optionally top with a dollop of Whipped Cream and serve.

name: Chocolate Cake Shot #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with ice.

Combine the Vodka and Hazelnut Liqueur in a Cocktail Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Shot Glass and serve with a Lemon Wedges sprinkled with Sugar.

name: Chocolate Cake Shot #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with ice.

Combine the Vanilla Vodka and Hazelnut Liqueur in a Cocktail Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Shot Glass and serve with a Lemon Wedges sprinkled with Sugar. Thanks Carmen!

name: Chocolate Cow
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass in water and then dip the glass into Chocolate Sugar or cocoa.

Add the Coffee Liqueur, Creme de Cacao Dark and Cream to the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Chocolate Martini #1
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass in water and then dip the glass into Chocolate Sugar or cocoa.

Add the Vodka and Creme de Cacao White to the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Chocolate Martini #2
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass in water and then dip the glass into Chocolate Sugar or cocoa.

Combine the Vodka and Creme de Cacao in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Chocolate Martini #3
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass in water and then dip the glass into Chocolate Sugar or cocoa.

Combine the Vanilla Vodka and Chocolate Liqueur in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve with a Cherry (optional).

name: Chocolate Martini #4
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass in water and then dip the glass into Chocolate Sugar or Cocoa Powder.

Combine the Vanilla Vodka, Creme de Cacao and Hazelnut Liqueur in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Chocolate Martini #5
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass in water and then dip the glass into Chocolate Sugar or Cocoa Powder.

Combine the Vodka, Creme de Cacao and Irish Cream in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Chocolate Martini #6
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass in water and then dip the glass into Chocolate Sugar or Cocoa Powder.

Combine the Vanilla Vodka, Creme de Cacao and Pecan Liqueur in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Chocolate Martini #7
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass in water and then dip the glass into Chocolate Sugar or cocoa.

Add the Vodka, Chocolate Liqueur, Creme de Cacao White and a splash of Milk to the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Chocolate Raspberry
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Raspberry Vodka, Godiva White Chocolate Liqueur and Irish Cream in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Chocolate Toasted Almond
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Combine the Amaretto, Coffee Liqueur, Milk and Chocolate Syrup in the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Christini Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass in water and then dip the glass into Raspberry Sugar. (Optionally) add a few fresh Raspberries to the glass.

Combine the Raspberry Vodka and Raspberry Liqueur (Chambord if you have it) in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, add the Champagne to the glass and serve.

name: Christmas Cosmopolitan
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Cointreau Liqueur, Cranberry Juice and Lime Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a twist of Lemon and serve.

name: Chupacabra Shot
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and fill it with Tequila.

Add a few drops of Tabasco Sauce to taste.

Serve. Suck on the Lime to cool off your tongue.

name: Churchill
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Scotch and Sweet Vermouth in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Cin Cyn
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Cynar and Sweet Vermouth in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Cincinnati Bengals - Black Widow
instructions:
Fill a Highball glass half full with ice and get a bar spoon in order to help layer the drink.

Add the Orange Juice to the Glass. Pierce the Orange Juice with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Blavod Black Vodka by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Orange Juice.

Serve.

name: Cincinnati Bengals - The Cincinnati
instructions:
Take a Beer Mug and pour in chilled Beer.

Add the Club Soda.

Serve.

name: Cincinnati Cocktail
instructions:
Fill a Pint Glass half full with Beer.

Add the Club Soda.

Serve.

name: Ciroc 'n' Roll
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add Ciroc Snap Frost Vodka, Orange Juice and Energy Drink.

Stir, optionally garnish with a twist of Lemon and serve.

name: Ciroc Obama
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with cracked ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of a Rocks Glass with Lemon Juice and then dip the glass into Sugar.

Combine the Ciroc Premium Vodka, Chambord and Lemonade in the Shaker.

Shake well, pour (ice and all) into the Rocks Glass, optionally garning with a slice of Lemon and serve.

name: Cleveland Browns - Orange and Brown
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Rum, Orange Liqueur and Chocolate Liqueur in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a twist of Orange and serve.

name: Cleveland Browns - The Browns Shot
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour the Coffee Liqueur and Grand Marnier in a Shot Glass. Pierce the mixture with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Irish Cream by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the mixture.

Serve.

name: Cliquet #1
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with a couple of cubes of ice.

Add the Whiskey, Dark Rum and top off with Orange Juice.

Stir and serve.

name: Cliquet #2
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with a couple of cubes of ice.

Add the Bourbon, Dark Rum and top off with Orange Juice.

Stir and serve.

name: Clover Club
instructions: Dry shake ingredients to emulsify, add ice, shake and served straight up.

name: Coco Cabanatini #1
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Coconut Rum, Banana Liqueur, Cinnamon Schnapps and a splash of Cream in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve. Garnish with a sprinkle of Cinnamon if you have some.

name: Coco Cabanatini #2
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Coconut Rum, Banana Liqueur, Cinnamon Schnapps and a splash of Milk in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve. Garnish with a sprinkle of Cinnamon if you have some.

name: Coco Splash
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with a couple of cubes of ice.

Add the Coconut Rum, 7-Up and Orange Juice.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Orange, a Cherry and serve.

name: Coconut Daiquiri
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. Rim a Martini Glass with Lime and grated coconut if you have it.

Combine the Rum, Coconut Rum, Lime Juice, Sugar Syrup and Cream of Coconut in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Martini Glass filled with crushed ice, optionally add a dollop of Whipped Cream and then sprinkle Dark Rum on top using a bar spoon. Optionally garnish with a slice of Lime and serve with a straw.

name: Cocotini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Rum, Triple Sec and Coconut Rum in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Coctel Algeria
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Apricot Liqueur, Pisco, Triple Sec and Orange Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a slice of Orange and serve.

name: Coffee Nudge
instructions:
Get a Coffee Mug.

Add the Creme de Cacao Dark, Coffee Liqueur, Brandy and then fill the mug with Coffee.

Top with a dollop of Whipped Cream and serve.

name: Coffee Royale
instructions:
Get a Coffee Mug.

Add the Brandy, Sugar and then fill the mug with Coffee.

Top with a dollop of Whipped Cream and serve.

name: Coffeeehouse Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Thatcher's Coffeehouse Artisan Liqueur and Vodka (Effen if you have it) in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Cointreaupolitan
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Cointreau, Cranberry and Lemon Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a twist of Lemon and serve.

name: Colony Cocktail
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Southern Comfort and Lime Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a slice of X and serve.

name: Colorado Bulldog
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Coffee Liqueur and Milk in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Rocks Glass, add a splash of Cola and serve. Tastes like chocolate milk.

name: Comfortable Fuzzy Screw
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Vodka, Southern Comfort Bourbon, Peach Liqueur and Orange Juice to the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Cordless Screwdriver Shot
instructions:
Pour chilled Vodka in a Shot Glass.

Dip a wedge of Orange in the Sugar.

Shoot the Vodka and then suck the Orange.

name: Corn N' Oil
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Pour in the Falernum, then the Dark Rum, which will float on top. Add the dashes of Bitters, then squeeze the wedge of Lime and drop into the drink.

Stir and serve.

name: Corpse Reviver
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Brandy, Bitters and Creme de Menthe in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Cosmo-Not
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Peach Juice, Cranberry Juice, and Grenadine in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, top with 7-Up or Sprite, optionally garnish with a twist of Lemon or Lime and serve.

name: Cosmopolitan #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Triple Sec, Lime and Cranberry Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a twist of Lemon and serve.

name: Cosmopolitan #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Citrus Vodka, Triple Sec, Lime and Cranberry Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a twist of Lemon and serve.

name: Cosmopolitan #3
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass with Lime Juice and then dip the glass into sugar (or Cranberry Sugar if you have it).

Combine the Vodka, Orange Liqueur, Lime and Cranberry Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Cosmopolitan #4
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Orange Vodka, Cointreau and Cranberry Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Cosmopolitan #5
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Cointreau, Cranberry and Lime Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a twist of Orange and serve.

name: Cosmopolitan #6
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Cranberry Vodka, Triple Sec, Lime and Cranberry Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a twist of Lemon and serve.

name: Cowboy Sangria
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Red Wine, Patron Citronge and Pomegranate Juice in the Shaker.

Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into a Highball Glass, top off a slice of Orange, Lime and some Blackberries (if you have them) and serve.

name: Cranberry Pomegranate Mojito
instructions:
Add the Brown Sugar, Lime Juice and Mint Sprigs into a Highball Glass. Muddle with a muddler or the back of a spoon for 30 seconds.

Add the Rum and Cranberry Juice and top with Club Soda.

Stir gently and serve.

name: Crantini
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Triple Sec, Sweet Vermouth and Cranberry Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a twist of Lemon and serve.

name: Cream of Jack
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Jack Daniels and Amaretto to the Glass and fill with Cream Soda.

Stir, optionally add the twist of Lemon peel and serve.

name: Creamslide
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

 Combine the Vanilla Vodka, Cointreau and Orange Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally add a dollop of Whipped Cream on top and serve.

name: Crispy Crunch Martini
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Creme de Cacao Dark, Hazelnut Liqueur and Milk in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve. It tastes exactly like the candy bar.

name: Crown Peach Cobbler
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Peach Liqueur, Crown Royal, Orange Juice, Lemon Juice and Almond Syrup in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a slice of Orange and serve.

name: Cuban Manhattan
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Dark Rum and both Dry and Sweet Vermouth in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally add a Cherry and serve.

name: Cuban Special
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Rum, Triple Sec, Pineapple Juice and Lime Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Cucumber Irish Blessing
instructions:
Place some Sugar Syrup, a large pinch (small handful) of Mint Sprigs and splash of Club Soda in a Highball Glass.

Use a muddler to lightly press the Mint and dissolve Sugar until it smells of spearmint gum. Add Lime Juice into the glass (or squeeze both halves of a Lime and leave one hull in the mixture). Add Cucumber Vodka, stir, and fill with ice.

Top with Club Soda, optionally garnish with a Cherry and serve.

name: Cuervo Especial Oasis
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Jose Cuervo Tequila Gold, Triple Sec, Cranberry and Orange Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve with a wedge of Lemon or Orange (optional).

name: Culto A La Vida
instructions:
Add the Lime Juice and Sugar to a Highball Glass and stir to dissolve.

Add ice to the Glass followed by the Cranberry Juice and then the Gold Rum.

Stir and serve.

name: Dallas Cowboy - Urban Cowboy Margarita
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. Rub the rim of a Margarita Glass with Lime Juice. Put the rim of the glass in Margarita Salt and turn glass in a circle until half of the glass or more is rimmed with Salt.

Combine the Tequila, Lemon Juice, Chili Powder and Agave Nectar in the Shaker. Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into the Margarita Glass.

Optionally garnish with a slice of Lime and serve.

name: Dallas Cowboys - Cowboy Cocktail #1
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

 Combine the Whiskey and Cream in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Dallas Cowboys - Cowboy Cocktail #2
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Tequila, Blue Curacao, Orange Liqueur (Grand Marnier if you have it), Ginger Ale and Lime Juice to the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Danish  Mary
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Aquavitand Bloody Mary Mix.

Stir and serve.

name: Daydream Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Citrus Vodka, Triple Sec and a splash of Orange Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Dead Nazi Shot #1
instructions:
Get a standard size Shot Glass.

Combine the Cinnamon Schnapps and Jager in the Glass.

Serve.

name: Dead Nazi Shot #2
instructions:
Get a standard size Shot Glass.

Combine the Cinnamon and Peppermint Schnapps in the Glass.

Serve.

name: Dead Nazi Shot #3
instructions:
Get a standard size Shot Glass.

Combine the Rumple Minze and Jager in the Glass.

Serve.

name: Death And Co. Oaxaca Old-Fashioned
instructions: Stir all the ingredients over ice, then strain into a double rocks glass over one large ice cube. To garnish, flame the orange twist over the drink, then drop it in.

name: Delilah
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Sugar, Cream and Egg White in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Denver Broncos - Orange Crush
instructions:
Fill a Rocks with crushed ice.

Add the Citrus Vodka, Triple Sec and Orange Juice to the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Denver Broncos - The Bronco
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add Vodka, Orange Soda and top with Blue Curacao.

Serve.

name: Derby
instructions: Pour all ingredients into a mixing glass with ice. Stir. Strain into a cocktail glass. Garnish with a sprig of fresh mint in the drink.

name: Derby Daiquiri
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Rum, Orange Juice, Lime Juice and Powdered Sugar to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Champagne Flute and serve.

name: Desert Sunset
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Orange and Raspberry Vodkas, Cointreau, Orange, Lemon and Lime Juices in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, top with a dash of Grenadine and serve.

name: Detroit Lions - Guinness Sangria
instructions:
Take a Beer Mug and pour in chilled Guinness Beer.

Add the Port Wine and top with a dash of Nutmeg.

Serve. It has a rich, sweet, almost coffee taste.

name: Detroit Lions - The Lions Last Word
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Maraschino Liqueur, Chartreuse Green and Lime Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the glass and serve.

name: Dew Drop
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Rum, Coconut Rum, Melon Liqueur and Pineapple Juice in the Shaker. Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into a Collins Glass.

Add a sp0lash of 7-Up and serve.

name: Diamond Fizz
instructions:
Combine the Gin, Lemon Juice and Powdered Sugar in a Cocktail Shaker half filled with crushed ice.

Strain into a Highball Glass over two or three ice cubes.

Fill with chilled Champagne, stir, and serve.

name: Dirty Bird
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Vodka, Coffee Liqueur and Cream.

Shake by placing a mixing tin over the glass and giving it one or two good shakes. Serve.

name: Dirty Martini #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin and Olive Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with 3 or so Olives and serve.

name: Dirty Martini #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin and Dry Vermouth in the Shaker.

Shake once, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, add a splash of Olive Juice, garnish with Olives and serve.

name: Dirty Mother
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Brandy and Coffee Liqueur.

Stir and serve.

name: Dirty White Mother
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Brandy and Coffee Liqueur, stir, and then float the Cream on top.

Serve.

name: Dog's Nose
instructions:
Put a Beer into a large Pilsner Glass or Beer Mug.

Drop a shot of Gin.

Serve.

name: Dr. Daniel
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Jack Daniels, then the fill with Dr. Pepper.

Stir and serve.

name: Dr. Pepper
instructions:
Prepare a Shot of Amaretto.

 Drop the Shot Glass into the glass of Beer and drink.

Serve. The Amaretto can be lit to make a Flaming Dr. Pepper.

name: Dracula's Kiss #1
instructions:
Coat the bottom of a Highball Glass with Grenadine.

Add a couple cubes of ice and then the Black Cherry Vodka.

Top with Cola, optionally garnish with a Cherry and serve. Happy Halloween!

name: Dracula's Kiss #2
instructions:
Coat the bottom of a Highball Glass with Grenadine.

Add a couple cubes of ice and then the Blackcherry Liqueur.

Top with Cola, optionally garnish with a Cherry and serve. Happy Halloween!

name: Dry Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Dry Vermouth and a dash of Bitters in the Shaker.

Shake or stir, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, add some Green Olives or a twist of Lemon if desired and serve.

name: Dry Rob Roy
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Scotch, Dry Vermouth, Bitters Liqueur and Lemon in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a twist of Lemon and serve.

name: Dubonnet Cocktail
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin and Dubonnet Rouge in the Shaker.

Shake or stir, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, add a slice of Lemon of Orange if desired and serve.

name: Duck Fart Shot #1
instructions:
Get a large size Shot Glass.

Add the Irish Cream, then Coffee Liqueur and then layer Crown Royal on top.

Serve.

name: Duck Fart Shot #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Whiskey, Amaretto and Irish Cream in the Shaker. Shake, strain and pour into Shot Glass.

Serve.

name: Due' On The Beach
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Due' Merlot Vodka, Tuaca Liqueur, Melon Liqeur, Pineapple and Cranberry Juice in the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Dulcinea
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Rum, Cream of Coconut, Pineapple, Orange and Grapefruit Juices followed by a dash of Grenadine for color. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Rocks Glass and serve.

name: Easy Does It
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Coffee Liqueur, Grain Alcohol and Irish Cream in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a slice of Orange and serve.

name: El Nino
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Orange Vodka, Peach Liqueur, Blue Curacao and Orange and Pineapple Juices in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a Cherry and serve.

name: El Presidente
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Rum, Orange Liqueur, Sweet Vermouth and a dash of Grenadine in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Elderflower Margarita
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. Rub the rim of a Margarita Glass with Lime Juice. Put the rim of the glass in Margarita Salt and turn glass in a circle until half of the glass or more is rimmed with Salt.

Combine the Tequila, Elderflower Liqueur and Margarita Mix in the Shaker. Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into the Margarita Glass.

Optionally garnish with a slice of Lime and serve.

name: Electric Lemonade
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Rum, Blue Curacao and Sweet and Sour in a Cocktail Shaker half filled with crushed ice.

Strain into a Highball Glass, add 7-Up to taste, garnish with a slice of Lemon and serve.

name: Electric Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Blue Curacao, a splash of Sweet and Sour and a splash of 7-Up in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Electric Screwdriver
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Southern Comfort and Amaretto in the Glass.

Fill with Orange Juice and serve.

name: Emerald Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka and Melon Liqueur in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a Cherry and serve.

name: Emerils Chocolate Cocktail
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass in water and then dip the glass into Chocolate Sugar or cocoa.

Add the Vodka, Coffee Liqueur, Walnut Liqueur, Chocolate Liqueur and Cocoa Powder/Chocolate Shavings to the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: English Highball
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Brandy, Gin and Sweet Vermouth in the Glass. Fill with Club Soda.

Add the twist of Lemon peel, stir, and serve.

name: Espresso Martini #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Coffee Liqueur, Coffee and Sugar Syrup in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Espresso Martini #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Coffee Liqueur, Espresso and Sugar Syrup in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Espresso Raspberry Chocolate Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass in water and then dip the glass into Chocolate Sugar or cocoa.

Add the Coffee Vodka, Raspberry Vodka and Creme de Cacao Dark to the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Everybody's Irish
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Irish Whiskey, Creme de Menthe Green and Chartreuse Green in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with Green Olives and serve.

name: Evil Green Eyes
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Lemon and Mojito Rum, Melon Liqueur, Sweet and Sour and Club Soda in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Extra Dry Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin and a couple drops of Dry Vermouth in the Shaker.

Shake or stir, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, add some Bitters, Green Olives or a twist of Lemon if desired and serve.

name: Extra Dry Vodka Martini
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Dry Vermouth and Lemon Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a slice of Lemon and serve.

name: Fancy Free
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Bourbon, Maraschino Liqueur, Bitters Liqueur and Orange Bitters in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Fireman's Sour
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Rum, Lime Juice and Grenadine in the Shaker. Shake and strain into a Highball Glass filled with ice.

Top with Club Soda, optionally garnish with the half-slice of Orange, top with the Cherry and serve.

name: Flaming A.S.S.
instructions:
Take a large Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour in the Grenadine. Pierce the Grenadine with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Creme de Menthe by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Grenadine. Then do the same thing with the Banana Liqueur and finally the Rum.

Light with a match or lighter, serve, extinguish the flame and drink. Another option is to use a long straw. While the shot is still flaming, quickly place a straw down to the bottom of the glass and drink quickly. ALWAYS USE CAUTION WHEN FIRE IS INVOLVED!

name: Flaming Armadillo
instructions:
Take a large Shot Glass and a get a small spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour in the Amaretto. Pierce the Amaretto with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Tequila by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Amaretto. Then do the same thing with the Bacardi 151.

Light with a match or lighter, serve, extinguish the flame and drink. Another option is to use a long straw. While the shot is still flaming, quickly place a straw down to the bottom of the glass and drink quickly. ALWAYS USE CAUTION WHEN FIRE IS INVOLVED!

name: Flaming B52 #1
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a small spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour in the Kahlua. Pierce the Kahlua with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Baileys by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Kahlua. Then do the same thing with the Grand Marnier and add a splash of Bacardi 151 on top. Light with a Match or Lighter.

Serve, extinguish the flame and drink. Another option is to use a long straw. While the shot is still flaming, quickly place a straw down to the bottom of the glass and drink quickly. ALWAYS USE CAUTION WHEN FIRE IS INVOLVED!

name: Flaming B52 #2
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a small spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour in the Kahlua. Pierce the Kahlua with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Baileys by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Kahlua. Then do the same thing with the Cointreau and add a splash of Bacardi 151 on top. Light with a Match or Lighter.

Serve, extinguish the flame and drink. Another option is to use a long straw. While the shot is still flaming, quickly place a straw down to the bottom of the glass and drink quickly. ALWAYS USE CAUTION WHEN FIRE IS INVOLVED!

name: Flaming Dr. Pepper
instructions:
Take a Beer Mug or Pint Glass and fill it half full with Beer.

Take a Shot Glass and pour in the Amaretto followed by the Bacardi 151. Light the shot, let it burn for a short while, pick up Shot Glass by the sides and drop entire Shot Glass (bottom first) into Beer.

When bottom of Shot Glass hits bottom of Beer Glass start drinking (the Beer will put out the flame). The bottom tastes exactly like Dr. Pepper. ALWAYS USE CAUTION WHEN FIRE IS INVOLVED!

name: Flaming Gorilla
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a small spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour in the Peppermint Schnapps. Pierce the Peppermint Schnapps with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Coffee Liqueur by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Peppermint Schnapps. Then do the same thing with the Bacardi 151. Light with a match or lighter and wait about 15 seconds.

Serve, extinguish the flame and drink. Another option is to use a long straw. While the shot is still flaming, quickly place a straw down to the bottom of the glass and drink quickly. ALWAYS USE CAUTION WHEN FIRE IS INVOLVED!

name: Flaming Lamborghini
instructions:
Take a large Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour the Coffee Liqueur and Sambuca into the Martini Glass and give the drinker a straw. Pour the Blue Curacao and Irish Cream into two separate Shot Glasses and set them on either side of the Martino Glass. Using the match or lighter, light the Coffee/Sambuca mixture in the Martini Glass. The fire will be a low blue flame.

Insert a long straw through the flames and drink the liquid from the bottom of the glass. (Best to take it mostly down in one gulp or very quickly). Just before the cocktail glass is empty douse the fire by pouring the two prepared shots into the Martini Glass and keep drinking through the straw until completed. ALWAYS USE CAUTION WHEN FIRE IS INVOLVED!

name: Flaming Orgasm
instructions:
Take a Beer Mug or Pint Glass and fill it half full with Beer.

Take a Shot Glass and pour in the Bacardi 151 Rum. Light the shot, let it burn for a short while, pick up Shot Glass by the sides and drop entire Shot Glass (bottom first) into Beer.

When bottom of Shot Glass hits bottom of Beer Glass start drinking (the Beer will put out the flame). ALWAYS USE CAUTION WHEN FIRE IS INVOLVED!

name: Flaming Pumpkin Pie
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a small spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour in the Coffee Liqueur. Pierce the Coffee Liqueur with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Irish Cream by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Coffee Liqueur. Then do the same thing with the Tequila, sprinkle with Cinnamon and light with a Match or Lighter.

Serve, extinguish the flame and drink. It's just like warm pumpkin pie. ALWAYS USE CAUTION WHEN FIRE IS INVOLVED!

name: Flaming Sambuca
instructions:
Put 3 Coffee Beans in a Shot Glass and add the Sambuca.

Light the Sambuca with a Match or Lighter and let it burn for about 10 seconds.

Cover the glass with your hand to extinguish, then inhale the air underneath your hand. Drink the shot. ALWAYS USE CAUTION WHEN FIRE IS INVOLVED!

name: Flamingo
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of a Martini Glass with Lime Juice or water. Put the rim of the glass in the sugar and turn glass in a circle until entire glass is rimmed with sugar.

Combine the Gin, Apricot Liqueur, Lime Juice and Grenadine in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Flatliner Shot
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Fist, add the Sambuca. Pierce the Sambuca with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Tequila by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Sambuca. Then add the drops of Tabasco in a circle. The Tabasco Sauce falls through the Tequila and makes an even layer on top of the Sambuca.

If your lucky you'll get 6-8 tiny little red balls suspended about halfway down the glass. Cool! Serve.

name: Flirtini #1
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Muddle the Pineapple and Cointreau in the bottom of a Shaker or Mixing Glass. Fill the Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add Vodka and Pineapple Juice.

Sir or shake, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, top with Champagne and optionally serve with a slice of Pineapple and a Cherry.

name: Flirtini #2
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill the Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add Vodka and Pineapple Juice.

Sir or shake, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, top with Champagne and optionally serve with a slice of Pineapple and a Cherry.

name: Floradora
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Gin, Raspberry Liqueur, Ginger Ale and Lime Juice to the Glass.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Lime and serve.

name: Floridian
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Orange Vodka, Grand Marnier and a splash of Orange Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Flying Grasshopper
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Creme de Menthe Green and Creme de Cacao White in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Fog Cutter
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Rum, Gin and Orange Juice. Float the Galliano on top.

Serve.

name: Forbidden Fruit
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Ketel One Vodka, Pomegranate Liqueur, Grapefruit and Pineapple Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Forbidden Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Absolut Kurant Vodka, Melon Liqueur, Blue Curacao and Cranberry Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Forth of July Shooter
instructions:
Take a large Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shooter.

Pour in the Grenadine. Pierce the Grenadine with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Vodka by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Grenadine. Then do the same thing with the Blue Curacao.

Serve.

name: Four Horsemen Shot #1
instructions:
Get a standard size Shot Glass.

Slowly combine the Bacardi 151, Jager and Peppermint Schnapps in the Glass.

Serve.

name: Four Horsemen Shot #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Rum, Jager, Peppermint Schnapps and Tequila in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a large Shot Glass or small Rocks Glass and serve.

name: Freddy Fudpucker  #1
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Pour Tequila in the Glass and fill with Orange Juice.

Stir briskly, float the Galliano on top using the back of a spoon and serve.

name: Freddy Fudpucker  #2
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Pour Tequila in the Glass and fill with Orange Juice.

Stir briskly, float the Herbal Liqueur on top using the back of a spoon and serve.

name: French 75 #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine Gin, Cointreau and Lemon Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into a Champagne Flute, top with Champagne and optionally serve with a twist of Lemon.

name: French 75 #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine Brandy, Cointreau and Lemon Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain intoa Champagne Flute, top with Champagne and optionally serve with a twist of Lemon.

name: French 76
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine Vodka, Cointreau and Lemon Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain intoa Champagne Flute, top with Champagne and optionally serve with a twist of Lemon.

name: French 77
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine Elderflower Liqueur and Lemon Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into a Champagne Flute, top with Champagne and optionally serve with a twist of Lemon.

name: French Connection #1
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Brandy and Amaretto.

Stir and serve.

name: French Connection #2
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Grand Marnier and Cognac.

Stir and serve.

name: French Cosmo
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Grey Goose L'Orange Vodka, Grand Marnier, a splash of Cranberry Juice and a splash of Lime Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: French Ginger Martini #1
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Vodka, Ginger Liqueur and a splash of Grand Marnier to Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a wedge of Lime and serve.

name: French Ginger Martini #2
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Ginger Vodka and a splash of Grand Marnier to Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a wedge of Lime and serve.

name: French Ginger Martini #3
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Vodka, Gingerbread Liqueur and a splash of Grand Marnier to Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a wedge of Lime and serve.

name: French Kamikaze Shooter
instructions:
Get a large size Shot Glass and chill it in the freezer to cool.

Combine the Vodka, Triple Sec and Sweet and Sour in the Glass.

Drop a pinch of Sugar into the shooter and serve.

name: French Kamikaze Shot
instructions:
Get a standard size Shot Glass and chill it in the freezer to cool.

Combine the Vodka, Triple Sec and Raspberry Liqueur in the Glass.

Serve.

name: French Kiss #1
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Chambord, Grand Marnier and a splash of Pineapple Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: French Kiss #2
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Pour the Orange Vodka and Creme de Cacao into the Shaker.

Stir briskly until the Shaker is frosted and beaded with sweat. Strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: French Martini
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Raspberry Liqueur and Pineapple Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a twist of Lemon and serve.

name: French Martini Shot
instructions:
Get a standard size Shot Glass and chill it in the freezer to cool.

Combine the Vodka, Raspberry Liqueur and Peach Liqueur in the Glass.

Serve.

name: Frigid Hairy Virgin
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Rum, Triple Sec and Pineapple Juice to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Highball Glass and serve.

name: Frozen Daiquiri
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Rum, Lime Juice, Triple Sec and Powdered Sugar to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Hurricane Glass, optionally top with a Cherry and serve.

name: Frozen Lemonade
instructions:
Add one cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Rum, Frozen Lemonade, Sugar and some water to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Serve.

name: Frozen Margarita #1
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Tequila, Triple Sec and Lime Juice to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass with Lime Juice or water and then dip the glass into Margarita Salt.

Pour contents into a Margarita Glass, optionally garnish with a Lime Wedge and serve.

name: Frozen Margarita #2
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Tequila, and Margarita Mix to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass with Lime Juice or water and then dip the glass into Margarita Salt.

Pour contents into a Margarita Glass, optionally garnish with a Lime Wedge and serve.

name: Frozen Martini
instructions:
Put a Martini Glass and 2 Almond-Stuffed Olives in a freezer for approximately 4 hours. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Pour the Gin and Dry Vermouth into the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the Martini Glass, garnish with the 2 Almond-Stuffed Olives and serve.

name: Frozen Midori Margarita
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Tequila, Midori, Triple Sec and Lime Juice to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass with Lime Juice or water and then dip the glass into Margarita Salt.

Pour contents into a Margarita Glass, optionally garnish with a Lime Wedge and serve.

name: Fuzzy Leprachan Shooter
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Blue Curacao, Peach Liqueur and Orange Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into Shot Glass and serve.

name: Fuzzy Navel #1
instructions:
Fill a Collins Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Peach Liqueur and fill with Orange Juice.

Stir and serve.

name: Fuzzy Navel #2
instructions:
Fill a Collins Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Peach Liqueur, Orange Juice and Lemonade.

Stir and serve.

name: Fuzzy Navel #3
instructions:
Fill a Collins Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Peach Liqueur, Vodka and Orange Juice.

Stir and serve.

name: G Spot Shooter
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Jager, Orange Rum, Orange Liqueur and Cranberry Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a large shot glass and serve.

name: Galliano Daiquiri
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Rum, Galliano, Lime Juice, Sugar Syrup and Lime in the Shaker.

Shake, pour the contents (ice and all) into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a slice of Lime and serve.

name: Genoa Martini
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Grappa, Sambuca and Dry Vermouth in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Gentlemen Prefer Blondes
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Huckleberry Liqueur, Jack Daniels Cranberry Juice, Ginger Ale and Sweet and Sour.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Orange and serve.

name: German Chocolate Cake
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Creme de Menthe White, Coconut Rum, Hazelnut Liqueur and Cream to the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Gibson
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine Gin and Dry Vermouth over ice cubes.

Shake or stir, strain into the Martini Glass, add the Cocktail Onions and serve.

name: Gilligan's Island
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Vodka, Peach Liqueur, Cranberry Juice and Orange Juice to the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Gin and Ginger
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Pour Gin over ice and then pour the Ginger Ale over the Gin.

Stir, add a Lime Wedge and serve.

name: Gin and Sin
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Orange Juice, Lemon Juice and Grenadine in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Gin Bitter Lemon
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Gin and Bitter Lemon to the Glass.

Stir, optionally add a slice of Lemon or Lime and serve.

name: Gin Blossom
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Gin and Peach Liqueur to the Glass.

Top with 7-Up, optionally add a slice of Lemon or Lime and serve.

name: Gin Buck
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add Gin and Lemon Juice.

Fill with Ginger Ale, stir, optionally add a wedge of Lime and serve.

name: Gin Fizz
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with two or three ice cubes.

Combine the Gin and Sweet and Sour in the Glass.

Add 7-Up, stir, and serve.

name: Gin Mojito
instructions:
Place Sugar, a large pinch (small handful) of Mint, and splash of Lime Juice in a Highball Glass.

Use a muddler to lightly press the Mint Sprigs and dissolve Sugar until it smells of spearmint gum. Add the rest of the Lime Juice into the glass (or squeeze both halves of a Lime and leave one hull in the mixture). Add Gin, stir, and fill with ice.

Top with Apple Juice and garnish with Mint Sprig.

name: Gin Pahit #1
instructions:
Splash a few drops of Angostura Bitters into an Rocks glass and roll them around until the inside is coated.

Pour out the excess and and add the Gin.

Stir and serve.

name: Gin Pahit #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin and Bitters in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a large Shot Glass or small Rocks Glass and serve.

name: Gin Rickey
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Gin and Lime Juice in the Glass.

Top with Club Soda, optionally add a Lime Wedge and serve.

name: Gin Sour
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Lemon Juice and Sugar in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Whiskey Sour Glass, optionally garnish with a half-slice of Orange, top with a Cherry and serve.

name: Gin Thing
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add Gin and Lime Juice.

Fill with Ginger Ale, stir and serve.

name: Gin, Rum and Tonic
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Gin, Rum and Tonic Water to the Glass.

Stir, optionally add a wedge of Lime and serve.

name: Gingerbread Martini #1
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Cinnamon Schnapps and Irish Cream in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally add a dash of Nutmeg and serve.

name: Gingerbread Martini #2
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Peppermint Schnapps and Irish Cream in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally add a dash of Cinnamon and serve.

name: Ginza Mary
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Sake, Tomato Juice, Lemon Juice, Tabasco Sauce and Soy Sauce in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Glass over ice, add Pepper to taste, optionally add a wedge of Lime and serve.

name: Girasole Cocktail
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Artichoke Liqueur, Orange Vodka, Cointreaus and Orange Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Girl Scout Cookie Shot
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Coffee Liqueur, Cinnamon Schnapps and Irish Cream in the Shaker. Shake and strain into large shot glass.

Serve. Drink soon after pouring before the liquors separate.

name: Gladiator
instructions:
Put the Amaretto and Southern Comfort in a Shot Glass (no ice).

Put the Orange Juice and 7-Up in a Rocks Glass.

Drop the Shot Glass into the Rocks Glass and slam it.

name: Glasgow
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Whiskey, Dry Vermouth, Absinthe and Bitters in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Martini Glass and serve.

name: Godchild
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Amaretto and Vodka, stir, and then float the Cream on top.

Serve.

name: Godiva Carameltini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass in water and then dip the glass into Chocolate Sugar or Cocoa Powder. You can also swirl Chocolate Syrup around the inside of the glass.

Combine the Godiva Carmel Liqueur and Vodka in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a piece of chocolate or Strawberry and serve.

name: Godiva Chocolate Martini
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Godiva Chocolate Liqueur and Vodka in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Godiva Polar Bear
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Godiva Chocolate Liqueur and Peppermint Schnapps in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Gold Rush Tea
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker with ice.

Combine the Vodka, Gin, Rum, Coconut Rum, Captain Morgan Spiced Rum, Lemon, Lime and Pineapple Juices in the Shaker. Cover and shake vigorously to combine and chill. Pour the mixture (ice and all) into the Highball Glass.

Optionally garnish with Lemon Wedge and serve.

name: Golden Cadillac
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Galliano, Creme de Cacao White and Cream in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Golden Dream
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Galliano, Creme de Cacao White and Cream in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Golden Grand Margarita
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. Rub the rim of a Margarita Glass with Lime Juice. Put the rim of the glass in Salt and turn glass in a circle until half of the glass or more is rimmed with Salt.

Combine the Tequila, Grand Marnier, Lime Juice and Sweet and Sour in the Shaker. Optionally add a splash of Orange Juice, shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into the Margarita Glass.

Optionally garnish with a wedge of Lime and Serve.

name: Golden Margarita
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. Rub the rim of a Margarita Glass with Lime Juice. Put the rim of the glass in Salt and turn glass in a circle until half of the glass or more is rimmed with Salt.

Combine the Tequila, Orange Liqueur, Lime Juice and Sweet and Sour in the Shaker. Optionally add a splash of Orange Juice, shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into the Margarita Glass.

Optionally garnish with a wedge of Lime and Serve.

name: Grand Mimosa
instructions:
Pour Grand Marnier into a Champagne Flute.

Fill almost to the top with Champagne and top off with the Orange Juice.

Serve.

name: Granny Smith Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Apple Vodka, Apple Liqueur and a splash of Pineapple Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Grape Crush #1
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Vodka, Grape Juice and Lemon Juice to the Glass.

Stir, top with Club Soda and optionally serve with a slice of Lemon.

name: Grape Crush #2
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Grape Vodka, Grape Juice and Lemon Juice to the Glass.

Stir, top with Club Soda and optionally serve with a slice of Lemon.

name: Grape Crush #3
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Grape Rum, Grape Juice and Lemon Juice to the Glass.

Stir, top with Club Soda and optionally serve with a slice of Lemon.

name: Grape Crush #4
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Vodka, Grape Liqueur and Lemon Juice to the Glass.

Stir, top with Club Soda and optionally serve with a slice of Lemon.

name: Grasshopper - Pousse-Cafe Style
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour in the Creme de Menthe. Pierce the Creme de Menthe with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Creme de Cacao by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Creme de Menthe. Then do the same thing with the Cream.

Serve. It looks amazing.

name: Grasshopper Martini #1
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Creme de Menthe, Creme de Cacao, and Cream in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve. Try the Grasshopper Pousse-Cafe Style (i.e. layered). It looks amazing.

name: Grasshopper Martini #2
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Creme de Menthe, Creme de Cacao, and Milk in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve. Try the Grasshopper Pousse-Cafe Style (i.e. layered). It looks amazing.

name: Grasshopper Shooter #1
instructions:
Get a standard size Shot Glass.

Combine the Creme de Menthe Green, Creme de Cacao and Cream in the Glass.

Serve.

name: Grasshopper Shooter #2
instructions:
Get a standard size Shot Glass.

Combine the Creme de Menthe Green, Creme de Cacao and Milk in the Glass.

Serve.

name: Grateful Dead
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Vodka, Rum, Tequila, Gin and Raspberry Liqueur (Chambord if you have it) to the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Greek Sex on the Beach
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Vodka, Lemon Rum, Tequila, Southern Comfort, Orange Juice and Grenadine in a Cocktail Shaker half filled with crushed ice.

Shake, strain into the Glass and serve.

name: Green Apple Martini
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Apple Liqueur, Dry Vermouth and Green Apple in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.
