name: Green Apple Tequini Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Tequila, Melon Liqueur (Midori if you have it), Apple Liqueur and Lime Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve with a slice of Apple (optional).

name: Green Bay Packers - Packers Punch #1
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Melon Liqueur, Vodka and Orange Juice.

Stir, garnish with a slice of Orange and serve.

name: Green Bay Packers - Packers Punch #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Tequila, Orange Liqueur, Orange Juice and Sweet and Sour in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Green Bay Packers - WI Old Fashioned
instructions:
Mix Sugar and Bitters in an Rocks Glass (also known as an Old-Fashioned glass - hence the name of the glass).

Drop in a Cherry and an Orange slice. Muddle into a paste using a muddler or the back end of a spoon.

Pour in Bourbon, fill with ice cubes, add a splash of Club Soda, stir and serve.

name: Green Eyes
instructions:
Fill a Hurricane Glass half full or more with ice.

Pour the Melon Liqueur, Rum, Cream of Coconut, Pineapple and Lime Juices in the Glass.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Pineapple and serve.

name: Green Iguana Margarita
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Tequila, Melon Liqueur and Sweet and Sour to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass with Lime Juice or water and then dip the glass into Margarita Salt.

Pour contents into a Margarita Glass, optionally garnish with a Lime Wedge and serve.

name: Green Lantern
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Melon Liqueur, Orange Juice and 7-Up or Sprite in the Shaker.

Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into a Rocks Glass, optionally add a few drops of Grenadine, a slice of Pineapple, a Cherry and serve.

name: Green Lizard Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Bacardi 151 Rum and Chartreuse Green in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Green Melon Tea
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Vodka, Gin, Rum, Triple Sec, Melon Liqueur, Apple Liqueur and Sweet and Sour in the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Green Tea Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Green Tea Vodka, Lemon Juice and Sugar Syrup in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a twist of Lemon and serve.

name: Greyhound #1
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Vodka and Grapefruit Juice in the Glass.

Stir well and serve.

name: Greyhound #2
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Grapefruit Vodka and Grapefruit Juice in the Glass.

Stir well and serve.

name: Greyhound #3
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Vodka, Grapefruit Liqueur and Grapefruit Juice in the Glass.

Stir well and serve.

name: Grinch
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Coconut Rum, Banana Liqueur, Melon Liqueur and a splash of 7-Up in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Grog
instructions:
Combine the Rum, Lime Juice, Brown Sugar and Hot Water in a Coffee Mug.

Stir to mix.

Optionally garnish with a slice of Orange or a stick of Cinnamon and serve.

name: Guardian Angel
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Crown Royal Whisky, then the fill with Cola.

Stir and serve.

name: Gum Drop #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Creme de Cacao Dark and Sambuca to the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Shot Glass and serve.

name: Gum Drop #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Chocolate Liqueur and Sambuca to the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Shot Glass and serve.

name: Gum Drop #3
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Chocolate Liqueur and Black Sambuca to the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Shot Glass and serve.

name: Hairy Navel
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Vodka and Peach Liqueur to the glass.

Fill glass with Orange Juice, stir and serve.

name: Happy New Year
instructions:
Pour Brandy, Port Wine and Orange Juice in a Champagne Flute.

Add the Champagne and stir gently.

Serve.

name: Harry's Pick-Me-Up
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Cognac, Lemon Juice and Grenadine to the Glass.

Stir, top with Champagne and serve.

name: Harvey Wallbanger
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Pour the Vodka in the Glass and fill with Orange Juice.

Stir briskly, float the Galliano on top using the back of a spoon and serve.

name: Hawaiian Orchard
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Orange Vodka, Alize Red Passion, Apricot Liqueur and Pineapple Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, top with a splash of Cranberry Juice, optionally add a slice of of Orange and serve.

name: Headless Horseman
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Vodka, Ginger Ale and Bitters Liqueur to the Glass.

Stir, optionally garnish with a twist of Orange and serve.

name: Hemingway Special
instructions: Pour all ingredients into a shaker with ice. Shake.

name: Highball
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Pour the Whiskey in the Glass and fill with Ginger Ale.

Stir, optionally garnish with a twist of Orange and serve.

name: Hollywood #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Raspberry Liqueur, Triple Sec and a splash of Lime Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Hollywood #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Orange Liqueur and Dry Vermouth in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Honey Martini
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Honey Liqueur, Cointreau and Lemon Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Honeydew Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Melon Liqueur and Triple Sec in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve with a twist of Lemon (optional).

name: Hoochy Mama
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Citrus Vodka, Peach Liqueur, Cointreau, Pineapple and Orange Juices in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, top with a splash of 7-Up, optionally garnish with a twist of Lemon and serve.

name: Horny Bull
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add Tequila, fill with Orange Juice and stir.

Optionally garnish with a slice of Orange and a Cherry and serve.

name: Horse's Neck
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Brandy and Ginger Ale.

Stir gently, optionally garnish with a long spiral of Lemon peal and serve.

name: Hot Apple Pie Cocktail
instructions:
Heat a coffee mug in hot water.

Add Canadian Club, Tuaca and hot Apple Cider to the Glass.

Stir, optionally top with Whipped Cream and Cinnamon, and serve.

name: Hot Apple Pie Shot
instructions:
Get a standard size Shot Glass.

Pour in the Apple Liqueur. Pierce the Apple Liqueur with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Cinnamon Schnapps by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Apple Liqueur.

Optionally add a pinch of Cinnamon and serve.

name: Hot Buttered Rum
instructions:
Take a Coffee Mug and add the Sugar, Butter and Cloves.

Pour in the Rum and stir well. Fill with boiling water.

Stir again, and serve.

name: Hot Shot
instructions:
Get a large Shot Glass.

Pour in the Galliano. Pierce the Galliano with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Coffee by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Galliano. Then do the same with the Cream.

Serve.

name: Houston Texans - Texas Tea
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker with ice.

Combine the Gin, Vodka, Rum, Tequila, Bourbon, Triple Sec and Sweet and Sour in the Shaker. Cover and shake vigorously to combine and chill. Pour the mixture (ice and all) into a Collins Glass.

Add a splash of Cola for the coloring, optionally garnish with Lemon Wedge and serve.

name: Houston Texans - Toro The Bull
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Vodka and Red Bull in the Glass. Top with a splash of Grenadine.

Stir and serve.

name: Hpnotiq Breeze
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Hpnotiq, Coconut Rum, Blue Curacao and Pineapple Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Humgroni
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Hum Hibiscus Liqueur, Gin and Campari in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into a Martini Glass, optioally garnish with a twist of Orange and serve.

name: Hummingbird
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Rum, Banana Liqueur, Coffee Liqueur, Cream of Coconut, Banana and Strawberries to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Rocks Glass and serve.

name: Hurricane #1
instructions:
Fill a Hurricane Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Vodka, Gin, Rum, Amaretto and Triple Sec in the Glass.

Add the Pineapple and Grapefruit Juices, top with Grenadine and serve.

name: Hurricane #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Spiced Rum, Dark Rum, Passion Fruit Juice, Mango Juice and Sweet and Sour in the Shaker.

Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into a Hurricane Glass. Optionally garnish with a slice of Lime or Orange and serve.

name: Hurricane #3
instructions:
Fill a Hurricane Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Vodka, Gin, Rum, Amaretto and Triple Sec in the Glass.

Add the Pineapple and Pink Grapefruit Juices, top with Grenadine and serve.

name: Hurricane Charlie
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Pineapple Juice, Orange Juice, Dark Rum, Alize, Lime Juice, Sugar Syrup and Grenadine in the Shaker. Cover and shake vigorously to combine and chill. Pour the mixture (ice and all) into a Highball Glass.

Optionally garnish with a slice of Pineapple and a Cherry. Serve and enjoy... as you're recovering from those night when you're winning!

name: Hypnotini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Hpnotiq, Coconut Rum and Pineapple Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Hypnotize Me
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Hypnotiq, Vodka, Strawberry and Raspberry Liqueurs in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Illusion
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Melon Liqueur, Triple Sec, Vodka, Lemon and Pineapple Juices in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: In and Out Martini
instructions:
Fill a Martini Glass with ice and and add a splash of Dry Vermouth.

While the Glass chills, fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice and add the Gin to the Shaker.

Shake well, throw away Ice/Vermouth mixure from Martini Glass, strain into the Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a twist of Lemon and serve.

name: Incredible Hulk #1
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Cognac and the Hpnotiq to make a green Incredible Hulk color.

Serve.

name: Incredible Hulk #2
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Cognac and the Hpnotiq to make a green Incredible Hulk color. Add the Pineapple Juice to smoothen it out a bit.

Serve.

name: Indianapolis Colts - Bloody Freeney
instructions:
Fill a Hhighball with cubed ice.

Add the Vodka, Gin, Triple Sec and Bloody Mary Mix to the Glass.

Stir, optionally top with Tonic Water and serve.

name: Indianapolis Colts - Blue Crew Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka and Blue Curacao in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally top with some Club Soda, float a few Blueberries and serve.

name: Indianapolis Colts - Colt 45
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Gin and Jager in the Glass and top with Energy Drink.

Stir and serve.

name: Irish Ale Cocktail
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full with ice.

In a Highball Glass, add Irish Whiskey and squeeze Lime Wedges into Glass.

Fill with ice, top with Ginger Beer, stir and serve.

name: Irish Buck #1
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Pour the Irish Whiskey and Lime Juice over the ice and top with Ginger Ale.

Stir, optionally garnish with a wedge of Lime and serve.

name: Irish Buck #2
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Pour the Irish Whiskey and Lime Juice over the ice and top with Ginger Beer.

Stir, optionally garnish with a wedge of Lime and serve.

name: Irish Cactus
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Irish Cream and Tequila to the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Irish Canadian
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Whiskey and Irish Mist Liqueur in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a slice of Orange and serve.

name: Irish Car Bomb
instructions:
Get a Beer Pilsner and a Shot Glass.

Mix the Irish Cream and the Jameson Irish Whiskey in a Shot glass and drop it in the Guinness.

Serve.

name: Irish Coffee #1
instructions:
Pour Coffee in a Coffee Mug.

Add the Jameson Irish Whiskey and Brown Sugar. Stir to dissolve.

Float cold Cream gently on top and serve. Do not mix.

name: Irish Coffee #2
instructions:
Pour Coffee in a Coffee Mug.

Add the Jameson Irish Whiskey and Brown Sugar. Stir to dissolve.

Float cold Milk gently on top and serve. Do not mix.

name: Irish Coffee Drop
instructions:
Get a Beer Pilsner and a Large Shot Glass.

Mix the Coffee Vodka and Irish Cream in the Shot Glass and drop it in the Guinness.

Serve.

ingredients.genericName: Vincent Van Gogh Double Espresso Vodka
ingredients.brandName: Vincent Van Gogh Double Espresso Vodka

name: Irish Eyes
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Combine the Irish Whiskey, Creme de Menthe Green and Cream in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the Rocks Glass, optionally garnish with a Cherry and serve.

name: Irish Flag #1
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour in the Creme de Menthe Green. Pierce the Creme de Menthe Green with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Irish Cream by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Creme de Menthe Green. Then do the same thing with the Grand Marnier.

Serve. The three flavors of the liqueurs are not the most complimentary but neither are they the worst and some people do like this one for its flavor.

name: Irish Flag #2
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour in the Creme de Menthe Green. Pierce the Creme de Menthe Green with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Irish Cream by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Creme de Menthe Green. Then do the same thing with the Irish Whiskey.

Serve. The three flavors of the liqueurs are not the most complimentary but neither are they the worst and some people do like this one for its flavor.

name: Irish Gold
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Irish Whiskey, Ginger Ale, Peach Liqueur and a splash of Orange Juice to the Glass.

Stir, optionally garnish with a wedge of Orange and serve.

name: Irish Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Pour the Irish Whiskey into the Martini Glass. Swirl around the glass in order to coat the inside and drain the excess Whiskey. Combine the Vodka and Dry Vermouth in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Glass, optionally garnish with a Lemon twist and serve.

name: Irish Mist and Ginger
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Pour Irish Mist Liqueur in over ice and then pour the Ginger Ale over the Irish Mist.

Stir, add a Lime Wedge and serve.

name: Irish Mist and Soda
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Irish Mist Liqueur and Club Soda in the Glass.

Stir well and serve.

name: Irish Mist Coffee
instructions:
Pour Coffee in a Coffee Mug.

Add the Irish Mist Liqueur.

Stir and and serve.

name: Irish Pride
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Amaretto, Creme de Menthe Green and Lemon Juice to the Glass.

Stir, optionally garnish with a wedge of Lemon and serve.

name: Island Tea
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker with ice.

Combine the Rum, Gin, Vodka, Patron Citronge, Tequila, Cranberry, Pineapple, Lemon and Lime Juices in the Shaker. Whew! Cover and shake vigorously to combine and chill. Pour the mixture (ice and all) into the Highball Glass.

Optionally garnish with Lemon Wedge and serve.

name: Italian Apple Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Amaretto, Apple Liqueur, Vanilla Vodka and a splash of Lime and Cranberry Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Italian Coffee
instructions:
Get a Coffee Mug.

Add the Brandy and Amaretto and then fill the mug with Coffee.

Optionally top with a dollop of Whipped Cream and serve.

name: Italian Margarita
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. Rub the rim of a Margarita Glass with Lime Juice. Put the rim of the glass in Sugar and turn glass in a circle until half of the glass or more is rimmed with Sugar.

Combine the Tequila, Triple Sec, and Sweet and Sour in the Shaker. Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into the Margarita Glass.

Top with a shot of Amaretto, optionally garnish with wedges of Lime and Orange, and serve.

name: Italian Stinger
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with crushed ice.

Add the Brandy and the Galliano.

Stir well and serve.

name: Italian Sunset
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Amaretto and then slowly add the Orange Juice. Top with Club Soda to form layers.

Add a dash of Grenadine, optionally garnish with a Cherry or slice of Orange and serve.

name: Jack and Coke
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Jack Daniels, then the fill with Cola.

Stir and serve.

name: Jack and Seven
instructions:
Fill an Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Jack Daniels to the glass and fill with 7-Up.

Stir and serve.

name: Jack Frost
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Rum, Grand Marnier, Lemon Juice and Sugar Syrup in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the Champagne Flute, top with Champagne and serve.

name: Jack Rose
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Apple Brandy, Lemon Juice and a splash of Grenadine in the Shaker.

Shake or stir, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, add a twist of Lemon if desired and serve.

name: Jacksonville Jaguars - Blue Motorcycle
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Tequila, Rum, Vodka, Gin, Blue Curacao, Sweet and Sour and a splash of 7-Up or Sprite to the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Jacksonville Jaguars - Teal Squeal
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Vodka, Blue Curacao and Pineapple Juice to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Hurricane Glass, optionally top with a slice of Pineapple and serve.

name: Jager Shot
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Jager to the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Shot Glass and serve.

name: Jagertini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine equal amounts of Jager, Vodka and Cranberry Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Jamaican Coffee #1
instructions:
Pour Coffee in a Coffee Mug.

Add the Rum and 6 oz of cold Water together. Stir to mix.

Top with the Whipped Cream. Sprinkle with a pinch of well ground coffee and serve with a straw.

name: Jamaican Coffee #2
instructions:
Pour Coffee in a Coffee Mug.

Add the Cream Rum and 6 oz of cold Water together. Stir to mix.

Top with the Whipped Cream. Sprinkle with a pinch of well ground coffee and serve with a straw.

name: Jamaican Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Red Wine, Dark Rum and Orange Bitters in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally add a twist of Orange and serve.

name: Jamaican Ten Speed #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Coconut Rum, Banana Liqueur, Melon Liqueur, Vodka and Cream to the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Jamaican Ten Speed #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Coconut Rum, Banana Liqueur, Melon Liqueur, Vodka and Milk to the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: James Bond Martini
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Vodka and Dry Vermouth Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Glass, optionally garnish with a Lemon twist and serve. Note: a true Vesper Martini (like the James Bond version) is made with Kina Lillet, a brand of dry vermouth made in France. Lillet Blanc (also known as Lillet Blonde), which has a lightly floral citrus flavor, is a typical replacement for Kina Lillet.

name: Jameson and Ginger
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Pour Irish Whiskey over ice and then pour the Ginger Ale over the Irish Whiskey.

Stir, add a Lime Wedge and serve.

name: Japanese Slipper
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Melon Liqueur (Midori if you have it), Cointreau and Lemon Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Glass, optionally garnish with a Cherry and serve.

name: Jaq'ed Up Screwdriver
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Grenadine, Orange Juice and 7-Up or Sprite in the Shaker. Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into a Rocks Glass..

Serve.

name: Jello Shots - Orange
instructions:
Pour the Bacardi Orange Rum into a glass and put it in the freezer for at least one hour. Get 1.5 to 2oz plastic shot glasses with lids (Smart and Final has them). Place about 40 of them on a cutting board and lightly spray the inside with cooking spray.

Boil 8 oz of Water, add the Jello (per the directions) and stir at least 3 minutes to dissolve. Add the Rum from the freezer and stir.

Pour the mixture in the Shot Glasses and cover with the lids. Place in the refrigerator for at least 4 hours.

name: Jello Shots - Sex on the Beach
instructions:
Combine the Vodka and Peach Liqueur in a glass and put it in the freezer for at least one hour. Get 1.5 to 2oz plastic shot glasses with lids (Smart and Final has them). Place about 40 of them on a cutting board and lightly spray the inside with cooking spray.

Boil 8 oz of Water, add 3 oz each (half a standard size box) of the Orange and Cranberry Jello to the water and stir at least 3 minutes to dissolve. Add the Vodka/Peach from the freezer and stir.

Pour the mixture in the Shot Glasses and cover with the lids. Place in the refrigerator for at least 4 hours.

name: Jelly Bean Shooter #1
instructions:
Get a large size Shot Glass.

Pour in the Blackberry Liqueur. Pierce the Blackberry Liqueur with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Sambuca by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Blackberry Liqueur. Then do the same thing with the Southern Comfort.

Serve.

name: Jelly Bean Shooter #2
instructions:
Get a large size Shot Glass.

Pour in the Grenadine. Pierce the Grenadine with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Sambuca by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Grenadine. Then do the same thing with the Southern Comfort.

Serve.

name: Jelly Bean Shooter #3
instructions:
Get a large size Shot Glass.

Pour in the Grenadine. Pierce the Grenadine with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Black Sambuca by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Grenadine. Then do the same thing with the Southern Comfort.

Serve.

name: Jersey Cow
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Pour in the Coffee Liqueur and fill the rest of glass with Milk.

Moo... and serve.

name: John Collins #1
instructions:
Fill a Collins Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Bourbon, Lemon Juice and Sugar Syrup. Fill the glass with Club Soda.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Orange or a Cherry and serve.

name: John Collins #2
instructions:
Fill a Collins Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Bourbon and Sweet and Sour. Fill the glass with Club Soda.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Orange or a Cherry and serve.

name: John Collins #3
instructions: Pour all ingredients directly into highball glass filled with ice. Stir gently. Garnish. Add a dash of Angostura bitters.

name: Journalist
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Triple Sec, Sweet Vermouth, Dry Vermouth, Lime Juice and Bitters in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Juice Cooler
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Combine the Cranberry Juice and Club Soda in the Glass.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Lemon and serve.

name: Juicy Pu$$y
instructions:
Take a shot glass and fill it 3/4 the way full with the Peach Liqueur and then layer Irish Cream on top.

Fill up a Rocks Glass about 1/2 way with the Orange Juice. Take the shot glass with the Peach/Baileys mixture and drop it into the glass of OJ.

Slam it back and check out the taste.

name: June Bug
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Banana Liqueur, Melon Liqueur, Peach Liqueur, Pineapple Juice and Cranberry Juice in a Cocktail Shaker half filled with crushed ice.

Shake, strain into the Glass and serve.

name: Jungle Juice #1
instructions:
Fill a Collins Glass with cubed ice.

Combine the Rum, Fruit Punch and 7-Up or Sprite in the Glass.

Stir, optionally add a slice of Lemon or Lime and serve.

name: Jungle Juice #2
instructions:
Fill a Collins Glass with cubed ice.

Combine the Rum, Hawaiian Punch and 7-Up or Sprite in the Glass.

Stir, optionally add a slice of Lemon or Lime and serve.

name: Just Peachie
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Peach Vodka, Peach Liqueur and a splash of Orange Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Kahlua and Coffee
instructions:
Pour Coffee in a Coffee Mug.

Add Kahlua.

Serve. Easy.

name: Kahlua and Cream
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Kahlua and Cream in the Shaker.

Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into a Rocks Glass, and serve.

name: Kahlua Colada
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Kahlua, Spiced Rum, Pineapple Juice and Cream of Coconut to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Hurricane Glass, optionally garnish with a slice of Pineapple or a Cherry and serve.

name: Kamikaze
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Triple Sec and Lime Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, pour in a chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a slice of Lime and serve.

name: Kamikaze Shooter
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Triple Sec and Lime Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, pour in a shot glass and serve. This is one of those drinks that should be taken in one shot.

name: Kansas City Chiefs - Ice Water
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Gin, Vodka and Lime Juice to the Glass.

Stir, fill glass with 7-Up or Sprite, optionally add a slice of Lime and serve.

name: Kansas City Chiefs - Touchdown Mimosa
instructions:
Pour the Raspberry Liqueur and Orange Juice into a Champagne Flute.

Fill with chilled Champagne.

Stir very gently and serve.

name: Karen Special Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Raspberry Vodka, Triple Sec, Crown Royal and a splash of Lime Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Ke Ke and Coke
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Pour Ke Ke Beach Key Lime Cream Liqueur in the glass and fill with Cola.

Stir and serve.

ingredients.genericName: Ke Ke Beach Key Lime Cream Liqueur
ingredients.brandName: Ke Ke Beach Key Lime Cream Liqueur

name: Kentucky Candy
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Maker's Mark and Peach Liqueur in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Key Lime Pie Martini #1
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Licor 43, Lime Juice and a splash of Cream in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve. Optionally, grind up a graham cracker, rub the rim of the Glass with Lime Juice and coat the rim with the Graham Cracker. Then it really tastes like Key Lime Pie.

name: Key Lime Pie Martini #2
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass with Lime Juice and then dip the glass into sugar (or Lime Sugar if you have it).

Combine the Vanilla Vodka, Triple Sec and Lime Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, (optionally) add a dollop of Whipped Cream on top and serve.

name: Key Lime Pie Martini #3
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Licor 43, Lime Juice and a splash of Milk in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve. Optionally, grind up a graham cracker, rub the rim of the Glass with Lime Juice and coat the rim with the Graham Cracker. Then it really tastes like Key Lime Pie.

name: Key Lime Pie Martini #4
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka,Key Lime Liqueur, Lime Juice and a splash of Milk in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve. Optionally, grind up a graham cracker, rub the rim of the Glass with Lime Juice and coat the rim with the Graham Cracker. Then it really tastes like Key Lime Pie.

name: Kickin' Chicken Shot #1
instructions:
Get a standard size Shot Glass.

Combine the Rum, Bourbon and Tequila in the Glass.

Serve.

name: Kickin' Chicken Shot #2
instructions:
Get a standard size Shot Glass.

Combine the Rum and Bourbon in the Glass.

Serve.

name: King Alphonse
instructions:
Get a Pousse Cafe Glass or some kind of glass good for layering.

Pour in the Coffee Liqueur. Pierce the Coffee Liqueur with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Cream by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Coffee Liqueur.

Serve.

name: Kioke Coffee
instructions:
Get a Coffee Mug.

Add the Brandy and Coffee Liqueur to then fill the mug with Coffee.

Top with a dollop of Whipped Cream and serve.

name: Kioki
instructions:
Pour Coffee in a Coffee Mug.

Add the Coffee Liqueur and Brandy. Stir to mix.

Top with Whipped Cream, garnish with a Cherry and serve.

name: Kir
instructions:
Get a standard size Wine Glass and two thirds full with White Wine.

Add the Creme de Cassis to the Glass.

Stir and Serve.

name: Kir Royale with Vanilla Cognac
instructions:
Get a standard size Wine Glass and two thirds full with Champagne.

Add the Vanilla Cognac and Creme de Cassis to the Glass.

Stir and Serve. Note: you need to add the Champagne first to avoid foaming over.

name: Knickerbocker
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Rum, Cointreau, Lemon Juice and Sugar Syrup in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a couple of Raspberries and serve.

name: Kool Aid Shooter
instructions:
Get a standard size Shot Glass.

Combine the Melon Liqueur and Amaretto in the Glass.

Top with Cranberry Juice and serve.

name: Kool-Aid
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Vodka, Amaretto, Melon Liqueur and Cranberry, Orange and Lime Juice to the Glass.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Lemon and serve.

name: Kremlin Colonel
instructions:
Put Mint Sprigs, Powdered Sugar and 2 tsp of Water in a Collins Glass. Muddle with a muddler or spoon (see our FAQs for a description on muddling).

Fill the glass with crushed ice and add Vodka.

A some Mint Sprigs for a garnish and serve with a straw.

name: Kyoto Cocktail
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Melon Liqueur, Dry Vermouth and Lemon Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: L.A. Iced Tea
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker with ice.

Combine the Vodka, Gin, Rum, Melon Liqueur, Triple Sec, Sugar Syrup and Lime Juice in the Shaker.

Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into a Highball Glass. Top with Club Soda and serve.

name: La Belle Angele
instructions: Combine ingredients and serve.

ingredients.genericName: Lucien Albrecht Crémant dAlsace Brut Rose
ingredients.brandName: Lucien Albrecht Crémant dAlsace Brut Rose

name: La Bomba
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of a Martini Glass with Lemon Juice or water. Put the rim of the glass in the sugar and turn glass in a circle until entire glass is rimmed with sugar.

Combine the Tequila, Orange Liqueur, Orange and Pineapple Juices in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, add a dash of Grenadine, optionally garnish with a slice of Lime and serve.

name: La Paloma
instructions:
Optionally Rub the rim of a Collins Glass with Lime Juice. Put the rim of the glass in Salt and turn glass in a circle until half of the glass or more is rimmed with Salt. Fill the glass with cubed ice.

Add the Tequila, Lime Juice and Grapefruit Juice to the glass and top with the Club Soda.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Lime and serve.

name: Ladyboy
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Irish Cream and Brandy.

Stir, optionally add a stick of Cinnamon, a dash of Nutmeg and serve.

name: Latin Manhattan
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Dark Rum, both Dry and Sweet Vermouth and a splash of Cherry Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally add a dash of Bitters and serve.

name: Lava Flow
instructions:
Blend the Banana, Pineapple Juice and Cream of Coconut in blender and set aside.

Combine the Rum, Coconut Rum and Strawberries in the glass and stir.

Pour Banana/Pineapple/Coconut mix slowly into the glass. The Rum/Strawberry mix should creep up the sides of the glass to make a wonderful looking and tasting tropical cocktail. Serve.

name: Lava Flow Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) add a few fresh Strawberries to the glass.

Combine the Coconut Rum, Rum, Pina Colada Mix and Pineapple Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Left Handed Screwdriver
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add Vodka, Grapefruit Juice, Orange Juice and stir.

Optionally garnish with a slice of Orange and a Cherry and serve.

name: Leg Spreader
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Vodka, Gin, Rum and Tequila to the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Lemon Drop Martini #1
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass with lemon juice and then dip the glass into sugar (or Lemon Sugar if you have it).

Combine the Vodka, Triple Sec, Sugar Syrup and Lemon Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Lemon Drop Martini #2
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass with lemon juice and then dip the glass into sugar (or Lemon Sugar if you have it).

Combine the Vodka, Triple Sec, Sweet and Sour, Lemon Juice and Sugar in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Lemon Drop Martini #3
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass with lemon juice and then dip the glass into sugar (or Lemon Sugar if you have it).

Combine the Citrus Vodka, Lemon Liqueur, Sweet and Sour, Lemon Juice and Sugar in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Lemon Drop Shooter #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. Combine the Citrus Vodka and Sweet and Sour in the Shaker. Stir or shake and strain into the Shot Glass.

Rub a Lemon Wedge on your Left Hand on the webbing between your thumb and forefinger. Put the Sugar on the wet part of your hand. Hold the Lemon Wedge between your thumb and forefinger.

Pick the Shot Glass up with your Right Hand. Lick the Sugar off your Left Hand, quickly drink the Citrus Vodka, and suck on the Lemon Wedge. It's just like doing a Tequila shot but with Vodka and Sugar.

name: Lemon Drop Shot #1
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and fill it with Citrus Vodka.

Rub a Lemon Wedge on your Left Hand on the webbing between your thumb and forefinger. Put the Sugar on the wet part of your hand. Hold the Lemon Wedge between your thumb and forefinger.

Pick the shot glass up with your Right Hand. Lick the Sugar off your Left Hand, quickly drink the Citrus Vodka, and suck on the Lemon Wedge. It's just like doing a Tequila shot but with Vodka and Sugar.

name: Lemon Drop Shot #3
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and fill it with Spiced Rum.

Rub a Lemon Wedge on your Left Hand on the webbing between your thumb and forefinger. Put the Sugar on the wet part of your hand. Hold the Lemon Wedge between your thumb and forefinger.

Pick the Shot Glass up with your Right Hand. Lick the Sugar off your Left Hand, quickly drink the Spiced Rum, and suck on the Lemon Wedge. It's just like doing a Tequila shot but with Rum and Sugar.

name: Lemon Grove
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Citrus Vodka, Lemon Liqueur and a splash of Lemon Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Lemon Meringue Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Citrus Vodka, Lemon Liqueur and Creme de Cacao in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Lemonade Mint Julep
instructions:
Put Mint Sprigs, Powdered Sugar and 2 tsp Water in a Collins Glass. Muddle with a muddler or spoon (see our FAQs for a description on muddling).

Fill the glass with crushed ice and add Lemonade.

A some mint sprigs for a garnish and serve with a straw.

name: Leprechaun
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Irish Whiskey and top with Tonic Water.

Serve.

name: Lethal Weapon
instructions:
Fill a Collins Glass with cubed ice.

Combine the Rum, Vodka, Mountain Dew and a splash of Triple Sec in the Glass.

Stir, optionally garnish with a Cherry and serve.

name: Lime Margarita #1
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Tequila, Triple Sec and Lime Juice to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass with Lime Juice or water and then dip the glass into Margarita Salt.

Pour contents into a Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a Lime Wedge and serve.

name: Lime Margarita #2
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Tequila, Triple Sec and Frozen Limeade to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass with Lime Juice or water and then dip the glass into Margarita Salt.

Pour contents into a Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a Lime Wedge and serve.

name: Lime Rickey
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Bourbon and Lime Juice in the Glass.

Top with Club Soda, optionally add a Lime Wedge and serve.

name: Limon Madras
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Lemon Rum, Orange and Cranberry Juice to the Glass.

Stir gently and serve.

name: Limontini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Lemon Rum, Cointreau, a splash of Sweet and Sour and a splash of Cranberry Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Liquid Carmel
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Irish Cream, Coffee Liqueur and Butterscotch Liqueur in the Shaker.

Shake qucikly, strain into a Highball Glass, top with Milk, stir and serve. Do not serve this drink over ice or warm as it will taste nasty.

name: Liquid Cocaine Shooter
instructions:
Get a Rocks Glass since this shooter is so large. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Amaretto, Bourbon and Pineapple Juice in the Shaker.

Stir or shake, strain into the Glass and serve.

name: Liquid Cocaine Shot #1
instructions:
Get a large size Shot Glass.

Combine the Peppermint Schnapps, Jager and Rum in the Glass.

Serve.

name: Liquid Cocaine Shot #2
instructions:
Get a large size Shot Glass.

Combine the Jager and Sambuca in the Glass.

Serve.

name: Liquid Cocaine Shot #3
instructions:
Get a large size Shot Glass.

Combine the Cinnamon Schnapps, Peppermint Schnapps and Jager in the Glass.

Serve.

name: Liquid Cocaine Shot #4
instructions:
Get a standard size Shot Glass.

Combine the Jager and Cinnamon Schnapps in the Glass.

Serve.

name: Liquid Cocaine Shot #5
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice and get a large size Shot Glass.

Combine the Cinnamon Schnapps, Jager and Rum in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Glass and serve.

name: Liquid Marijuana
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Spiced Rum, Melon Liqueur, Coconut Rum, Blue Curacao, Sweet and Sour and Pineapple Juice to the Glass.

Stir, optionally garnish with an Cherry and serve.

name: Liquid Marijuana Shot
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice and get a large size Shot Glass.

Combine the Spiced Rum, Melon Liqueur, Coconut Rum, Blue Curacao and a splash of Pineapple Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Glass and serve.

name: Liquid Snickers #1
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Creme de Cacao, Irish Cream and Hazelnut Liqueur, stir, and then float the Cream on top.

Stir and serve.

name: Liquid Snickers #2
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Creme de Cacao, Irish Cream and Hazelnut Liqueur, stir, and then float the Milk on top.

Stir and serve.

name: Long Beach Iced Tea
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker with ice.

Combine the Vodka, Gin, Rum, Tequila, Triple Sec, and 7-Up in the Shaker. Cover and shake vigorously to combine and chill. Pour the mixture (ice and all) into the Highball Glass.

Add a splash of Cranberry Juice (instead of Coke) in the glass and serve.

name: Long Cointreaupolitan
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Cointreau, Cranberry and Lime Juice to the Glass.

Stir, top with a splash of 7-Up and serve.

name: Long Island Iced Tea #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker with ice.

Combine the Vodka, Gin, Rum, Tequila, Triple Sec, Sweet and Sour and Lemon Juice in the Shaker. Cover and shake vigorously to combine and chill. Pour the mixture (ice and all) into the Highball Glass.

Add a splash of Cola for the coloring, optionally garnish with Lemon Wedge and serve.

name: Long Island Iced Tea #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker with ice.

Pour the Absolut Citron Vodka, Bacardi Limon Rum, Jose Cuervo Oranjo Tequila, Tanqueray Gin and Cointreau in the Shaker. Cover and roll once to combine and chill. Pour the mixture (ice and all) into the Highball Glass.

Add a splash of Cola for the coloring, garnish with wedge of Lemon and serve. This is a really good Long Island Iced Tea.

name: Long Island Iced Tea #3
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Vodka, Gin, Rum, Triple Sec, Sweet and Sour, and Cola in the Glass and stir.

Add a splash of Lemon Juice, garnish with a Lemon Slice and serve.

name: Long Island Iced Tea #4
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Vodka, Gin, Rum, Tequila, Cointreau and Sweet and Sour in the Glass.

Add a splash of Lemon Juice, some Cola for color, optionally garnish with a wedge of Lemon and serve.

name: Loretto Lemonade
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Whiskey, Melon Liqueur, Lime Juice and Ginger Beer in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into a Highball Glass filled with ice and serve.

name: Love Elixer Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the X-Rated, Vodka, Orange Juice and Pineapple Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Love Potion
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with cracked ice.

Combine the Vodka, Amaretto, Peach Liqueur, Cranberry Juice and Orange Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve with a Strawberry (optional).

name: Lychee Martini #1
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Lychee Liqueur, Cointreau and Lime Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, add a skewer of Lychees if you have some and serve.

name: Lychee Martini #2
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Lychee Vodka, Cointreau and Lime Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, add a skewer of Lychees if you have some and serve.

name: Lynchburg Lemonade
instructions:
Fill a Collins Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Whiskey, Triple Sec and Sweet and Sour to the Glass.

Top with 7-Up, stir well, optionally add a wedge of Lemon and serve.

name: Macadamia Coffee
instructions:
Pour Coffee in a Coffee Mug.

Add Macadamia Liqueur.

Optionally top with Whipped Cream and Cocoa Powder, and serve.

name: Mackinnon
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Drambuie, Rum, Lime Juice and Lemon Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Collins Glass with several ice cubes. Top with Club Soda and serve.

name: Madras
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Vodka, Orange Juice and Cranberry Juice in a Cocktail Shaker half filled with crushed ice.

Shake, strain into the Glass and serve.

name: Mai Tai #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with ice.

Combine the Rum, Almond Syrup, Triple Sec and Sweet and Sour in the Shaker. Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into a Collins Glass.

Garnish with a Cherry and serve. Note: The Almond syrup is REALLY important to make this cocktail right.

name: Mai Tai #2
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Light Rum, then the Gold Rum followed by the Pineapple and Orange Juice. Top with Grenadine and Dark Rum and finish with a splash of Bacardi 151.

Optionally garnish with a slice if Pineapple, a Cherry and serve.

name: Mai Tai #3
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Dark Rum, Rum, Triple Sec, and the Orange, Lemon, Lime and Pineapple Juices in the glass.

OPtionally add a pinch of Sugar, stir well and serve.

name: Mai Tai #4
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Rum, Dark Rum, Coconut Rum, Almond Syrup and Pineapple Juice in the Shaker. Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into a Rocks Glass.

Garnish with a pineapple wedge and serve.

name: Maiden's Blush
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Tequila, Lemon Juice and Grenadine in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Maiden's Prayer
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Cointreau, Orange and Lemon Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Malibu Bay Breeze
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Coconut Rum, Pineapple and Cranberry Juice in the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Malibu Rum and Coke
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Pour Malibu Coconut Rum in the glass and fill with Cola.

Stir and serve.

name: Malibu Rum and Pineapple
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Coconut Rum and Pineapple Juice in the Glass.

Serve. The Malibu adds a coconut flavor making for a pleasant Pina Colada-like drink.

name: Mango and Mint Daiquiri #1
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Spiced Rum, Mango Juice, Lime Juice and Sugar Syrup to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Hurricane Glass, optionally top with Mint Sprigs or a Cherry and serve.

name: Mango and Mint Daiquiri #2
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Mango Rum, Mango Juice, Lime Juice and Sugar Syrup to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Hurricane Glass, optionally top with Mint Sprigs or a Cherry and serve.

name: Mango Mojito #1
instructions:
Squeeze the Lime Wedges into a Highball Glass and add the Mint Sprigs. Muddle with a muddler or the back of a spoon for 30 seconds.

Add the Club Soda, Rum, Sugar Syrup and Mango Juice to the glass.

Stir gently and serve.

name: Mango Mojito #2
instructions:
Squeeze the Lime Wedges into a Highball Glass and add the Mint Sprigs. Muddle with a muddler or the back of a spoon for 30 seconds.

Add the Club Soda, Mango Rum, Sugar Syrup and Mango Juice to the glass.

Stir gently and serve.

name: Mango Mojito #3
instructions:
Squeeze the Lime Wedges into a Highball Glass and add the Mint Sprigs. Muddle with a muddler or the back of a spoon for 30 seconds.

Add the Club Soda, Mango Vodka, Sugar Syrup and Mango Juice to the glass.

Stir gently and serve.

name: Manhattan Dry #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Whiskey, Dry Vermouth and a dash of Bitters in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a twist of Lemon and serve.

name: Manhattan Dry #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Bourbon, Dry Vermouth and Bitters and stir gently. Don't bruise the spirits and cloud the drink. Place a Cherry in a chilled Martini Glass and strain the mixture over the Cherry.

Rub the cut edge of an Orange peel over the rim of the glass and twist it over the drink to release the oils but don't drop it in. Serve.

name: Manhattan Medium #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Whiskey, Dry Vermouth and Sweet Vermouth in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally add twist of Lemon or a Cherry and serve.

name: Manhattan Medium #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Bourbon, Dry Vermouth and Sweet Vermouth in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally add twist of Lemon or a Cherry and serve.

name: Marcy's Easy Breezy
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Lemonade, Raspberry Rum and Triple Sec in the Shaker. Shake and strain into a Collins Glass over cracked ice.

Optionally garnish with a wedge of Lemon and serve.

name: Marcy's Easy Breezy Sunset
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice and a Collins Glass with cracked or cubed ice.

Add Pomegranate Juice to the bottom of the Collins Glass. Combine the Lemonade, Raspberry Rum and Triple Sec in the Shaker. Shake and strain into a Collins Glass letting it settle on the top of the reddish Pomegranate Juice (the sunset).

Optionally garnish with a wedge of Lemon and serve.

name: Martinez
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Dry Vermouth, Triple Sec and Orange Bitters in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a Cherry or a twist of Lemon and serve.

name: Martini Milano #1
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, White Wine, Dry Vermouth and Bitters in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve with a twist of Lemon or Lime (optional).

name: Mary Pickford
instructions: Shake and strain into a chilled large cocktail glass.

name: Matador
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Tequila, Pineapple Juice and Lemon Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Martini Glass and serve.

name: Maui Breeze
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Amaretto, Brandy, Triple Sec, Orange Juice, Guava Juice and Sweet and Sour in the Shaker.

Shake briefly and pour the contents (ice and all) into a Hurricane Glass and serve.

name: Mayan Sacrifice
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full with cubed ice.

Add the Vodka, Coffee Liqueur and Tequila to the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Mayday Martini
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Cinnamon Schnapps and Lemon Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a Strawberry and serve.

name: Melon Ball
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Melon Liqueur and Pineapple Juice.

Shake, strain into the Glass filled with ice, garnish with a slice of Lime and serve with straws.

name: Melon Bomb
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Melon Liqueur, Dark Rum and Orange Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into a Shot Glass and serve.

name: Melontini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Melon Liqueur, a splash of Sweet and Sour and a splash of Pineapple Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Merry Berry Martini
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Pomegranate Juice and Cranberry Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, top with a splash of Club Soda, some Grenadine and serve.

name: Metropolitan
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Cognac and Dry Vermouth in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally add a Cherry and serve.

name: Mexican Coffee #1
instructions:
Pour Coffee in a Coffee Mug.

Add Coffee Liqueur and Coffee and sweeten to taste with Sugar.

Gently float the Whipped Cream on top, optionally sprinkle with Cocoa Powder or Chocolate Shavings and serve.

name: Mexican Coffee #2
instructions:
Pour Coffee in a Coffee Mug.

Add Coffee Liqueur, Tequila and Coffee.

Gently float the Whipped Cream on top, optionally sprinkle with Cocoa Powder or Chocolate Shavings and serve.

name: Mexican Mimosa
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Tequila, Orange Juice and 7-Up or Sprite in the Glass.

Stir and Serve. You can also mix it up in a Pitcher and serve in Champagne Flutes.

name: Mexicana Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Tequila, Lemon Juice, Pineapple Juice and Grenadine in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Miami Dolphins - Blue Dolphin
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Coconut Rum, Spiced Rum, Blue Curacao, Vodka, Lemonade and 7-Up or Sprite in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a slice of Lemon or Orange and serve.

name: Miami Dolphins - Miami Mojito
instructions:
Place Sugar, a large pinch (small handful) of Mint Sprigs and the Lime wedges in a Highball Glass.

Use a muddler to lightly press the Mint and dissolve Sugar until it smells of spearmint gum.Add Rum, stir, and fill with ice.

Top with Club Soda, garnish with Mint Sprigs and serve.

name: Michelada
instructions:
Take a Beer Mug and pour in chilled Clamato Juice.

Add the Beer and slowly stir to mix.

Serve.

name: Midnight Kick
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. Wet the rim of a chilled Shot Glass with the orange slice.

Rim the Shot Glass with Cinnamon on a plate. Add the Tequila to the Shaker, shake well and strain into the chilled Shot Glass.

Slam the shot and then bite into the Orange Slice to finish.

name: Midnight Mint
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Creme de Menthe Green, Irish Cream and Cream in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Martini Glass and serve.

name: Midnight Sun
instructions:
Munchies Recipe: Combine all the ingredients except the grapefruit peel in a cocktail shaker filled with ice and shake vigorously until your arms hurt, 10-20 seconds. Pour through a fine-mesh strainer into an ice-filled rocks glass and garnish with the grapefruit peel.

-Anne Maurseth

name: Midori June Bug
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full with ice.

Combine the Midori, Coconut Rum, Banana Liqueur, Pineapple Juice and Lemon Juice in a Cocktail Shaker half filled with crushed ice.

Shake, strain into the Glass and serve.

name: Midori Margarita
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. Rub the rim of a Margarita Glass with Lime Juice.

Combine the Tequila, Midori and Sweet and Sour in the Shaker. Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into the Margarita Glass.

Serve. Note: Midori Margaritas taste best with a little or no salt on the rim.

name: Midori Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Midori and a splash of Dry Vermouth in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve with a Cherry (optional).

name: Midori Mimosa
instructions:
Pour Midori and Sweet and Sour into a Champagne Flute.

Fill almost to the top with Champagne.

Serve.

name: Midori Sour #1
instructions:
Fill a Collins Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Midori and Sweet and Sour.

Stir and serve.

name: Midori Sour #2
instructions:
Fill a Collins Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Midori, Sweet and Sour and 7-Up.

Stir and serve.

name: Mike Romanoff
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Cointreau, Apricot Liqueur, Lime Juice and Bitters in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Milk Chocolate Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass in water and then dip the glass into Chocolate Sugar or cocoa. Also optional, swirl some Chocolate Syrup around the inside of the glass.

Add the Vanilla Vodka and Creme de Cacao Dark to the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Milky Way Martini
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Cream Liqueur, Chocolate Vodka and Cream in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Mind Eraser #1
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Coffee Liqueur and Vodka and then slowly add the Tonic Water. It should form three layers.

Serve. To drink, keep the straw at the bottom of the drink. Start drinking and don't stop until you're done. As you go through the different liquids, you get different flavors. First you taste Coffee, then Vodka and then the Tonic Water refreshes your palate. At the end, you'll have an aftertaste of Chocolate Milk!

name: Mind Eraser #2
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Coffee Liqueur and Vodka to the Glass. Slowly add the 7-Up. It should form three layers.

Serve. To drink, keep the straw at the bottom of the drink. Start drinking and don't stop until you're done. As you go through the different liquids, you get different flavors. First you taste Coffee, then Vodka and then the 7-Up refreshes your palate. At the end, you'll have an aftertaste of Chocolate Milk!

name: Mind Eraser #3
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Coffee Liqueur, Vodka and a splash of Butterscotch Liqueur to the Glass. Slowly add the 7-Up. It should form three layers.

Serve. To drink, keep the straw at the bottom of the drink. Start drinking and don't stop until you're done. As you go through the different liquids, you get different flavors. First you taste Coffee, then Vodka and then the 7-Up refreshes your palate. At the end, you'll have an aftertaste of Chocolate Milk!

name: Minnesota Vikings - Purple Kamikaze
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Raspberry Liqueur and Lime Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into a Shot Glass and serve.

name: Minnesota Vikings - Purple Viking
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add Southern Comfort, Blue Curacao, Blueberry Liqueur, Sloe Gin, Sweet and Sour and Lime Juice.

Stir well, top with a splash of 7-Up or Sprite and serve.

name: Mint Daiquiri
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Rum, Lime Juice, Mint Sprigs and Powdered Sugar to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Rocks Glass and serve.

name: Mistletoe Mojito
instructions:
Place Sugar, a large pinch (small handful) of Mint Sprigs and splash of Lime Juice in a Highball Glass.

Use a muddler to lightly press the Mint and dissolve Sugar until it smells of spearmint gum. Add Rum amd Pomegranate Juice, stir, and fill with ice.

Top with 7-Up, garnis with Mint Sprig and serve.

name: Mixed Berry Mojito
instructions:
Place Mint Sprigs, Blackberries, Blueberries, Raspberries and Strawberries in a Highball Glass.

Use a muddler to lightly press the contents together to get as much juice as possible from them. Add Rum, stir, and fill with ice.

Optionally garnish with Mint Sprig or the berries and serve.

name: Mock Margarita
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Margarita Mix to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass with Lime Juice or water and then dip the glass into Margarita Salt.

Pour contents into a Margarita Glass, optionally garnish with a Lime Wedge and serve.

name: Mock Mojito
instructions:
Place Sugar, a large pinch (small handful) of Mint Sprigs and splash of Club Soda in a Highball Glass.

Use a muddler to lightly press the Mint and dissolve Sugar until it smells of spearmint gum. Add Lime Juice into the glass (or squeeze both halves of a Lime and leave one hull in the mixture). Stir and fill with ice.

Top with Club Soda, garnish with Mint Sprig and serve.

name: Mojave Cactus Juice
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Coconut Rum, Melon Liqueur, Banana Liqueur and a splash of Pineapple Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Mojito #1
instructions:
Place Sugar, a large pinch (small handful) of Mint Sprigs and splash of Club Soda in a Highball Glass.

Use a muddler to lightly press the Mint and dissolve Sugar until it smells of spearmint gum. Add Lime Juice into the glass (or squeeze both halves of a Lime and leave one hull in the mixture). Add Rum, stir, and fill with ice.

Top with Club Soda, garnish with Mint Sprig and serve.

name: Mojito #2
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full with ice.

Add Rum and Mojito Mix.

Top with Club Soda, optionally garnish with Mint Sprigs and serve.

name: Money Shot
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Amaretto, Irish Cream and Melon Liqueur in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Glass and serve.

name: Monkey Gland
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Absinthe, Orange Juice and Grenadine in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a slice of Orange or a Cherry and serve.

name: Monkey Spunk Shot
instructions:
Get a standard size Shot Glass.

Fill shot glass about 3/4 full with Irish Cream and the rest of way with Butterscotch Liqueur.

Serve.

name: Monkey's Lunch #1
instructions:
Fill a Martini Glass with cracked ice.

Pour Banana Liqueur and Coffee Liqueur and the add Milk.

Stir and serve.

name: Monkey's Lunch #2
instructions:
Fill a Martini Glass with cracked ice.

Pour Banana Liqueur and Coffee Liqueur and the add Cream.

Stir and serve.

name: Moonraker
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Tequila, Blue Curacao and Pineapple Juice to the Glass.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Pineapple and serve.

name: Morgan and Coke
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Captain Morgan Spiced Rum, then the fill with Cola.

Stir and serve.

name: Moulin Rouge
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Tequila, Cointreau, Agave Nectar and Strawberry Daiquiri Mix in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a Strawberry and serve.

name: Mudslide  #1
instructions:
Chill a Highball Glass prior to mixing.

Combine the Vodka, Coffee Liqueur and Irish Cream in the Glass.

Serve with a straw if possible.

name: Mudslide #2
instructions:
Chill a Highball Glass prior to mixing.

Add the Irish Cream first, then the Coffee Liqueur (Tia Maria if you have it) and lastly (and slowly) fill the rest of the glass up with the Cola.

It will fizz somewhat so be ready for that. Serve with a straw if possible.

name: Mudslide #3
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Irish Cream, Vodka and Chocolate Liqueur to the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Mudslide Shot
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour the Coffee Liqueur into the Shot Glass. Pierce the Coffee Liqueur with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Irish Cream by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Coffee Liqueur. Then do the same thing with the Vodka.

Serve.

name: Negroski
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Campari and Sweet Vermouth in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Neon
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Blue Curacao and Creme de Menthe in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: New England Patriots - Boston Sidecar
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Rum, Brandy, Triple Sec and Lime Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: New England Patriots - Cape Cod
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Vodka and Cranberry Juice.

Garnish with a wedge of Lime and serve.

name: New England Patriots - Ward Eight
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Whiskey, Lemon Juice, Orange Juice and Grenadine in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Martini Glass filled with cracked ice and serve.

name: New Orleans Saints - Hurricane
instructions:
Fill a Hurricane Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Rum, Dark Rum, Pineapple Juice, Orange Juice, Lime Juice, Sugar Syrup and Grenadine to the Glass.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice or Orange or Cherry and serve.

name: New Orleans Saints - Sazerac
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice and let it sit to chill while preparing the rest of the drink.

In a separate mixing glass, muddle the Sugar Syrup and Bitters together. Add the Whiskey and ice to the bitters mixture and stir.

Discard the ice in the chilled glass and rinse it with Absinthe by pouring a small amount into the glass, swirling it around and discarding the liquid. Strain the Whiskey mixture from the mixing glass into the Rocks Glass. Optionally garnish with a twist of Lemon and serve.

name: New Orleans Saints - Storm of the Century
instructions:
Fill a Hurricane Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Gin, Vodka, Rum, Dark Rum, Coconut Rumm Triple Sec, Raspberry Liqueur (Chambord if you have it) and Orange Juice in the Glass.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Orange and a Cherry and serve.

name: New York Giants - Bronx Cocktail
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Dry Vermouth, Sweet Vermouth and Orange Juice in the Shaker.

Shake or stir, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: New York Giants - Jack Rose
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Whiskey, Lemon Juice, Sugar and Grenadine in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a twist of Lemon and serve.

name: New York Giants - Red Giant
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Grapefruit Vodka, Maraschino Liqueur, Pomegranate Juice and Lemon Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into a Martini Glass and serve.

name: New York Jets - Big Apple Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Apple Vodka, Melon Liqueur and Sweet and Sour in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: New York Jets - Bronx Cocktail
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Dry Vermouth, Sweet Vermouth and Orange Juice in the Shaker.

Shake or stir, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: New York Jets - Jet Pilot
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Rum, Bacardi 151 Rum, Dark Rum, Grapefruit Juice, Lime Juice, Cinnamon and (optionally) Bitters Liqueur to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Hurricane Glass, optionally top with a Cherry and serve.

name: New Yorker
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Bourbon, Lime Juice and Grenadine to the Glass. Top with Club Soda.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Orange or a Cherry and serve.

name: Nixon
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Whiskey, Sloe Gin and Bitters in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the Martini Glass filled with ice, optionally garnish with a slice of Peach or a Cherry and serve.

name: Nogasake
instructions:
Pour Sake in an Rocks Glass.

Add the Eggnog.

Stir and serve.

name: Not So Dark and Stormy
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Pour the Lime Juice and Honey (or Molasses) into the Glass and add the Ginger Beer.

Stir, optionally garnish with a wedge of Lime and serve. Note: Ginger Beer has no more beer in it than Ginger Ale has Ale, but it tastes a lot more lively.

name: Nuclear Iced Tea
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Rum, Gin, Tequila, Orange Liqueur and Melon Liqueur in Cocktail Shaker half filled with crushed ice.

Shake, strain into the Glass and serve.

name: Nuts and Berries #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Raspberry Liqueur (Chambord if you have it), Hazelnut Liqueur and Milk in the Shaker.

Shake, pour the contents (ice and all) into a Martini Glass and serve.

name: Nuts and Berries #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Grand Marnier, Coffee Liqueur, Irish Cream and Half and Half in the Shaker.

Shake, pour the contents (ice and all) into a Rocks Glass and serve.

name: Nuts and Berries #3
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Grand Marnier, Coffee Liqueur, Irish Cream and Milk in the Shaker.

Shake, pour the contents (ice and all) into a Rocks Glass and serve.

name: Nuts and Berries Shot #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Hazelnut Liqueur and Irish Cream in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Shot Glass and serve.

name: Nuts and Berries Shot #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Raspberry Liqueur (Chambord if you have it), Hazelnut Liqueur and Irish Cream in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Shot Glass and serve.

name: Nutty Irishman  #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Hazelnut Liqueur, Irish Cream and Cream in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Martini Glass and serve.

name: Nutty Irishman  #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Hazelnut Liqueur, Irish Cream and Milk in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Martini Glass and serve.

name: Nutty Irishman Shot
instructions:
Get a large size Shot Glass.

Pour the Hazelnut Liqueur first and then pour Irish Cream down the side of the glass to create a layering effect. Do not mix.

Serve.

name: Nutty Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka and Hazelnut Liqueur in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, garnish with a twist of Lemon (optional) and serve.

name: Oakland Raiders - Raiders Revenge
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Patron Silver Tequila, Bacardi Black Rum and Cola to the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Oakland Raiders - Silver and Black
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour the Cinnamon Schnapps in a Shot Glass. Pierce the Cinnamon Schnapps with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Blavod Black Vodka by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Cinnamon Schnapps.

Optionally add a dollop of Whipped Cream, a Cherry and serve.

name: Oatmeal Cookie Shot #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Irish Cream, Butterscotch Liqueur and Cinnamon Schnapps in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Shot Glass and serve.

name: Oatmeal Cookie Shot #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Irish Cream, Coffee Liqueur and Cinnamon Schnapps in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Shot Glass and serve.

name: One-900-Fuk-MeUp
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Kurant Vodka, Coconut Rum, Amaretto, Orange Liqueur, Raspberry Liqueur, Melon Liqueur, Cranberry and Pineapple Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Rocks Glass full of ice and serve.

name: Oral Sex on the Beach #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with ice.

Combine the Vodka, Melon Liqueur, Raspberry Liqueur and Orange Juice in the Shaker. Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into a Highball Glass.

Garnish with a Cherry and serve.

name: Oral Sex on the Beach #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with ice.

Combine the Vodka, Peach Liqueur, Blue Curacao and Pineapple Juice in the Shaker. Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into a Highball Glass.

Serve.

name: Orange Blossom
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Sweet Vermouth, Orange Juice and Sugar in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into a Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a slice of Orange and serve.

name: Orange Daiquiri #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Rum, Orange Juice, Lime Juice and Sugar Syrup in the Shaker.

Shake briefly and pour the contents (ice and all) into a Hurricane Glass and serve.

name: Orange Daiquiri #2
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.
