Add the Rum, Frozen Orange Juice, Lime Juice and Sugar Syrup to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Hurricane Glass, optionally garnish with a wedge of Orange and serve.

name: Orange Fizz
instructions:
Fill a Collins Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Orange Juice, Tonic Water and Lemon Juice.

Stir and serve.

name: Orange Monk
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Benedictine and Grand Marnier in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into a Martini Glass and serve.

name: Orgasm
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Cointreau, Irish Cream and Grand Marnier to the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Ouzo Cocktail
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Ouzo to to the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Glass and serve. It is very strong straight so the ice metling in the Shaker dillutes it with Water.

name: Painkiller
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Combine the Dark Rum, Cream of Coconut, Pineapple Juice and Orange Juice to the glass.

Stir well, optionally add a dash of Nutmeg and a Cherry, and serve.

name: Panty Dropper
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Coconut Vodka, Creme de Cassis, Alize and a splash of Pineapple Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a slice of Orange or a Cherry and serve.

name: Paradise
instructions: Shake together over ice. Strain into cocktail glass and serve chilled.

name: Paradise Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin and Apricot Liqueur in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Paralyzer #1
instructions:
Pour Tequila, Vodka and Coffee Liqueur over ice in a Collins Glass.

Slowly add Cream and then top with Cola.

Serve with a straw.

name: Paralyzer #2
instructions:
Pour Tequila, Vodka and Coffee Liqueur over ice in a Collins Glass.

Slowly add Milk and then top with Cola.

Serve with a straw.

name: Park Avenue
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Sweet Vermouth and Pineapple Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Parrot Bay Key Lime Mojito
instructions:
Place a large pinch (small handful) of Mint Sprigs and splash of Club Soda in a Highball Glass.

Use a muddler to lightly press the Mint until it smells of spearmint gum. Add Captain Morgan Parrot Bay Key Lime, stir, and fill with ice.

Top with Club Soda, garnish with Mint Sprigs and serve.

ingredients.genericName: Captain Morgan Parrot Bay Key Lime
ingredients.brandName: Captain Morgan Parrot Bay Key Lime

name: Party Girl
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Combine the Kurant Vodka, Raspberry Liqueur and Cranberry Juice in the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Passion
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with a couple of cubes of ice.

Add the Rum and Passion Fruit Juice.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Lemon and serve.

name: Passion Punch
instructions:
Pour X-Rated Fusion Liqueur in a Champagne Flute.

Add Fruit Vodka and Passion Fruit Juice.

Stir, top with Champagne and serve.

name: Passionate Cosmo
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, X-Rated, and a splash each of Orange and Cranberry Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Peach Beamer
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Peach Vodka, Bourbon and a dash of Grenadine in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Peach Daiquiri
instructions:
Add one cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Peach Liqueur, Rum, Peach Juice and Peach (preferably frozen) to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Highball Glass and serve.

name: Peach Flambe
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Peach Liqueur, Orange Liqueur, Orange Juice and Grenadine in the Shaker. Pour mixture in a large Shot Glass. Float the Bacardi 151 on top and light with a Match or Lighter.

Serve, extinguish the flame and drink. Note: Do not use too much Grenadine as doing so will produce a pink or reddish color rather than the desired peach color. ALWAYS USE CAUTION WHEN FIRE IS INVOLVED!

name: Peach Mimosa
instructions:
Pour Peach Liqueur into a Champagne Flute.

Fill almost to the top with Champagne and top off with the Orange Juice.

Serve.

name: Peachy Keen
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Amaretto, Peach Liqueur and Orange Juice.

Stir and serve.

name: Peachy Keen Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Orange Vodka, Peach Liqueur and Pineapple Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well and strain into the chilled Martini Glass. Slowly add the Grenadine and it will sink to the bottom. Float the Orange Liqueur on top and serve.

name: Peanut Butter and Jelly Shooter
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Hazelnut and Raspberry Liqueurs in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the Shot Glass and serve.

name: Pear Pleasure
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Pear Vodka, Lemon Liqueur and Apple Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, add a splash of Club Soda and serve.

name: Pearl Harbor
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Combine the Melon Liqueur, Vodka and Pineapple Juice in the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Pearl Plum Martini
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Pearl Plum Vodka, Plum Liqueur and Pineapple Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Martini Glass and serve.

name: Pearl Plum Saketini
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Pearl Plum Vodka, Sake and Pineapple Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Martini Glass and serve.

name: Pegu
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Cointreau and Lime Juice in the Shaker. Optionally add a splash of Bitters.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Pendennis
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Apricot Liqueur, Lime Juice and Bitters Liqueur in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Peppermint Froth
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Vodka, Peppermint Schnapps, Sugar Syrup and Cream to the Shaker.

Shake vigorously until the outside of the shaker is frosted and beaded with sweat. Strain into Rocks Glass filled with crushed ice and serve. Garnish with candy cane or peppermint patty if you have one.

name: Peppermint Patty #1
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Creme de Cacao White, Creme de Menthe White, Creme de Cacao Dark and Cream to the glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Peppermint Patty #2
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Creme de Cacao White, Peppermint Schnapps, Creme de Cacao Dark and Cream to the glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Peppermint Patty Martini
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Chocolate Liqueur, Peppermint Schnapps and Cream in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Martini Glass and serve.

name: Peppermint Patty Shot
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Creme de Cacao White, Peppermint Schnapps and Cream to the Shaker.

Stir or shake, strain into the Shot Glass and serve.

name: Perfect Manhattan
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Whiskey, Dry Vermouth and Sweet Vermouth in the Shaker.

Shake or stir, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, add some Bitters, a Cherry or a twist of Lemon if desired and serve.

name: Perfect Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Dry Vermouth and Sweet Vermouth in the Shaker.

Shake or stir, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, add some Bitters, Green Olives or a twist of Lemon if desired and serve.

name: Perfect Rob Roy
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Scotch, Sweet Vermouth and Dry Vermouth in the Shaker.

Shake or stir, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, add some Bitters, a Cherry or a twist of Lemon if desired and serve.

name: Periodista
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Rum, Apricot Liqueur, Triple Sec and Lime Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Peru Libre
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Pisco, Cola and Lime Juice to the Glass.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Lime and serve.

name: Philadelphia Eagles - Cactus Jack
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Tequila, Blue Curacao, Orange Juice, Pineapple Juice and Lemon Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Philadelphia Eagles - Eagle Eye
instructions:
Add a shot Vodka in the glass and then add Orange Juice until it's about half full.

Add the Vodka, Fruit Liqueur, Cranberry Juice and Orange Juice to the Glass.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Lime and serve.

name: Pimms and Ginger
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Combine the Pimms, Ginger Beer and Lemonade in the glass.

Stir, optionally add a slice of Lemon, Orange or a Strawberry and serve.

name: Pimms Cup
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Pimms and fill glass with Ginger Ale.

Stir, optionally add a slice of Lemon and serve.

name: Pina Colada #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with ice.

Combine the Coconut Rum, Pineapple Juice, Milk and Pineapple in the Shaker. Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into a Highball Glass.

Garnish with a slice of Pineapple and Serve.

name: Pina Colada #2
instructions:
Add one cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Rum, Pineapple Juice, Pina Colada Mix and Pineapple pieces (optional) to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Highball Glass, optionally garnish with a wedge of Pineapple and serve.

name: Pina Colada #3
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with ice.

Combine the Coconut Rum, Pineapple Juice, Cream and Pineapple in the Shaker. Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into a Highball Glass.

Garnish with a slice of Pineapple and Serve.

name: Pina Colada #4
instructions:
Add one cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Rum, Pineapple Juice and Cream of Coconut to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Highball Glass, optionally garnish with a wedge of Pineapple and serve.

name: Pina Colada Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Coconut Rum, Vodka, Rum and a splash of Pineapple Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a slice of Pineapple and serve.

name: Pineapple Daiquiri
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Rum, Pineapple, Lime Juice and Powdered Sugar to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Champagne Flute and serve.

name: Pineapple Dream
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Coconut Rum, Butterscotch Liqueur and Pineapple Juice to the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Pineapple Fizz
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Rum, Pineapple Juice and Sugar to the Glass. Top with Club Soda.

Stir and serve.

name: Pineapple Upside Down Cake #1
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Vanilla Vodka to the Glass followed by the Pineapple Juice. Add a splash of Grenadine and allow it to settle in the bottom of the Glass.

Garnish with a slice of Pineapple or a Cherry and serve.

name: Pineapple Upside Down Cake #2
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Butterscotch Liqueur, Vodka, Irish Cream and Pineapple Juice in the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Pineapple Upside Down Cake Shooter
instructions:
Chill a Shot Glass in the freezer for a few minutes and then fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Pineapple Juice and Vanilla Vodka in the Shaker. Stir or shake and strain into the Shot Glass. Add a splash of Grenadine and let it settle to the bottom.

Serve.

name: Pink Cotton Cosmo
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Cotton Candy Liqueur, Lemon Juice, Lime Juice, Cranberry Juice and Sugar Syrup in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Pink Elephant
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass in water and then dip the glass into Sugar.

Combine the Cotton Candy Liqueur, Vodka, Guava Juice and Sugar Syrup in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Pink Gin
instructions:
Pour the Bitters into a Martini Glass.

Swirl the glass to coat the inside with the Bitters and shake out the excess.

Pour the Gin the Glass, add a little cold water to taste and serve.

name: Pink Lady
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Grenadine, Cream and Egg White in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Pink Lemonade
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Raspberry Liqueur and Sweet and Sour in the Shaker.

Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into a Rocks Glass, optionally a wedge of Lemon and serve.

name: Pink Russian #1
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Coffee Liqueur, Tequila Rose, Vodka and a splash of Milk to the Glass.

Stir gently and serve.

name: Pink Russian #2
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Coffee Liqueur, Tequila Rose, Vodka and a splash of Cream to the Glass.

Stir gently and serve.

name: Pink Squirrel
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Amaretto, Creme de Cacao White, Cream and a splash of Grenadine (mainly for color) in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve. Note the original recipe calls for Creme de Noyaux which is very hard to find but Amaretto has a similar almond flavor.

name: Pink Star
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Passion Fruit Rum, Coconut Rum, Southern Comfort, Pineapple Juice and a splash of Grenadine in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, add a splash of 7-Up or Sprite and serve.

name: Pisco Sour
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Pisco, Lime Juice, Sugar Syrup and Egg White in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Whiskey Sour Glass, add Bitters on top of the foam and serve.

name: Pittsburg Steelers - Black and Gold
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Blavod Black Vodka and Goldschlager in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Pittsburg Steelers - Steel Helmet
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the drink.

Add the Vodka, Coffee Liqueur and Milk. Stir.

Pierce the mixture with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Galliano by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the drink. Serve.

name: Pittsburgh Steelers - Bavod Screwdriver
instructions:
Add the Orange Juice to a Highball Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the drinks.

Pierce the Orange Juice with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Blavod Black Vodka by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Orange Juice.

Serve with a straw for stirring.

name: Planters Punch
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Dark Rum, Orange, Pineapple and Lime Juices in the Shaker. Shake and strain into a Collins glass filled with ice.

Top with Grenadine, optionally garnish with an Orange slice and a Cherry, and serve.

name: Polar Bear
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Creme de Menthe White, Creme de Cacao White and Cream in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Martini Glass and serve.

name: Polar Bear Shot
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Creme de Cacao White and Peppermint Schnapps in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Glass and serve. Tastes like a Peppermint Patty.

name: Pomegranate Martini #1
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Pomegranate Liqueur and Cranberry Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Pomegranate Martini #2
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Orange Liqueur along with a splash each of Pomegranate Juice and Tonic Water in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a wedge of Lemon and serve.

name: Pomegranate Martini #3
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Citrus Vodka, Cointreau, Pomegranate Juice and a splash of Lemon Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a wedge of Lemon or Orange and serve.

name: Pomegranate Martini #4
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Pomegranate Juice, Triple Sec and a splash of Lime Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a wedge of Orange and serve.

name: Pomegranate Martini #5
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Pomegranate Vodka, Pomegranate Liqueur and Cranberry Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Pomegranate Mojito
instructions:
Add the Sugar, Lime Juice and Mint Sprigs into a Highball Glass. Muddle with a muddler or the back of a spoon for 30 seconds.

Add the Rum and Pomegranate Juice and top with Club Soda.

Stir gently and serve.

name: Pomegranate Raspberry Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Lemon-Raspberry Vodka, Pomegranate Juice and Lemon Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Porto Flip
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Brandy, Port and an Egg Yolk in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Pousse Cafe
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour in the Grenadine. Pierce the Grenadine with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Creme de Cassis by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Grenadine. Then do the same thing with the Chartreuse Green, Chartreuse Yellow, Creme de Menthe and finally the Brandy.

You MUST add them in the order above to properly layer it. Serve.

name: Power Screwdriver
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Pour Vodka into the Glass, and then add Orange Juice and Cola to taste.

Stir and serve.

name: Prado
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Tequila, Maraschino Liqueur, Lime Juice and Grenadine to the Glass.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Lemon and serve.

name: Prairie Fire Shot
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and fill it with Tequila.

Add a few drops of Tabasco Sauce to taste.

Serve. Suck on the Lime to cool off your tongue.

name: Presbyterian
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add Bourbon and fill glass with Club Soda.

Top with 7-Up and serve.

name: Prickly Pear Shot
instructions:
Get a standard size Shot Glass.

Combine the Tequila and Cactus Juice Liqueur in the Glass.

Serve.

name: Prince Edward
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin and Drambuie in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve with a twist of Lemon (optional).

name: Princess
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass in water and then dip the glass into Sugar.

Combine the Lemon Vodka, Cranberry Juice, 7-Up or Sprite and Sweet and Sour and Sweet and Sour in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Pumpkin Margarita
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Tequila, Pumpkin Liqueur and Triple Sec to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass with Lime Juice or water and then dip the glass into Margarita Salt.

Pour contents into a Margarita Glass and serve.

name: Purple Hooter
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Raspberry Liqueur and Pineapple Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Martini Glass and serve.

name: Purple Hooter Shooter
instructions:
Get a large size Shot Glass.

Combine the Vodka, Lime Juice and Raspberry Liqueur in the Glass.

Serve.

name: Purple Hooter Shot
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Raspberry Liqueur, Triple Sec and Vodka in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Glass and serve.

name: Purple Lust
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Raspberry Vodka, Chambord, Blue Curacao, Cranberry Juice and a splash of Grand Marnier in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Purple Nipple Shooter
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice and chill a large shot glass in the freezer.

Combine the Jager, Melon Liqueur, Cranberry and Orange Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Glass and serve.

name: Purple Nurple
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Coconut Rum, Triple Sec, Blue Curacao and Cranberry Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Purple Nurple Shooter
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice and chill a shot glass in the freezer.

Combine the Vodka, Blue Curacao, Apple Liqueur, Sweet and Sour and Grenadine in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Glass and serve.

name: Purple Rain #1
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add Gin and then the Cranberry Juice. Add a splash of Blue Curacao, Club Soda and Sweet and Sour mix. Shake or stir gently.

Add more Curacao for correct color (should be Royal Purple) and serve.

name: Purple Rain #2
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Combine the Gin, Vodka, Rum, Triple Sec, Tequila and Raspberry Liqueur in the Glass. Top off the Glass with Sweet and Sour and serve.

Garnish with lemon or lime twist and serve. This is basically a Long Island with Chambord instead of Coke.

name: Purple Rain Shooter
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice and chill a shot glass in the freezer.

Combine the Vodka, Blue Curacao and Cranberry Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Glass and serve.

name: Q Berry
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Lemon Rum and Cranberry Juices to the Glass.

Stir gently and serve.

name: Quaalude #1
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Coffee Liqueur, Hazelnut Liqueur, Vodka and a splash of Milk to the Glass.

Stir gently and serve.

name: Quaalude #2
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Coffee Liqueur, Hazelnut Liqueur, Vodka and a splash of Cream to the Glass.

Stir gently and serve.

name: Quick Fuk
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour in the Irish Cream. Pierce the Irish Cream with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Melon Liqueur by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Irish Cream. Then do the same thing with the Brandy and finally the Coffee Liqueur.

You MUST add them in the order above to properly layer it. Serve and drink slowly.

name: Ramos Fizz
instructions:
All ingredients except the soda are poured in a mixing glass, dry shaken (no ice) for two minutes, then ice is added and shaken hard for another minute.

Strained into a highball glass without ice and topped with soda.

name: Raspberry Bellini
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker and put 4 Raspberries in it along with a sphash of water. User a muddler or a spoon to mash the Raspberries to make a puree.

Add the Vodka to the Shaker and shake to mix. Pour the contents into a Wine Glass or Champagne Flute and top with Champagne.

Optionally garnish with some Raspberries and serve.

name: Raspberry Cheesecake
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Creme de Cacao White, Black Raspberry Liqueur, Cream Cheese and Vanilla Ice Cream to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Parfait Glass and serve.

name: Raspberry Daiquiri
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Chambord, Rum, Lime Juice and Powdered Sugar to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Martini Glass, optionally garnish with Raspberries and Strawberries and serve.

name: Raspberry Lemon Drop
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Raspberry Liqueur, Cranberry and Lemon Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Raspberry Margarita
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Tequila, Orange Liqueur, Raspberry Liqueur, Lime Juice and (optionally) some Raspberries to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass with Lime Juice or water and then dip the glass into Margarita Salt.

Pour contents into a Margarita Glass, optionally garnish with a Lime Wedge and serve.

name: Raspberry Red
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Raspberry Vodka, Red Bull and a splash if Grenadine (for color) to the Glass.

Serve.

name: Raspberry Torte
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass in water and then dip the glass into Raspberry Sugar. (Optionally) add a few fresh Raspberries to the glass.

Combine the Raspberry Vodka and Chambord in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Red Bull and Vodka
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Vodka and Red Bull in the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Red Death
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Vodka, Bourbon, Amaretto, Sloe Gin and Triple Sec to the Glass. Fill the glass with Orange Juice and add a dash of Lime Juice.

Stir and serve. This is a actually a combination of a Kamikaze and an Alabama Slammer.

name: Red Death Shooter
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Bourbon, Amaretto, Sloe Gin, Triple Sec and Orange Juice in the Shaker. This is essentially a Kamikaze and an Alabama Slammer mixed together (the easiest way to tell a bartender how to make it). It should taste just like Hawaiian Punch when done correctly.

Shake, strain into the Glass and serve. With so many ingredients you may want to make a large batch.

name: Red Devil
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Sloe Gin, Amaretto, Bourbon, Triple Sec, Lime and Orange Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, pour the contents (ice and all) into a Highball Glass and serve.

name: Red Eye
instructions:
Fill glass 3/4 full with Beer.

Add the Vodka and top with Tomato Juice.

Serve.

name: Red Eyed Clam
instructions:
Take a Beer Mug and pour in chilled Clamato Juice.

Add the Beer and slowly stir to mix.

Serve.

name: Red Headed Slut Shooter #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Jager, Peach Liqueur and Cranberry Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Glass and serve. This is the original and most people's favorite Red Headed Slut.

name: Red Headed Slut Shooter #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Jager, Vodka and nice splash of Cranberry Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Glass and serve.

name: Red Manhattan
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Jim Beam Red Stag Infused Bourbon, Dry and Sweet Vermouth in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally add a Cherry or Black Cherry and serve.

name: Red Russian
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with ice.

Combine the Vodka and Cherry Liqueur in the Shaker.

Shake or stir, strain into a Wine Glass and serve.

name: Red Snapper Shooter
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Amaretto, Whiskey and Cranberry Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into several shot glasses and serve.

name: Red Stag Cherry Fizz
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Pour the Jim Beam Red Stag Infused Bourbon, 7-Up and a splash of Grenadine in the glass.

Stir, optionally garnish with a Cherry and serve.

name: Redline
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Vodka and Energy Drink in the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Remsen Cooler
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Scotch and top with Club Soda.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Lemon and serve.

name: René Angélil
instructions:
Combine the bourbon, Amaro, bitters, and lime juice in an ice-filled mixing glass, then stir for a good 15 seconds. Strain into a rocks glass filled with ice and top off with a generous splash of grapefruit soda. Garnish with the lime wedge.

-Vanya Filipovic

name: Reserve Basilica
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Pour the Rum in the Glass and fill with Champagne.

Stir, optionally garnish with a twist of Orange and serve.

name: Ritz Cocktail
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Cognac, Cointreau, Maraschino Liqueur and Lemon Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, Top with Champagne, optionally garnish with a long peal of Orange and serve.

name: Ritz Fizz
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Amaretto, Blue Curacao and Lemon Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, Top with Champagne, optionally garnish with a twist of Lemon and serve.

name: Roasted Toasted Almond
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Vodka, Coffee Liqueur and Amaretto to the glass. Fill glass with Milk.

Shake by placing a mixing tin over the glass and giving it one or two good shakes. Serve.

name: Rob Roy
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Scotch and Sweet Vermouth in the Shaker.

Shake or stir, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, add some Bitters or a twist of Lemon if desired and serve.

name: Rockstar Root Beer #1
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Root Beer Vodka, Vanilla Vodka and Ginger Ale in the Glass.

Stir well and serve.

name: Rockstar Root Beer #2
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Root Beer Liqueur, Vanilla Vodka and Ginger Ale in the Glass.

Stir well and serve.

name: Rocky Mountain Bear Fuk Shot
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Blue Curacao and Melon Liqueur in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Glass, Top off with 2 splashes of Canadian Club or Whiskey and serve.

name: Rocky Mountain Mother Fuker Shot
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Bourbon, Amaretto and Lime Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Glass and serve.

name: Rooster Piss Shot
instructions:
Get a regular size Shot Glass.

Combine the Whiskey and Cinnamon Schnapps in the glass.

Serve.

name: Root Beer Float #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Coffee Liqueur, Galliano and Cola in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Glass and serve. It should come out foamy and taste like Root Beer. Note: for some reason Pepsi makes it taste more like Root Beer than Coke.

name: Root Beer Float #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Galliano, Coffee Liqueur, Galliano, Cola, Milk and a splash of Grenadine in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Glass and serve. It should come out foamy and taste like Root Beer. Note: for some reason Pepsi makes it taste more like Root Beer than Coke.

name: Rose Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Dry Vermouth, Kirsch and Cherry Liqueur in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a Cherry and serve.

name: Roxy Treat
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass in water and then dip the glass into Raspberry Sugar. (Optionally) add a few fresh Raspberries to the glass.

Combine the Raspberry Vodka, Coconut Rum, and Amaretto in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Roy Rogers
instructions:
Fill a glass with cubed ice and Cola.

Add the Grenadine.

Stir, optionally garnish with a wedge of Lime or a Cherry and serve.

name: Royal Bermuda
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Rum, Cointreau, Lime Juice, Sugar and Falernum in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Martini Glass and serve.

name: Royal F$ck Shot
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Crown Royal and Apple Liqueur in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Shot Glass and serve.

name: Royal Flush
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Crown Royal, Peach Liqueur, Raspberry Liqueur and Cranberry Juice in the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Ruby Relaxer
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine equal amounts Coconut Rum, Vodka and Peach Liqueur. Fill glass almost to top with Pineapple Juice and add a splash of in Cranberry Juice for added color.

Stir and serve.

name: Rudolph the Red Nose Reindeer
instructions:
Mix the Rum, Lemon Juice, and Grenadine in a Highball Glass.

Add Ice to Glass and fill to your own taste with Cranberry Juice. Add a wedge of Lemon on the glass as a garnish.

Serve.

name: Rum and Coke
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Pour Rum in the glass and fill with Cola.

Stir and serve.

name: Rum Cobbler
instructions:
Put the Club Soda and Sugar in a Rocks Glass. Stir to dissolve and then add cracked ice until the glass is almost full.

Add the Dark Rum and stir well.

Optionally garnish with a slice of Lemon, Orange or a Cherry and serve.

name: Rum Collins
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Rum, Lime Juice and Powdered Sugar in the Shaker. Shake and strain into a Collins Glass over ice cubes.

Fill with Club Soda and stir. Optionally add the slice of Lemon, top with the Cherry, and serve.

name: Rum Cooler
instructions:
Fill a Collins Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Rum and 7-Up.

Stir well, optionally garnish with a wedge of Lemon and serve.

name: Rum Cosmo
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Rum, Blue Curacao and Lime Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Rum Eggnog
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Rum, Milk, Sugar Syrup and an Egg Yolk in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally sprinkle Nutmeg on top and serve.

name: Rum Fix
instructions:
Stir Lemon Juice, Powdered Sugar, and 1 oz of Water in a Highball Glass.

Fill Glass with Ice, add Rum, and stir.

Optionally add the slice of Lemon and serve with a straw.

name: Rum Flip
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add Rum and Sugar to the Shaker, shake and strain into a Highball Glass.

Fill with Milk, garnish with a dash of Nutmeg and serve.

name: Rum Gimlet
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Rum and Lime Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve with a twist of Lime (optional).

name: Rum Highball
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Pour Rum into the Glass and fill with Club Soda.

Add the twist of Lemon Peel, stir, and serve.

name: Rum Margarita
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. Rub the rim of a Margarita Glass with Lime Juice. Put the rim of the glass in Salt and turn glass in a circle until half of the glass or more is rimmed with Salt.

Combine the Rum, Triple Sec and Lime Juice in the Shaker. Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into the Margarita Glass.

Optionally garnish with a slice of Lime and serve.

name: Rum Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Rum and Dry Vermouth in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve with a twist of Lemon and/or an Olive (optional).

name: Rum Runner
instructions:
Fill a Collins Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Coconut Rum, Blackberry Liqueur, Cranberry Juice, Orange Juice and Pineapple Juice in the Glass.

Serve.

name: Rum Screwdriver
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Pour Rum into the Glass and add Orange Juice.

Stir and serve.

name: Rum Sour
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Rum, Lemon Juice and Sugar in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Whiskey Sour Glass, optionally garnish with a half-slice of Orange, top with a Cherry and serve.

name: Rum Swizzle
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass full with ice.

Combine the Rum, Gosling's Black Seal Rum, Orange and Pineapple Juice in the Glass. Add a splash of Grenadine and optionally a dash of Bitters.

Stir and serve.

name: Rum Toddy
instructions:
Add Rum and Sugar Syrup to a Glass.

Top with boiling Water.

Optionally garnish with a slice of Lemon and serve.

name: Rumpletini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Rum and Apple Liqueur in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Russian Banana #1
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Vodka, Creme de Cacao Dark, Banana Liqueur and Cream in a Cocktail Shaker half filled with crushed ice.

Shake, strain into the Glass and serve.

name: Russian Banana #2
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Vodka, Creme de Cacao Dark, Banana Liqueur and Milk in a Cocktail Shaker half filled with crushed ice.

Shake, strain into the Glass and serve.

name: Russian Bear #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Creme de Cacao Dark, Powdered Sugar and Cream in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Russian Bear #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Creme de Cacao Dark, Powdered Sugar and Milk in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Russian Ice
instructions:
Get a standard size Shot Glass.

Combine the Vodka and Lime Liqueur (Rumple Minze if you have it) in the Glass.

Optionally garnish with a wedge of Lime and serve.

name: Russian Kamikaze
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka and Chambord in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Shot Glass and serve.

name: Russian Quaalude Shot
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Hazelnut Liqueur and Irish Cream in the Shaker.

Stir or Shake , strain into the Shot Glass and serve.

name: Russian Spring Punch
instructions: Pour the ingredients into a highball glass, top with Sparkling wine.

name: Russian Turkey
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Vodka and Cranberry Juice to the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Safe Sex on the Beach
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add Cranberry Juice, Grapefruit Juice and Peach Juice to the Glass.

Stir, optionally garnish with a Cherry or a slice of Orange and serve.

name: Sake Bomb
instructions:
Get a Beer Pilsner and a Shot Glass.

Pour a shot of Sake in a Shot Glass and place it on two parallel chopsticks across the top of the Beer, balancing the glass between them. The drinker then chants sake...sake...sake...SAKE! and slams the table with his fists, causing the sake to fall into the beer.

It should be drunk immediately, and works best with warm sake. KANPAI!

name: Sakerinha
instructions:
Put the Sugar and Lime Wedges in a Collins Glass. Muddle with a muddler or spoon (see our FAQs for a description on muddling).

Fill the glass with ice cubes. Pour the Sake into the glass.

Stir well and serve.

name: Saketini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin and Sake in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve with an Olive (optional).

name: Salty Dog #1
instructions:
Rub the edge of a Martini Glass with Lemon Juice, Lime Juice or water. Put the rim of the glass in the salt and turn glass in a circle until entire glass is rimmed with salt.

Combine the Gin and Grapefruit Juice in the Glass.

Stir well, optionally garnish with a wedge of Lemon or Lime and serve.

name: Salty Dog #2
instructions:
Rub the edge of a Martini Glass with Lemon Juice, Lime Juice or water. Put the rim of the glass in the salt and turn glass in a circle until entire glass is rimmed with salt.

Combine the Vodka and Grapefruit Juice in the Glass.

Stir well, optionally garnish with a wedge of Lemon or Lime and serve.

name: San Diego Chargers - Blue Margarita
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass with Lime Juice and then dip the glass into sugar.

Combine the Tequila, Hpnotiq, Blue Curacao, Sweet and Sour, Pineapple Juice and Sugar in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a wedge of Lime and serve.

name: San Diego Chargers - Deep Blue Sea
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Blue Curacao, Sweet and Sour and Pineapple Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a Cherry and serve.

name: San Francisco 49ers - Barbary Coast
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Rum, Creme de Cacao White, Scotch and Cream in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: San Francisco 49ers - Frisco Sour
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Whiskey, Lemon Juice, Lime Juice, Benedictine and Bitters Liqueur in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a slice of Lemon and serve.

name: San Francisco 49ers - Gold Rush
instructions:
Get a standard size Shot Glass.

Combine the Goldschlager and Red Bull in the Glass.

Serve.

name: San Francisco 49ers - Golden Kiss Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Irish Cream and a splash of Cinnamon Schnapps in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve. GO 9ers!

name: Scarlet O'Hara
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Southern Comfort and a dash of Lime Juice to the glass.

Top with Cranberry Juice, optionally garnish with a wedge of Lime and serve.

name: Scooby Snack Shooter
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Melon Liqueur and Coconut Rum in the Shaker. Shake and strain into a large shot glass.

Add a splash of Pineapple Juice, optionally top with Whipped Cream and serve.

name: Scotch and Soda
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Scotch and top with Club Soda.

Stir and serve.

name: Scotch and Water
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Scotch and then 3 oz of Water.

Stir and serve.

name: Scotch Mist
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with crushed ice.

Add the Scotch and a couple twists of Lemon.

Stir and serve.

name: Scotch on the Rocks
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Scotch.

Serve.

name: Screaming Orgasm #1
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Vodka, Amaretto and Coffee Liqueur to the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Screaming Orgasm #2
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Vodka, Irish Cream and Coffee Liqueur to the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Screaming Orgasm Layered Shot
instructions:
Get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour in the Coffee Liqueur. Pierce the Coffee Liqueur with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Amaretto by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Amaretto. Then do the same thing with the Irish Cream and finally the Vodka.

Serve.

name: Screaming Orgasm Shot #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Amaretto, Coffee Liqueur and Irish Cream in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Shot Glass and serve.

name: Screaming Orgasm Shot #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Coffee Liqueur and Irish Cream in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Shot Glass and serve.

name: Screwdriver Boricau
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Vodka, Orange and Cranberry Juice.

Stir and serve.

name: Screwdriver with Color
instructions:
Add a shot Vodka in the glass and then add Orange Juice until it's about half full.

Add Coffee Liqueur until it has a bit of color.

Add ice, stir and serve.

name: Scroogedriver
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Vodka, Cranberry Juice and Orange Juice in the Glass.

Stir, optionally garnish with a wedge of Orange and serve.

name: Sea Breeze #1
instructions:
Fill a Collins with cubed ice.

Pour Vodka in the glass and then add the Cranberry and Grapefruit Juice.

Stir and serve.

name: Sea Breeze #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Blueberry Liqueur, Raspberry Liqueur, Orange Juice, Pineapple Juice and Blackberry Liqueur in the Shaker.

Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into a Collins Glass and serve.

name: Seattle Seahawks - Emerald City
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with ice.

Combine the Coconut Rum, Melon Liqueur, Blue Curacao and Sweet and Sour in the Shaker. Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into a Highball Glass.

Top with a splash of 7-Up or Sprite and serve.

name: Seattle Seahawks - Seattle Sidecar
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Rum, Triple Sec, Apple Cider and Lime Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Separator
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Vodka Coffee Liqueur and Milk.

Shake by placing a mixing tin over the glass and giving it one or two good shakes. Serve.

name: Seven and Seven (7 and 7)
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Pour Seagram's 7 in the glass and fill with 7-Up.

Stir and serve.

name: Seventh Heaven
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Grapefruit Juice, Maraschino Liqueur and Bitters Liqueur in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a Cherry and serve.

name: Sex at Sunset
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Grey Goose Vodka, Hazelnut Liqueur, Disaronno Amaretto and a splash of Sweet Vermouth in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Sex Machine
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Coffee Liqueur and Cream, Irish Cream and Milk in the Shaker.

Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into a Rocks Glass, and serve.

name: Sex on my Face
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Yukon Jack, Coconut Rum, Southern Comfort, Banana Liqueur, Cranberry, Orange, and Pineapple Juices in the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Sex on the Beach #1
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add Vodka and Peach Liqueur to the Glass. Fill with equal amounts of Cranberry Juice and Orange Juice.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Orange and serve.

name: Sex on the Beach #2
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add Vodka and Peach Liqueur to the Glass. Fill glass with Orange Juice and add dash of Grenadine.

Stir and serve.

name: Sex on the Beach #3
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add Vodka and Peach Liqueur to the Glass and fill glass with Cranberry Juice.

Stir and serve.

name: Sex on the Beach #4
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Coconut Rum to the Glass followed by the Pineapple Juice. Add Cream and a splash of Grenadine for color.

Stir and serve.

name: Sex on the Beach #5
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Vodka, Melon Liqueur and a splash of Raspberry Liqueur in the Glass. Top off with equal parts of Cranberry Juice and Pineapple Juice.

Stir and serve.

name: Sex on the Beach #6
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Vodka, Melon Liqueur and Raspberry Liqueur in the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Sex on the Beach #7
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Coconut Rum to the Glass followed by the Pineapple Juice. Add Milk and a splash of Grenadine for color.

Stir and serve.

name: Sex on the Pool Table
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with ice.

Combine the Triple Sec, Peach Liqueur, Raspberry Liqueur, Melon Liqueur and Grapefruit Juice in the Shaker.

Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into a Highball Glass and serve.

name: Sex with an Alligator
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Melon Liqueur and Sweet and Sour mix to the Shaker. Shake and pour in a large size shot glass. Tilt the glass and pour the Raspberry Liqueur slowly down the inside of the glass and allow it to sink to the bottom. Then pour the Jager along the inside of the glass and it will layer on top.

Serve.

name: Sexy Alligator
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Melon Liqueur and Pineapple Juice in the Shaker. Shake and strain into a chilled Martini Glass. Add Amaretto by pouring close to the inner edge of the glass and allowing it to sink to the bottom. Float Jager on top by holding spoon to edge of glass while pouring into the spoon.

Serve.

name: Shady Lady
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Tequila, Melon Liqueur and Grapefruit Juice.

Stir and serve with a slice of Lime or a Cherry (optional).

name: Shamrock Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Irish Whiskey, Dry Vermouth and Creme de Menthe Green in the Shaker.

Stir or shake, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve with a Olive (optional).

name: Shamrocked Shot
instructions:
Get a large size Shot Glass. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Melon Liqueur, Irish Whiskey and Irish Cream in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the Shot Glass and serve.

name: Sherry Cobbler
instructions:
Cut a slice of Orange about 1/8 inch thick and then cut it in half. Muddle the Orange in the bottom of a Cocktail Shaker and then fill it half full with cracked ice.

Combine the Sherry and Sugar Shaker. Shake vigorously to combine and chill. Pour the mixture (ice and all) into a Highball Glass.

Optionally garnish with Raspberries, Strawberries or any other fruit you have and serve.

name: Sherry Cocktail
instructions:
Chill Sherry and Dry Vermouth in advance. Fill a Rocks Glass with a couple of cubes of ice.

Add the Sherry and Vermouth.

Stir and serve.

name: Shirley Temple #1
instructions:
Fill a glass with cubed ice and Ginger Ale.

Add the Grenadine.

Stir, optionally garnish with a Cherry and serve.

name: Shirley Temple #2
instructions:
Combine the Orange Juice and 7-Up or Sprite in a Wine Glass.

Slowly add the Grenadine and let it sink to the bottom.

Optionally garnish with a Cherry and serve with a straw for stirring.

name: Sicilian Kiss Shot
instructions:
Get a standard size Shot Glass.

Pour the Southern Comfort in the Shot Glass first followed by the Amaretto.

Serve.

name: Side Car #1
instructions:
(Optionally) rub the edge of a Martini Glass with Lemon Juice or water. Put the rim of the glass in the sugar and turn glass in a circle until entire glass is rimmed with sugar.

Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. Combine the Cognac, Cointreau and Lemon Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a twist of Lemon and serve.

name: Silent Third
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Cointreau, Whiskey and Lemon Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Silk Stocking
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Tequila, Creme de Cacao White, Raspberry Liqueur and Cream in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Martini Glass and serve.

name: Silver Fizz
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Lemon Juice, Sugar and Egg White in the Shaker. Shake vigorously and strain into a Highball Glass.

Top with Club Soda and serve.

name: Singapore Sling
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Sweet and Sour and Grenadine in the Shaker. Strain into a Collins Glass filled with ice cubes.

Fill with Club Soda, top with a dash of Cherry Liqueur and serve.

name: Skinny Pirate
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add Coconut Rum and fill the rest of cup up with Cola (Diet to make it a real skinny drink).

Add a splash of Grenadine, stir and serve.

name: Slippery Nipple #1
instructions:
Get a standard size Shot Glass.

Pour in the Sambuca. Pierce the Sambuca with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Irish Cream by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Sambuca.

Serve.

name: Slippery Nipple #2
instructions:
Get a standard size Shot Glass.

Pour in the Coffee Liqueur. Pierce the Coffee Liqueur with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Irish Cream by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Coffee Liqueur.

Serve.

name: Slippery Slope #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Chocolate Liqueur, Irish Cream and Milk in the Shaker.

Shake well until a bit frothy, strain into a Wine Glass and serve.

name: Slippery Slope #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Chocolate Liqueur, Irish Cream and Cream in the Shaker.

Shake well until a bit frothy, strain into a Wine Glass and serve.

name: Sloe Comfortable Screw
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Sloe Gin and Southern Comfort to the glass and top with Orange Juice.

Optionally garnish with a slice of Orange and serve.

name: Sloe Comfortable Screw Against the Wall
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Vodka, Sloe Gin, Southern Comfort and Galliano to the glass. Top with Orange Juice and stir.

Optionally garnish with a slice of Orange or a Cherry and serve.

name: Sloe Gin Fizz
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Sloe Gin and Sweet and Sour in the Shaker. Shake well and strain into a Highball Glass.

Top with Club Soda and serve.

name: Sloe Screw
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Sloe Gin to the glass and top with Orange Juice.

Optionally garnish with a slice of Orange and serve.

name: Smith and Kearns
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Coffee Liqueur and Cream in the Shaker. Shake and strain into a Highball Glass filled with ice.

Top with Club Soda and serve.

name: Smith and Wesson
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Vodka, Coffee Liqueur and Half and Half to the glass.

Stir, top with Club Soda and serve.

name: Smoky Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin and Scotch in the Shaker.

Shake or stir, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, add a twist of Lemon if desired and serve.

name: Smooth Criminal
instructions:
Fill an Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Crown Royal Whisky to the glass and fill with 7-Up.

Stir and serve.

name: Smooth Move
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Rum, Pineapple Juice, Prune Juice and Sweet and Sour in the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Snake Bite Shooter
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Yukon Jack and Lime Juice to the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Shot Glass and serve.

name: Snickers Shot
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour in the Coffee Liqueur. Pierce the Coffee Liqueur with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Irish Cream by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Coffee Liqueur. Then do the same thing with the Hazelnut Liqueur.

You should be able to see the 3 layers. Serve.

name: Snowshoe Shot
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Bourbon and Peppermint Schnapps to the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Shot Glass and serve.

name: Soho Sunset Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Peach Liqueur, Orange and Cranberry Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve with a wedge of Orange (optional).

name: Solo Sex on the Beach
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add Coconut Rum, Peach Liqueur and Melon Vodka to the Glass. Fill with equal amounts of Cranberry Juice and Orange Juice.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Orange and serve.

name: Sombrero #1
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Coffee Liqueur and fill the glass with Milk.

Serve.

name: Sombrero #2
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Coffee Liqueur and fill the glass with Cream.

Serve.

name: Sour Apple Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Apple Liqueur and Sweet and Sour in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve with a Cherry (optional).

name: South of the Border
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Tequila, Coffee Liqueur and Lime Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a half-slice of Lime and serve.

name: Southern Comfort Manhattan
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Southern Comfort and Sweet Vermouth in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally add a Cherry and serve.

name: Southern Screw Shot
instructions:
Get a larger size Shot Glass.

Pout the Southern Comfort in the glass, followed by the Vodka and then a splash of Orange Vodka on top.

Serve.

name: Spanish Coffee #1
instructions:
Pour Coffee in a Coffee Mug.

Add the Coffee Liqueur and Rum. Stir to mix.

Top with Whipped Cream, garnish with a Cherry and serve.

name: Spanish Coffee #2
instructions:
Pour Coffee in a Coffee Mug.

Add the Coffee Liqueur and Coffee Rum. Stir to mix.

Top with Whipped Cream, garnish with a Cherry and serve.

name: Special Tequini Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Tequila and Cointreau in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve with a twist of Lime (optional).

name: Spritz Veneziano
instructions: Build into glass over ice, garnish and serve.

name: Spritzer
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Red Wine and top with Club Soda.

Stir and serve.

name: Squashed Frog Shot
instructions:
Get a standard size Shot Glass.

Pour the Melon Liqueur and then the Advocaat in Glass. Add a few dashes of Grenadine and then float the Irish Cream on top.

Serve.

name: St. Loius Rams - St. Louis Ice Water
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker with ice.

Combine the Vodka, Gin, Rum, Tequila, Triple Sec, and Apple Liqueur in the Shaker. Cover and shake vigorously to combine and chill. Pour the mixture (ice and all) into the Highball Glass.

Add a splash of 7-Up or Sprite for the coloring, optionally garnish with Lemon Wedge and serve.

name: St. Louis Rams - Battering Ram
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Rum, Dark Rum, Bourbon, Sweet and Sour and Orange Juice in the Shaker.

Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into a Highball Glass, top with Club Soda, optionally garnish with a wedge of Orange and serve.

name: Stag and Cola
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Jim Beam Red Stag Infused Bourbon, then the fill with Cola.

Stir, optionally garnish with a wedge of Lime and serve.

name: Stars and Stripes
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour in the Grenadine. Pierce the Grenadine with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Cream by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Grenadine. Then do the same thing with the Blue Curacao.

You should be able to see the 3 layers - Red, White and Blue. Serve.

name: Staten Island Ferry
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Coconut Rum and Pineapple Juice in the Glass.

Serve. The Malibu adds a coconut flavor making for a pleasant Pina Colada-like drink.

name: Stone Sour
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Whiskey, Orange Juice and Sweet and Sour in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Rocks Glass filled with ice. Optionally garnish with a Cherry and serve.

name: Stop Light Shot
instructions:
Line up three shot glasses in a row facing away from you.

Pour one shot of Vodka into each glass. Add a splash of Melon Liqueur to the top one, a splash of Orange Juice to the middle one and a splash of Cranberry Juice to the bottom one.

You can stack them if you like or just drink them down. Red, Yellow, Green. It's a stop light.

name: Stormy Nights
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Orange and Raspberry Vodka, Peach Liqueur, Blue Curacao along with a splash of Lime Juice and Grenadine.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Strawberry Banana Margarita #1
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Tequila, Triple Sec and Strawberry Banana Juice to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass with Lime Juice or water and then dip the glass into Margarita Salt.

Pour contents into a Margarita Glass, optionally garnish with a Lime Wedge and serve.

name: Strawberry Banana Margarita #2
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Tequila, Triple Sec and Strawberry Banana Liqueur to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass with Lime Juice or water and then dip the glass into Margarita Salt.

Pour contents into a Margarita Glass, optionally garnish with a Lime Wedge and serve.

name: Strawberry Blonde
instructions:
Rub the edge of a Martini Glass with water. Put the rim of the glass in the Sugar and turn glass in a circle until entire glass is rimmed with sugar.

Put some crushed ice into glass, pour the Strawberry Liqueur over the ice and add Ginger Ale to fill.

Serve with a Mint Sprigs and a Strawberry if you have them.

name: Strawberry Cosmopolitan
instructions:
Muddle the Cointreau and Lime Juice with half of the strawberries in the bottom of a Cocktail Shaker.

Add ice, the Citrus Vodka and lime Juice to the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, add the other half of the Strawberries and serve.

name: Strawberry Daiquiri #1
instructions:
Add one cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Strawberry Liqueur, Rum, Lime Juice, Powdered Sugar and Strawberries to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Highball Glass and serve.

name: Strawberry Daiquiri #2
instructions:
Add one cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Rum and Strawberry Daiquiri Mix to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Highball Glass, optionally garnish with a Strawberry and serve.

name: Strawberry Delight
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Strawberry Liqueur, Lemon Juice and Sugar Syrup in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a Strawberry and serve.

name: Strawberry Margarita #1
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Tequila, Triple Sec, Strawberry Liqueur, Lime Juice and a Strawberry to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass with Lime Juice or water and then dip the glass into Margarita Salt.

Pour contents into a Margarita Glass, optionally garnish with a Lime Wedge and serve.

name: Strawberry Margarita #2
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Tequila, Orange Liqueur and a couple of Strawberries to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass with Lime Juice or water and then dip the glass into Margarita Salt.

Pour contents into a Margarita Glass, optionally garnish with a Lime Wedge and serve.

name: Strawberry Margarita #3
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Tequila, Triple Sec, Strawberry Liqueur, Lemon and Lime Juice to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass with Lime Juice or water and then dip the glass into Margarita Salt.

Pour contents into a Margarita Glass, optionally garnish with a Lime Wedge and serve.

name: Strawberry Margarita #4
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Tequila and Strawberry Margarita Mix to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass with Lime Juice or water and then dip the glass into Margarita Salt.

Pour contents into a Margarita Glass, optionally garnish with a Lime Wedge and serve.

name: Strega Sun Witch
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Strega, Creme de Cacao White, Cream and Orange Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a glass and serve.

name: Suburban
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Whiskey, Dark Rum, Port, Orange Bitters and Angostura Bitters in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Sunrise
instructions:
Fill a Large Hurricane Glass with cubed ice.

Add Bacardi 151 Rum, Rum, Triple Sec, Peach Liqueur along with the Orange, Pineapple and Pomegranate Juices.

Stir, optionally garnish with a slice of Lemon, Orange or Pineapple and serve.

name: Surfer on Acid Shooter #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Jager, Coconut Rum and Pineapple Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Shot Glass and serve.

name: Surfer on Acid Shot #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Jager, Vodka and Melon Liqueur in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Shot Glass and serve.

name: Surfer on Acid Shot #3
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Jager, Coconut Rum and Peppermint Schnapps in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Shot Glass and serve.

name: Swamp Thing
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour in the Melon Liqueur. Pierce the Melon Liqueur with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Chambord by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Melon Liqueur. Then do the same thing with the Jager.

Serve.

name: Sweet Blackberry Tea
instructions:
Add the Tea Vodka and Blackberries to a Cocktail Shaker and muddle with a muddler or a spoon. Fill Cocktail Shaker half full with cracked ice.

Combine the Blackberry Vodka, Raspberry Liqueur (Chambord if you have it) and Lemon Juice in the Shaker. Cover and shake vigorously to combine and chill. Pour the mixture (ice and all) into the Highball Glass.

Optionally garnish with a twist of Lemon and serve.

name: Sweet Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin and Sweet Vermouth in the Shaker.

Shake or stir, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, garnish with Green Olives or a twist of Lemon if desired and serve.

name: Sweet Tight Kitty Shooter
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Melon Liqueur, Peach Liqueur, Pineapple Juice and a splash of 7-Up in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Glass and serve.

name: T.N.T.
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Cognac, Cointreau, Bitters Liqueur and a dash of Absinthe in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Tampa Bay Buccaneers - Fuzzy Pirate
instructions:
Fill a Collins Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Spiced Rum, Peach Liqueur and Orange Juice.

Stir and serve.

name: Tampa Bay Buccaneers - Pirates Tea
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Coconut Rum, Lemonade and Cola to the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Tang Tart  Martini #1
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Citrus Vodka, Tangerine Liqueur and Lemon Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Tang Tart  Martini #2
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Citrus Vodka, Tangerine Vodka and Lemon Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Tanqueray and Tonic
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Tanqueray Gin and Tonic Water to the Glass.

Optionally add a wedge of Lime and serve.

name: Tennessee Titans - Redneck Margarita
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Whiskey, Triple Sec and fill the glass with Margarita Mix.

Stir, optionally garnish with a wedge of Lime and serve.

name: Tennessee Titans - Tennessee Tea
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Whiskey, Triple Sec and Sweet and Sour to the Glass.

Fill with Cola, stir and serve.

name: Tequila and Tonic
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Tequila and Tonic Water to the Glass.

Stir, optionally add a wedge of Lime and serve.

name: Tequila Body Shot
instructions:
Using a partner, lick their neck to moisten the area.

Pour sugar on their neck and place a wedge of Lime in their mouth with the skin pointed inward. Lick the Sugar from their neck, shoot the Tequila and then suck the Lime from their mouth while gently holding back of their neck.

You can also try these from a woman's belly button or cleavage. Have fun! Take a pic or a video on your iPhone and post it on our InMyBar Facebook page.

name: Tequila Cocktail
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Tequila, Lemon Juice, Grenadine and Egg White in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a slice of Lemon and serve.

name: Tequila Mockingbird #1
instructions:
Fill a Hurricane Glass with crushed ice.

Pour the Tequila and then the Rum. Fill almost to top with Lemonade and slowly pour Blue Curacao over top for effect.

Serve.

name: Tequila Mockingbird #2
instructions:
Fill a Hurricane Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Tequila and Triple Sec, followed by Orange Juice and Cranberry. Add the Blue Curacao last. DO NOT MIX.

Garnish with Lemon or Cherry if desired and serve.

name: Tequila Pink
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Tequila, Dry Vermouth and a dash of Grenadine in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Tequila Shot
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and fill it with Tequila.

Rub a Lemon Wedge on your Left Hand on the webbing between your thumb and forefinger. Shake the Salt on the wet part of your hand. Hold the Lemon Wedge between your thumb and forefinger.

Pick the shot glass up with your Right Hand. Lick the Salt off your Left Hand, quickly drink the Tequila, and suck on the Lemon Wedge.

name: Tequila Slammer
instructions:
Get a large size (tall) Shot Glass.

Add the Tequila to the glass followed by the 7-Up. Take a folded paper towel and put over the top. Slam the shot glass on the table, bar, etc. hard enough so that the drink fizzes.

Quickly remove the paper towel and drink while its still fizzing.

name: Tequila Sour
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Tequila, Lemon Juice and Powdered Sugar in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Rocks Glass, optionally garnish with a half-slice of Lemon, top with a Cherry and serve.

name: Tequila Stinger
instructions:
Pour the Tequila into a Highball Glass and then add ice.

Add Grenadine and fill the rest of the Glass with Orange Juice.

Optionally garnish with a wedge of Lime, an Orange slice or a Cherry and serve.

name: Tequila Stone Sour
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Tequila, Triple Sec, Orange Juice and Sweet and Sour in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Rocks Glass filled with ice. Optionally garnish with a Cherry and serve.

name: Tequila Sunset
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Tequila and Orange Juice to the Shaker. Add Blackberry Liqueur to a chilled Martini Glass.

Shake well, strain into the Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a Cherry and serve.

name: Tequini Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Tequila, Dry Vermouth and Bitters in the Shaker.

Stir or Shake, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve with a twist of Lemon and a Green Olive (optional).

name: Tetanus Shot
instructions:
Get a standard size Shot Glass.

Combine the Drambuie and Whiskey in the Glass.

Serve.

name: Tex Tea
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Combine the Whiskey and Iced Tea in the Glass.

Stir, optionally garnish with Lemon Wedge and serve.

name: Texas Tea
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker with ice.

Combine the Vodka, Gin, Rum, Orange Liqueur (Patron Citronge if you have it), Lemon and Lime Juice in the Shaker. Cover and shake vigorously to combine and chill. Pour the mixture (ice and all) into the Highball Glass.

Add a splash of Cola for the coloring, optionally garnish with Lemon Wedge and serve.

name: The Big Banana #1
instructions:
Fill a in a very large (20oz) glass with two thirds of ice.

Combine the Rum, Coconut Rum, Amaretto, Banana Liqueur in the glass and then top with Pineapple Juice. This will give it a two layered look with the brown Amaretto at the bottom.

Optionally garnish with a Cherry and serve with two straws.

name: The Big Banana #2
instructions:
Fill a in a very large (20oz) glass with two thirds of ice.

Combine the Banana Rum, Coconut Rum, Amaretto, Banana Liqueur in the glass and then top with Pineapple Juice. This will give it a two layered look with the brown Amaretto at the bottom.

Optionally garnish with a Cherry and serve with two straws.

name: The Castle
instructions:
Pour the Orange Juice into a Champagne Flute.

Fill with chilled White Wine.

Stir very gently and serve. Thanks Michele!

name: The De-Cosmo
instructions:
