Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Depaz Amber Rhum, Triple Sec, Lime Juice and Cranberry Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a twist of Lemon and serve.

name: The Godiva Truffletini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass in water and then dip the glass into Chocolate Sugar, Cocoa Powder or Chocolate Shavings.

Combine the Godiva Chocolate Liqueur, Godiva White Chocolate Liqueur and Vodka in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: The Last Word
instructions: Shake with ice and strain into a cocktail glass.

name: The Obama
instructions:
Pour 1/2 can of an Energy Drink into a Rocks Glass and add a splash of Orange Juice. Fill a small shot glass with Bacardi O Rum.

Drop the shot glass into the Energy Drink.

Slam. Note: Special Bomb glasses are available on eBay and other places. They work great for parties and some can be washed and reused.

name: Three Wise Men Shot #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Whiskey, Bourbon and Scotch in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Shot Glass and serve.

name: Three Wise Men Shot #2
instructions:
Get a large size Shot Glass.

Combine the Whiskey, Bourbon and Tequila in the glass.

Serve.

name: Three Wise Men Shot #3
instructions:
Get a large size Shot Glass.

Combine the Cinnamon Schnapps, Jagermeister and Peppermint Schnapps in the glass.

Serve.

name: Thug Passion #1
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Pour Alize in the and top with Cognac.

Serve. This drink was started and made popular by the legendary rapper Tupac (2Pac) Shakur. May he rest in peace.

name: Thug Passion #2
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Pour Alize in the and top with Champagne (your are suppose to use Cristal but at $279 a bottle it's a little pricey).

Serve. This drink was started and made popular by the legendary rapper Tupac (2Pac) Shakur. May he rest in peace.

name: Ti Punch
instructions:
Wash a Lime, remove top and bottom and thinly slice into half rings (there shoudl be about eight of them).

Add Lime pieces to glass and crush with the flat end of a bar spoon or a muddler.

Add the Rum and Sugar Syrup and top with cracked ice. Stir and serve.

name: Tiger Blood
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Tomato Juice and Sake in the Shaker. Add a dash each of Lime Juice and Soy Sauce, and optionally add a pinch of Wasabi. Cover and shake vigorously to combine and chill. Pour the mixture (ice and all) into a Highball Glass.

Garnish with Celery Stalk and enjoy... as you're recovering from those night when you're winning!

name: TnT
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Tanqueray Gin and Tonic Water to the Glass.

Optionally add a wedge of Lime and serve.

name: Toasted Almond #1
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full with ice.

Combine the Amaretto, Coffee Liqueur and Cream in the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Toasted Almond #2
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full with ice.

Combine the Amaretto, Coffee Liqueur and Milk in the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Tokyo Iced Tea
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Rum, Gin, Tequila, Orange Liqueur and Melon Liqueur in Cocktail Shaker half filled with crushed ice.

Shake, strain into the Glass and serve.

name: Tom Collins #1
instructions:
Fill a Collins Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Gin and Lemon Juice. Fill the glass with Club Soda.

Add Sugar, mix well and serve. Optionally garnish with a slice of Orange or a Cherry.

name: Tom Collins #2
instructions:
Fill a Collins Glass with cubed ice.

Combine the Gin, Lemon Juice and Grenadine in the Glass. Stir and then fill the glass with Club Soda.

Add Sugar, stir again and serve. Optionally garnish with an Orange or Lemon slice.

name: Tom Collins ala Olsen
instructions:
Fill a Collins Glass with cubed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Collins Mix and 7-Up or Sprite in the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Tom Collins Vodka
instructions:
Fill a Collins Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Vodka and Lemon Juice. Fill the glass with Club Soda.

Add Sugar, mix well and serve. Optionally garnish with a slice of Orange or a Cherry.

name: Tom Johnstone
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Whiskey, Orange Liqueur, Sweet Vermouth and Lime Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Martini Glass and serve.

name: Tomahawk Shot
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Amaretto and Cinnamon Schnapps to the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Shot Glass and serve.

name: Tommys Margarita
instructions: Shake and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Tradewind Cocktail
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Coconut Rum, Banana Liqueur, Pineapple and Orange Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Martini Glass and serve.

name: Traffic Light Shot
instructions:
Take a Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour in the Grenadine. Pierce the Grenadine with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Galliano by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Grenadine. Then do the same thing with the Melon Liqueur (Midori if you have it).

Serve.

name: Trinity Cocktail
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Dry Vermouth and Sweet Vermouth in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Tuxedo
instructions: Stir all ingredients with ice and strain into a cocktail glass. Garnish with a cherry and a twist of lemon zest.

name: TY-ger Blood
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Tomato Juice and the TY KU Asian Citrus Liqueur in the Shaker. Add a dash each of Lime Juice and Soy Sauce, and optionally add a pinch of Wasabi. Cover and shake vigorously to combine and chill. Pour the mixture (ice and all) into a Highball Glass.

Garnish with Celery Stalk and enjoy... as you're recovering from those night when you're winning!

name: Ultimate Blue Cosmopolitan
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Citrus Vodka (Ketel One Citroen Vodka if you have it), Blue Curacao, Cranberry and Lime Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a twist of Lemon and serve.

name: Vaginal Discharge #1
instructions:
Put a Beer into a large Pilsner Glass or Beer Mug.

Add the V8 Juice followed by the Cinnamon Schnapps.

Add a splash of Cream and serve.

name: Vaginal Discharge #2
instructions:
Put a Beer into a large Pilsner Glass or Beer Mug.

Add the V8 Juice followed by the Cinnamon Schnapps.

Add a splash of Milk and serve.

name: Vampire's Kiss
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Vodka, Gin, Dry Vermouth, Tequila, Tomato Juice and a pinch of Salt to the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Vampiro
instructions: Pour ingredients into glass rimmed with salt. Stir.

name: Vanilla Creamsicle
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

 Combine the Vanilla Liqueur, Triple Sec, Creme de Cacao White and Milk in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Vanilla Rain
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add Vanilla Vodka, Lime Juice and fill glass with 7-Up.

Stir, optionally garnish with a wedge of Lime and serve.

name: Vanilla Rum and Coke
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Pour Vanilla Rum in the glass and fill with Cola.

Stir and serve.

name: Velvet Hammer
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Creme de Menthe White, Triple Sec and Cream in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Vera Rush
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with a couple of cubes of ice.

Add the Dark Rum and then float the Pineapple Juice on top.

Serve.

name: Vesper Martini
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Vodka and Dry Vermouth in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Glass, optionally garnish with a Lemon twist and serve. Note: a true Vesper Martini (like the James Bond version) is made with Kina Lillet, a brand of dry vermouth made in France. Lillet Blanc (also known as Lillet Blonde), which has a lightly floral citrus flavor, is a typical replacement for Kina Lillet.

name: Virgin Banana Colada
instructions:
Add one cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Pineapple Juice, Cream of Coconut and a Banana to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Highball Glass, optionally garnish with a slice of Pineapple and a Cherry, and serve.

name: Virgin Bellini #1
instructions:
Add one cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Peach Juice to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Add the Lemon Juice and Club Soda and mix again, Pour contents into a Glass, optionally top with a splash of Grenadine and serve.

name: Virgin Bellini #2
instructions:
Pour Peach Juice in a Champagne Flute.

Add a splash of Grenadine and top with Club Soda.

Stir gtently and serve.

name: Virgin Lime Margarita
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Frozen Limeade to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm. Add Orange and Lime Juice and blend again. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass with Lime Juice or water and then dip the glass into Margarita Salt.

Pour contents into a Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a Lime Wedge and serve.

name: Virgin Mary #1
instructions:
Fill a glass with cubed ice.

Add the Tomato Juice, a dash of Lemon Juice and the Worcestershire Sauce.

Stir, optionally garnish with a wedge of Lime, a stalk of Celery and serve.

name: Virgin Mary #2
instructions:
Fill a glass with cubed ice.

Add the V8 Juice, a dash of Lemon Juice and the Worcestershire Sauce.

Stir, optionally garnish with a wedge of Lime, a stalk of Celery and serve.

name: Virgin Mary #3
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Tomato Juice, Cranberry Juice and Tabasco Sauce in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Rocks Glass with cracked ice, optionally add Pepper, a stalk of Celery, a wedge of Lime and serve.

name: Virgin Mary #4
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the V8 Juice, Cranberry Juice and Tabasco Sauce in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Rocks Glass with cracked ice, optionally add Pepper, a stalk of Celery, a wedge of Lime and serve.

name: Virgin Pina Colada #1
instructions:
Add one cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Pineapple Juice, Milk, Cream of Coconut and Sugar to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Highball Glass, optionally garnish with a wedge of Pineapple and serve.

name: Virgin Pina Colada #2
instructions:
Add one cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Pineapple Juice and Pina Colada Mix to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Highball Glass, optionally garnish with a wedge of Pineapple and serve.

name: Virgin Sex on the Beach
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add Cranberry Juice, Orange Juice and Peach Juice to the Glass.

Stir, optionally add a splash of Grenadine, garnish with a Cherry or a slice of Orange and serve.

name: Virgin Strawberry Daiquiri
instructions:
Add one cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Strawberry Daiquiri Mix to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm.

Pour contents into a Highball Glass, optionally garnish with a Strawberry and serve.

name: Virgin Strawberry Margarita
instructions:
Add one half cup of crushed ice to a blender.

Add the Strawberry Margarita Mix to the Blender. Blend at a low speed for five seconds, and then blend at a high speed until firm. (Optionally) rub the edge of the glass with Lime Juice or water and then dip the glass into Margarita Salt.

Pour contents into a Margarita Glass, optionally garnish with a Lime Wedge and serve.

name: Vladimir
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Vodka, Creme de Cassis, Raspberry Liqueur and Grenadine in the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Vodka and Cranberry
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Pour the Vodka and Cranberry Juice in the glass and optionally top with a splash of Lime and Orange Juice.

Stir and serve.

name: Vodka and Red Bull
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Vodka and Red Bull in the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Vodka and Tonic
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Add Vodka and fill glass with Tonic Water.

Stir, optionally garnish with a wedge of Lime and serve.

name: Vodka Bitter Lemon
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Vodka and Bitter Lemon to the Glass.

Stir, optionally add a slice of Lemon or Lime and serve.

name: Vodka Body Shot
instructions:
Using a partner, lick their neck to moisten the area.

Pour sugar on their neck and place a wedge of Lemon in their mouth with the skin pointed inward. Lick the Sugar from their neck, shoot the Vodka and then suck the Lemon from their mouth while gently holding back of their neck.

You can also try these from a woman's belly button or cleavage. Have fun! Take a pic or a video on your iPhone and post it on our InMyBar Facebook page.

name: Vodka Bramble
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Vodka, Raspberry Liqueur, Lemon Juice and Sugar Syrup.

Stir well, optionally garnish with some Raspberries and serve.

name: Vodka Gimlet
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Lime Juice and a splash of Sugar Syrup in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Vodka Grasshopper
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Creme de Cacao White and Creme de Menthe Green in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Vodka Sour
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Sugar Syrup and Lemon Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Whiskey Sour Glass, optionally garnish with a twist of Orange or a Cherry and serve.

name: Vodka Stinger
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka and Creme de Menthe in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Walk Me Down
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Vodka, Gin, Rum, Tequila, Triple Sec, Sweet and Sour, Blue Curacao and 7-Up in the Glass.

Stir and serve. This drink is similar to a Long Island Ice Tea or an AMF but bluer.

name: Ward Eight
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Whiskey, Lemon Juice, Grenadine and Powdered Sugar in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Martini Glass filled with cracked ice, optionally garnish with a half-slice of Orange, top with a Cherry and serve.

name: Ward Eight Cooler
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Whiskey, Lemon Juice, Orange Juice and Grenadine in the Shaker.

Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into a Highball Glass, top off with Club Soda to taste and serve.

name: Washington Apple Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Crown Royal, Apple Liqueur and Cranberry Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Washington Apple Shooter
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Whiskey, Apple Liqueur and Cranberry Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Glass and serve. Best if you chill the shot glass first in the freezer.

name: Washington Redskins - Washington Apple
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Crown Royal, Apple Liqueur and Cranberry Juice to the glass.

Stir and serve.

name: Washnigton Redskins - Margarita
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice. Rub the rim of a Margarita Glass with Lime Juice. Put the rim of the glass in Margarita Salt and turn glass in a circle until half of the glass or more is rimmed with Salt.

Combine the Tequila, Orange Liqueur, Blackberry Liqueur, Agave Nectar and Lime Juice in the Shaker. Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into the Margarita Glass.

Optionally garnish with a slice of Lime and serve.

name: Water Moccasin Shooter
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Whiskey, Peach Liqueur and Sweet and Sour in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into the Glass and serve.

name: Weed and Lemonade
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Tea Liqueur and Lemonade in the Shaker. Shake and strain into a Collins Glass over cracked ice.

Optionally garnish with a wedge of Lemon and serve.

name: Western Sunset Tea
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker with ice.

Combine the Vodka, Gin, Rum, Raspberry Liqueur (Chambord if you have it), Cranberry, Lemon and Lime Juices in the Shaker. Cover and shake vigorously to combine and chill. Pour the mixture (ice and all) into the Highball Glass.

Optionally garnish with Lemon Wedge and serve.

name: Wet Kiss
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Amaretto, Sweet and Sour and Watermelon Liqueur in the Glass.

Stir and Serve.

name: Wet Kiss Shooter
instructions:
Take a large Shot Glass and a get a bar spoon in order to help layer the shot.

Pour in the Amaretto. Pierce the Amaretto with the Bar Spoon and SLOWLY add the Sweet and Sour by pouring it over back of the spoon, allowing it to settle on top on top of the Amaretto. Then do the same thing with the Watermelon Liqueur.

Serve.

name: Wet Pu$$y
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Peach Liqueur and Cranberry Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: When Rome Burns
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Rum, Lemon Juice and Maple Syrup in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Whiskey and Soda
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Whiskey and top with Club Soda.

Serve.

name: Whiskey and Water
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass half full or more with ice.

Add the Whiskey and then 3 oz of Water.

Stir well and serve.

name: Whiskey Cobbler
instructions:
Muddle Pineapple, Orange and Lemon wedges with the Orange Liqueur and a little water in the bottom of a Cocktail Shaker.

Add Whiskey and ice and shake well.

Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into a Rocks Glass and serve with any other fruit you have.

name: Whiskey Highball
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Pour the Whiskey in the Glass and fill with Ginger Ale.

Stir, optionally garnish with a twist of Lemon and serve.

name: Whiskey Sour #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Whiskey, Lemon Juice and Powdered Sugar in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a Whiskey Sour Glass, optionally garnish with a half-slice of Lemon, top with a Cherry and serve.

name: Whiskey Sour #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Whiskey, Lemon Juice, Orange Juice and Sugar Syrup in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: White Christmas Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Cream and Amaretto in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, Optionally ass a dash of Nutmeg and serve.

name: White Lady
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin, Sugar, Cream and Egg White in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: White Russian #1
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Vodka and Coffee Liqueur, stir, and then float the Cream on top.

Serve.

name: White Russian #2
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Vanilla Vodka and Coffee Liqueur, stir, and then float the Cream on top.

Serve.

name: White Russian #3
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Vodka and Creme de Cacao, stir, and then float the Cream on top.

Serve.

name: White Russian #4
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Vodka and Coffee Liqueur, stir, and then float the Milk on top.

Serve.

name: White Russian #5
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Vanilla Vodka and Coffee Liqueur, stir, and then float the Milk on top.

Serve.

name: White Russian #6
instructions:
Fill a Rocks Glass with cubed ice.

Add the Vodka and Creme de Cacao, stir, and then float the Milk on top.

Serve.

name: White Trash Martini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Add the Vodka to Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, add Ginger Ale. Optionally garnish with a wedge of Lime and serve.

name: Wild Cherry Manhattan
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Bourbon, Sweet Vermouth and Cherry Juice in the Shaker.

Shake, strain into a chilled Martini Glass, optionally add some Maraschino Cherries and serve.

name: William of Orange
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Cognac, Orange Liqueur and Orange Bitters in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Wine Cooler #1
instructions:
Fill a Wine Glass half full with cubed ice.

Add Red Wine and top with 7-Up.

Optionally garnish with a slice of Lemon or Orange and serve.

name: Wine Cooler #2
instructions:
Fill a Wine Glass half full with cubed ice.

Add White Wine, a splash of Grenadine and top with 7-Up.

Optionally garnish with a slice of Lemon or Orange and serve.

name: Woo Woo
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass with cubed ice.

Combine the Vodka, Peach Liqueur and Cranberry Juice in the Glass.

Stir and serve.

name: WWTD
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Coconut Rum and Cactus Cooler in the Glass.

Serve. Thanks Tommy!

name: X-Rated Flirtini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the X-Rated, Vodka, Orange Liqueur and Cranberry Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve with a wedge of Lime (optional).

name: Yellow Bird
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Rum, Galliano, Banana Liqueur, Apricot Liqueur, Pineapple Juice and Sugar in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Yellow Fever
instructions:
Fill a Highball Glass half full or more with ice.

Combine the Vodka, Galliano, Lemon Juice and Pineapple Juice in a Cocktail Shaker half filled with crushed ice.

Shake, strain into the Glass, optionally garnish with a slice of Pineapple and serve.

name: Yummy Gummy
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gummy Vodka, Triple Sec and Lemonade in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, optionally garnish with a Cherry and serve.

name: Zaza Cocktail
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Gin and Dubonnet Rouge in the Shaker.

Shake or stir, strain into the chilled Martini Glass, add a slice of Lemon or Orange if desired and serve.

name: Zentini
instructions:
Chill a Martini Glass prior to mixing. Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with crushed ice.

Combine the Sake, Triple Sec, Cranberry Juice and Lime Juice in the Shaker.

Shake well, strain into the chilled Martini Glass and serve.

name: Zombie #1
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with ice.

Combine the Rum, Creme de Noyaux, Triple Sec, Sweet and Sour and Orange Juice in the Shaker. Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into a Collins Glass.

Top with Bacardi 151 Rum and serve.

name: Zombie #2
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with ice.

Combine the Rum, Dark Rum, Orange Liqueur, Lemon Juice, Orange Juice, Grenadine and Pernod (optional) in the Shaker. Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into a Collins Glass.

Top with Bacardi 151 Rum, optionally add a dash of Absinthe and serve.

name: Zombie #3
instructions:
Fill a Cocktail Shaker half full with ice.

Combine the Rum, Dark Rum, Triple Sec, Orange Juice, Lemon Juice and Grenadine in the Shaker. Shake and pour the contents (ice and all) into a Collins Glass.

Serve.
